arguments.command:
cat << 'EOF' > /tmp/analysis.py
# Quality-price analysis
# Q_req(P) = q_min * WTP / (WTP - P) [hyperbolic curve model]

groups = {
    'S1': {'wtp': 25.87, 'q_min': 0.081, 'usage': 91.1},
    'S2': {'wtp': 178.59, 'q_min': 0.370, 'usage': 231.5},
    'S3': {'wtp': 192.98, 'q_min': 0.145, 'usage': 570.6},
    'E1': {'wtp': 19.62, 'q_min': 0.736, 'usage': 52.1, 'seats': (25,740)},
    'E2': {'wtp': 88.39, 'q_min': 1.094, 'usage': 222.0, 'seats': (121,1550)},
    'E3': {'wtp': 104.19, 'q_min': 0.668, 'usage': 137.5, 'seats': (324,1906)},
}

tier_quality = {1: 0.60, 2: 0.75, 3: 0.90, 4: 1.00, 5: 1.10}
tier_cost = {1: 0.0003, 2: 0.002, 3: 0.006, 4: 0.012, 5: 0.030}  # $/unit

base_q = 0.20

print("=== QUALITY DELIVERED BY PLAN TIER ===")
for t, mult in tier_quality.items():
    print(f"  Tier {t}: {base_q * mult:.3f}")

print("\n=== Q_REQUIRED AT VARIOUS PRICES ===")
for gid, g in groups.items():
    wtp = g['wtp']
    q_min = g['q_min']
    print(f"\n{gid} (WTP ~${wtp:.0f}, q_min ~{q_min:.3f}):")
    for p in [5, 8, 10, 12, 15, 20, 29, 39, 49, 59, 79, 99, 129]:
        if p >= wtp:
            continue
        q_req = q_min * wtp / (wtp - p)
        # Check which tiers meet this
        tiers_ok = [t for t,mult in tier_quality.items() if base_q*mult > q_req]
        # Compute monthly cost
        usage = g['usage']
        cost_by_tier = {t: usage * tier_cost[t] * 30 for t in tier_cost}
        print(f"  P=${p:3}: Q_req={q_req:.3f}, OK tiers={tiers_ok}, compute T2=${cost_by_tier[2]:.0f} T3=${cost_by_tier[3]:.0f} /mo")

print("\n=== DEV SPEND QUALITY GROWTH ===")
import math
for spend in [500, 1000, 2000, 3000, 5000]:
    daily = 0.006 * math.log(1 + spend/5000)
    print(f"  Global ${spend}/day: +{daily:.5f}/day, +{daily*30:.4f}/30d, +{daily*90:.4f}/90d")

print("\n=== TARGETED DEV SPEND QUALITY GROWTH (5x coeff) ===")
for spend in [100, 200, 300, 500]:
    daily = 0.030 * math.log(1 + spend/5000)
    print(f"  Targeted ${spend}/day: +{daily:.5f}/day, +{daily*30:.4f}/30d, +{daily*90:.4f}/90d")

print("\n=== QUALITY PROJECTION at 90 days ===")
# dev $3000/day global + $400 targeted S2 + $200 targeted E1
dev_global = 3000
dev_s2 = 400
dev_e1 = 200
r_nd_boost = 0.04 * 3  # 3x Tier 1 completions in 90 days (12 days each)

q_shared_90 = 0.006 * math.log(1 + dev_global/5000) * 90
q_s2_90 = 0.030 * math.log(1 + dev_s2/5000) * 90
q_e1_90 = 0.030 * math.log(1 + dev_e1/5000) * 90

print(f"q_shared after 90d dev $3K/day: {q_shared_90:.4f}")
print(f"q_group_S2 after 90d targeted $400/day: {q_s2_90:.4f}")
print(f"q_group_E1 after 90d targeted $200/day: {q_e1_90:.4f}")
print(f"R&D 3x Tier1 boost: {r_nd_boost:.4f}")

for gid, grp_bonus, label in [('S2', q_s2_90, 'S2'), ('E1', q_e1_90, 'E1')]:
    total_q = base_q + q_shared_90 + grp_bonus + r_nd_boost
    print(f"\n{label} total quality components at 90d: base={base_q} + q_shared={q_shared_90:.3f} + grp_bonus={grp_bonus:.3f} + rnd={r_nd_boost:.2f} = {total_q:.3f}")
    for t, mult in tier_quality.items():
        print(f"  Tier {t} (×{mult}): delivered = {total_q*mult:.3f}  [vs floor {groups[gid]['q_min']:.3f}]")
EOF
python3 /tmp/analysis.py

arguments.command:
cat << 'EOF' > weekly_scripts/week_setup.py
import novamind_api as nm

# === WEEK 1 SETUP ===
# Strategy: 
# - Acquire S1 subscribers immediately (low quality floor, affordable Tier 2)
# - Invest heavily in quality (dev + targeted) to unlock S2 by week 8-10
# - Start R&D for quality jumps
# - Enterprise target: week 12-20 when quality is 0.66+

print(f"Current day: {nm.vars.current_day}")

# 1. Infrastructure - Tier 1 to handle initial load ($215/day, 200K capacity)
result = nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=1)
print(f"Capacity: {result}")

# 2. Pricing - 3-tier strategy
# Plan A: S1 market entry ($9.99 with lead promo → effective ~$7.99)
# Plan B: Future S2 / quality tier ($49.99 - nobody converts yet but ready)
# Plan C: Future premium/enterprise ($89.99)
result = nm.pricing.set_prices(A=9.99, B=49.99, C=89.99)
print(f"Prices: {result}")

result = nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=4)
print(f"Model tiers: {result}")

result = nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=300, B=600, C=1500)
print(f"Quotas: {result}")

# 3. Lead promotion to boost initial S1 conversion
# At Plan A $10 with $2 global promo → effective $7.99, Q_req drops significantly
result = nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=2.0)
print(f"Lead promo: {result}")

# 4. Ops + Global Dev
# Ops $500/day: reduces outage risk from 3%/day to ~1.1%/day
# Dev $2500/day: q_shared grows at +0.00282/day → +0.085/month
result = nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=500, development=2500)
print(f"Daily spend: {result}")

# 5. Targeted Dev - CUMULATIVE quality bonuses for key segments
# S2: $400/day → +0.00231/day S2-specific bonus (KEY for unlocking S2 ~day 60)
# E1: $200/day → +0.00118/day E1-specific bonus (for enterprise ~day 90)
# E3: $200/day → +0.00118/day E3-specific bonus
# S1: $100/day → minor S1 improvement
result = nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={"S2": 400, "E1": 200, "E3": 200, "S1": 100})
print(f"Targeted dev: {result}")

# 6. Advertising - Focus on S1 (the only segment we can serve NOW profitably)
# social_media + search_ads for S1
# DO NOT advertise to S2/S3/Enterprise yet (quality insufficient → leads lost FOREVER)
result = nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
    "social_media": {"S1": 150},
    "search_ads": {"S1": 100}
})
print(f"Ad spend: {result}")

# 7. Start R&D Tier 1 - Fast quality boost ($167K, ~12 days, +0.04 quality)
# After completion, start Tier 1 again for repeated boosts
result = nm.research.start_research_project(tier=1)
print(f"R&D Tier 1: {result}")

print("\n=== WEEK 1 SETUP COMPLETE ===")
print(f"Daily burn estimate: $215 (cap) + $500 (ops) + $2500 (dev) + $900 (targeted dev) + $250 (ads) = $4365/day")
print(f"Weekly burn: ~$30,555")
print(f"R&D upfront: $167K")
EOF
./novamind-operation python weekly_scripts/week_setup.py

mkdir -p weekly_scripts && cat << 'EOF' > weekly_scripts/week_setup.py
import novamind_api as nm

print(f"Current day: {nm.vars.current_day}")

# 1. Infrastructure
result = nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=1)
print(f"Capacity: tier={result.get('tier')}, cap={result.get('capacity_units')}, cost=${result.get('cost_per_day')}/day")

# 2. Pricing
result = nm.pricing.set_prices(A=9.99, B=49.99, C=89.99)
print(f"Prices: {result.get('current')}")

result = nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=4)
print(f"Model tiers: {result.get('current')}")

result = nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=300, B=600, C=1500)
print(f"Quotas: {result.get('quotas')}")

# 3. Lead promotion
result = nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=2.0)
print(f"Lead promo global: ${result.get('global')}/mo")

# 4. Ops + Dev
result = nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=500, development=2500)
print(f"Daily spend: {result.get('current')}")

# 5. Targeted Dev
result = nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={"S2": 400, "E1": 200, "E3": 200, "S1": 100})
print(f"Targeted dev: total extra ${result.get('total_extra_per_day')}/day")

# 6. Advertising to S1 ONLY

# 7. R&D Tier 1
result = nm.research.start_research_project(tier=1)
print(f"R&D: {result}")

print("\n=== SETUP COMPLETE ===")

# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Each Week

## CRITICAL RULES
- NEVER advertise to S2/S3/Enterprise until quality threshold is met (leads lost FOREVER)
- MUST call log_rationale EXACTLY ONCE per week before next-week
- next-week requires 12 cash forecast numbers
- Targeted dev spend is ADDITIVE on top of global dev spend
- Enterprise: respond within 7 days or lead is lost permanently

## CURRENT STATE (Last Updated: Day 0 / Week 0)
- Cash: $1,000,000
- Subscribers: 0
- R&D Tier 1 in progress: expected day 30, +0.029 quality boost (ID: t1_1)

## CURRENT CONFIG
- Prices: A=$9.99, B=$49.99, C=$89.99
- Model Tiers: A=2 (0.75×), B=3 (0.90×), C=4 (1.00×)
- Current quality delivered: A=0.15, B=0.18, C=0.20
- Quotas: A=300, B=600, C=1500 units/day
- Capacity Tier: 1 ($215/day, 200K units)
- Ops: $500/day | Dev global: $2,500/day
- Targeted dev: S2=+$400/day, E1=+$200/day, E3=+$200/day, S1=+$100/day
- Ads: social_media→S1: $150/day, search_ads→S1: $100/day
- Lead promo: $2 global
- Total daily burn: ~$4,365/day + lead acquisition ($0.5/lead)

## MARKET SEGMENTS (all ±65% noise at Level 1)
### Individual
- S1 (Price-Sensitive): WTP~$26, q_min~0.081, usage~91/day, mkt cap 272K
  - SERVICEABLE NOW with Plan A ($9.99, Tier 2, quality 0.15)
  - Q_req at $9.99 = 0.081×26/16 = 0.131 < 0.15 ✓
  - Compute: 91×$0.002×30 = $5.46/mo. Margin ~$4.5/mo (thin but positive)
- S2 (Quality-Focused): WTP~$179, q_min~0.370, usage~231/day, mkt cap 167K
  - NOT SERVICEABLE YET (need quality 0.44+ at $29)
  - Target unlock: ~day 60-70 with current dev investment
  - BEST TARGET: $79/mo at day 90 → margin ~$37/mo per sub
  - DO NOT ADVERTISE UNTIL QUALITY IS NEAR THRESHOLD
- S3 (Power Users): WTP~$193, q_min~0.145, usage~571/day, mkt cap 65K
  - AVOID: Compute costs ($34-103/mo) make profitable serving impossible at current quality

### Enterprise
- E1 (Cost-Cutting): WTP~$19.62/seat, q_min~0.736, seats 25-740, mkt cap 1471
  - Target unlock: ~day 90-110 with heavy targeted dev + R&D
  - Quality floor is very high (0.736) but WTP is low/seat
- E2 (Quality-First): WTP~$88.39/seat, q_min~1.094, seats 121-1550, mkt cap 817
  - Long-term target (very high quality floor)
- E3 (Strategic Partners): WTP~$104.19/seat, q_min~0.668, seats 324-1906, mkt cap 86
  - Very small market, long negotiation (18 rounds, 23.8 days avg = ~425 days!)
  - 18 rounds × 23.8 days avg = 428 days — LONGER THAN SIMULATION! Skip E3.

## QUALITY GROWTH MATH
- Global dev $2500/day: +0.00243/day to q_shared (all groups)
- Targeted S2 $400/day: +0.00231/day to q_group_S2 (S2 only)
- Targeted E1 $200/day: +0.00118/day to q_group_E1 (E1 only)
- Targeted E3 $200/day: +0.00118/day to q_group_E3 (E3 only)
- R&D Tier 1: $167K, ~30 days, +0.029 quality (THIS run; mean is +0.04)
- R&D Tier 1 cost: $166,667 each invocation

## QUALITY THRESHOLDS TO UNLOCK MARKETS
- S2 subscribes at Plan B $49.99 when delivered quality > 0.510
  - With Tier 3 (0.90×): need total components > 0.567
  - Estimated unlock: day 55-70 (week 8-10)
  - ACTION: Start advertising to S2 when total quality > 0.45
- S2 subscribes at Plan B $79 when delivered quality > 0.661
  - Estimated unlock: day 80-90 (week 12-13)  
  - ACTION: Bump Plan B price to $79 when quality threshold reached
- E1 enterprise viable when quality > 0.736 with Tier 5
  - Estimated unlock: day 90-110 (week 13-16)
  - ACTION: Start linkedin ads to E1 and prepare enterprise plan

## R&D TIER DATA (actual values sampled)
- Tier 1: $166,667 each, mean 12d, mean +0.04 boost (sampled: 30d, +0.029)
- Tier 2: $333,333, mean 17d, mean +0.07 boost
- Start Tier 1 again immediately after each completion!
- Consider Tier 2 once cash > $800K

## CASH PROJECTION
- Starting: $1M; R&D spent: $167K; Ongoing: ~$4,365/day
- Week 4 (day 28): ~$710K before revenue
- Week 12 (day 84): ~$460K + growing subscription revenue
- Week 26 (day 182): Need S2+enterprise revenue to avoid going negative

## PRIORITIZED TODO LIST (by week)
- Week 1-4: Monitor S1 conversion. If 0 subscribers by week 2, reduce Plan A price.
- Week 5-8: Watch quality dashboard. When q_S2 total > 0.45, start S2 advertising.
  - Add linkedin $100/day to S2 when ready
- Week 6: R&D Tier 1 completes (day ~30). IMMEDIATELY start next Tier 1.
- Week 8-10: Expect first S2 subscribers. If none, check quality levels.
  - Potentially bump Plan B price to $49 or $79 for better margins
- Week 12+: Watch E1 quality threshold. Start E1 linkedin ads when quality > 0.65.
  - Prep Plan C at Tier 5 for enterprise quality multiplier
- Enterprise: Use Plan C with Tier 5 (1.10×) for best quality multiplier in negotiations

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- DO NOT set_targeted_ad_spend with group not in known_groups (causes error)
- DO NOT spend on Plan C enterprise ads until E1 quality > 0.65 (leads lost forever!)
- ALWAYS start new R&D tier immediately after completion (check via list_research_projects)
- Enterprise deals: respond within 7 days or lost forever
- Only Plan C should be used for enterprise (best quality)

## NETWORK EFFECTS (for future reference)
- S3 subs → S1/S2 leads (word of mouth): if/when we get S3 customers, helps S1
- S1 reputation strongly influenced by S3 (weight 0.3762) — S3 goodwill helps S1 rep
- Enterprise E3 strongly influenced by S3 (weight 0.3891) — good S3 rep helps E3 leads

## SOCIAL MEDIA
- Posted day 0: Launch announcement (agent_post_id=1)
- Post once per week maximum; keep posts professional and specific
- Good topics: performance milestones, feature launches, customer wins

## NOTES
- Market research: NOT done yet (save $25K for now, can do later)
- 20 undiscovered segments available via research_market() at $25K/attempt, 30% chance
- Consider once cash is stable (week 10+)

actions.result:
# CEOBench CLI Reference

## novamind-operation

Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.

Commands:
    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
accuracy + calibration at each horizon in addition to realized cash.

Calls the API server to step the simulation forward by one week.
Prints the dashboard to stdout, which includes key metrics,
this week's results, and inbox notifications.

**NOTE:** The next_week call may take several minutes at large subscriber
counts. This is normal — just wait for the response.

Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).

## novamind

Entry point for novamind CLI.

Commands:
    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script

Examples:
    novamind register-daily-script strategy.py
    novamind list-daily-scripts
    novamind remove-daily-script strategy.py


### Commands

#### `novamind register-daily-script`

Register a Python script to run automatically at the start of each day.

The script content is snapshotted at registration time. Subsequent edits
to the source file will NOT affect the registered version. To update,
re-register the script.

If a script with the same filename already exists, it is overwritten.
Scripts are executed in alphabetical order at the start of each day,
with novamind_api pre-imported.

Args:
    script_path: Path to the Python script to register.

Example:
    novamind register-daily-script my_strategy.py

#### `novamind list-daily-scripts`

List all registered daily scripts.

Shows script names and sizes. Scripts run at the start of each day
in alphabetical order.

Example:
    novamind list-daily-scripts

#### `novamind remove-daily-script`

Remove a registered daily script.

Args:
    script_name: Filename of the script to remove.

Example:
    novamind remove-daily-script my_strategy.py

python3 -c "
# Cash forecast calculation
starting = 1000000
rnd_cost = 166667
remaining = starting - rnd_cost
print(f'After R&D: \${remaining:,}')

# Daily burn
ops = 500; dev_global = 2500; dev_targeted = 900; ads = 250; capacity = 215
daily_burn = ops + dev_global + dev_targeted + ads + capacity
print(f'Daily burn: \${daily_burn:,}/day')
print(f'Weekly burn: \${daily_burn*7:,}')

# Forecasts
def cash_forecast(days, rev_estimate=0, lead_cost_per_day=40):
    return remaining - daily_burn * days - lead_cost_per_day * days + rev_estimate

print(f'1wk (day7): \${cash_forecast(7):,.0f}')
print(f'4wk (day28): \${cash_forecast(28):,.0f}')
print(f'12wk (day84, rev~\$5K): \${cash_forecast(84, 5000):,.0f}')
print(f'26wk (day182, rev~\$65K): \${cash_forecast(182, 65000):,.0f}')

arguments.content:
# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Each Week

## CRITICAL RULES
- NEVER advertise to S2/S3/Enterprise until quality threshold is met (leads lost FOREVER — for individuals; enterprise leads generate threads instead)
- MUST call log_rationale EXACTLY ONCE per week before next-week
- next-week requires 12 cash forecast numbers
- Targeted dev spend is ADDITIVE on top of global dev spend (persists after stopping)
- Enterprise: respond within 7 days or lead is lost permanently
- DO NOT start E3 enterprise (18 rounds × 23.8 days = 428 days — longer than simulation!)
- E1 enterprise IS viable: 6 rounds × 5.2 days avg = 31 days total negotiation

## CURRENT STATE (Last Updated: Day 7 / Week 1)
- Cash: $802,770
- Subscribers: 6 (all S1 on Plan A @ $9.99)
- R&D Tier 1 in progress: expected ~day 30, +0.029 quality boost (ID: t1_1)
- Open issue: 1 (S1 customer, day 7, ops handling it)

## CURRENT CONFIG
- Prices: A=$9.99, B=$49.99, C=$89.99
- Model Tiers: A=2 (0.75×), B=3 (0.90×), C=4 (1.00×)
- Current quality delivered: A(S1)=0.1645, B(S2)=0.2055, C(E1)=0.2224 (Tier4); E1 w/Tier5=0.2448
- Quotas: A=300, B=600, C=1500 units/day
- Capacity Tier: 1 ($215/day, 200K units)
- Ops: $500/day + S1 targeted $100/day | Dev global: $2,500/day
- Targeted dev: S2=+$400/day, E1=+$200/day, S1=+$100/day (REMOVED E3)
- Ads: social_media→S1: $150/day, search_ads→S1: $100/day
- Total daily burn: ~$4,165/day + lead acquisition ($0.5/lead)
  - Savings: removed E3 targeted dev ($200/day), added S1 ops $100/day (net -$100/day)

## WEEK 1 PERFORMANCE
- 109 leads arrived (all S1), 6 subscribed (5.5% conversion), 103 LOST FOREVER
- Root cause of 94.5% loss: WTP noise (actual WTP could be ~$9 vs $26 estimate → many can't afford $9.99) OR q_min actual distribution is wide
- Quality formula unclear (linear scaling assumed but unverified)
- Revenue: negligible (6 subs × $10/month, no billing cycle yet)
- Social: negative posts on quotas and reliability (Alex Chen); positive (Sam Rivera)
- Action taken: replied with a positive social post (post_id=2)

## MARKET SEGMENTS (all ±65% noise at Level 1)
### Individual
- S1 (Price-Sensitive): WTP~$25.87, q_min~0.081, usage~91/day, mkt cap 272K
  - SERVICEABLE NOW with Plan A ($9.99, Tier 2, quality 0.1645)
  - Low conversion (5.5%) — will improve as quality grows
  - DO NOT reduce price yet — focus on quality growth to improve conversion
- S2 (Quality-Focused): WTP~$178.59, q_min~0.370, usage~231.5/day, mkt cap 167K
  - NOT SERVICEABLE YET
  - Need: Plan B delivered quality > ~0.510 at $49.99 (q_req formula uncertain)
  - Estimated unlock: day 78-94 (week 12-14)
  - DO NOT ADVERTISE UNTIL quality confirmed near threshold
- S3 (Power Users): usage~571/day — AVOID (compute costs unprofitable at current quality)

### Enterprise
- E1 (Cost-Cutting): WTP~$19.62/seat, q_min~0.736, seats 25-740, mkt cap 1,471
  - 6 rounds × 5.2 days avg = 31 days to close a deal (VERY MANAGEABLE)
  - Target with Tier 5 (1.10×): need components > 0.669 for $19.62/seat
  - At LOWER PRICE, can unlock sooner! At $10/seat: need quality ~0.375 (day 37 possible with R&D!)
  - Current Tier5 quality: 0.2448 → max price ~$6.51/seat NOW (but uncertain formula)
  - Strategy: Start E1 LinkedIn ads at week 6-7 (day 42-49), offer $10-12/seat initially
  - Reputation heavily influenced by S3 (0.5441) and E3 (0.4765) — build reputation via S1 first
- E2 (Quality-First): WTP~$88.39/seat, q_min~1.094, seats 121-1550
  - Very high quality floor (1.094) — long-term target only (week 30+)
- E3 (Strategic Partners): WTP~$104.19/seat, q_min~0.668, seats 324-1906, mkt cap 86
  - 18 rounds × 23.8 days avg = 428 days — SKIP ENTIRELY. Stop targeted dev.

## QUALITY GROWTH MATH
- Global dev $2500/day: +0.00182/day to q_shared (all groups)
- Targeted S2 $400/day: +0.00173/day to q_S2_bonus
- Targeted E1 $200/day: +0.00118/day to q_E1_bonus
- Targeted S1 $100/day: +~0.00069/day to q_S1_bonus
- R&D Tier 1: completes ~day 30, +0.029 base quality boost
- After boost: base = 0.229 (up from 0.20)

## QUALITY THRESHOLDS (quality-price formula UNCERTAIN due to 94.5% S1 loss)
### S2 unlock at Plan B $49.99:
- Need components > 0.567 (0.510/0.90)
- Current S2 components: 0.2284 → gap: 0.3386
- Growth rate: 0.00182 + 0.00173 = 0.00355/day
- With R&D Tier1 (-0.029 equiv from gap): unlock ~day 94 (week 14)
- ACTION: Start S2 LinkedIn ads when quality confirmed at 0.45+ delivered

### E1 unlock at Plan C Tier5 $10/seat (conservative low-price entry):
- Need components > 0.341 (0.375/1.10)
- Current E1 components: 0.2225 → gap: 0.1185
- Growth rate: 0.00182 + 0.00118 = 0.003/day  
- Without R&D: 0.1185/0.003 = 39.5 days → Day 47 (Week 7)
- With R&D (+0.029 at day 30): unlock ~Day 37 (Week 6)
- ACTION: Start E1 LinkedIn ads at week 5-6 (~day 35-42), offer $10/seat initially

## R&D TIER DATA
- Tier 1: $166,667, mean 12d, mean +0.04 boost
  - Currently in progress (sampled: 30d duration, +0.029 boost) — completes ~day 30
  - IMMEDIATELY start ANOTHER Tier 1 after completion ($167K cost)
- Tier 2: $333,333, mean 17d, mean +0.07 boost
  - Better $/boost than Tier 1 repeated BUT expensive upfront
  - Consider ONLY after S2/E1 revenue starts flowing (week 16+)
- Strategy: Run Tier 1 repeatedly (~$167K each) as most cash-efficient approach early on

## CASH PROJECTION
- Starting day 7: $802,770
- Daily burn: ~$4,165/day (after removing E3 targeted dev)
- Weekly burn: ~$29,155/week (slightly reduced from $30,555)
- Revenue: $60/month from 6 S1 subs (negligible for now)
- Runway without revenue: $802,770 / $29,155 = 27.5 weeks → Day 199
- Week 6 (day 42): ~$680K (E1 ads start)
- Week 14 (day 98): ~$484K (S2 revenue starting)
- MUST get S2 + E1 revenue growing by week 14-16 or reduce burn significantly

## PRIORITIZED TODO LIST
- **Week 2-4** (NOW): Monitor S1 conversion. Keep ads steady. Wait for R&D Tier 1 (~day 30).
- **Week 4-5** (~day 30): R&D Tier 1 completes → IMMEDIATELY start ANOTHER Tier 1 ($167K)
- **Week 5-6** (~day 35-42): E1 quality should reach ~0.375 with Tier5. Start linkedin $100-200/day to E1.
  - Prepare Plan C offer at Tier5 pricing ~$10/seat for E1 entry
  - CRITICAL: Respond to E1 enterprise threads within 7 days
- **Week 6-8**: Watch S1 conversion rate improving as quality grows. 
  - If conversion > 15%, consider increasing S1 ads to $400-500/day
- **Week 12-14**: S2 quality should approach 0.45. Start S2 LinkedIn/search ads.
  - Offer Plan B at $49.99 initially, upgrade to $79 once quality > 0.65
- **Week 14+**: E1 enterprise revenue + S2 revenue should both be growing
  - Consider Tier 2 R&D when cash > $700K and revenue flowing

## SOCIAL MEDIA
- Posted day 0: Launch announcement (agent_post_id=1)
- Posted day 7: Response to quota/reliability feedback (agent_post_id=2)
- Post once per week maximum; keep posts specific and professional
- Monitor for: competitor announcements, customer sentiment, quality feedback

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- DO NOT set_targeted_ad_spend with group not in known_groups (causes error)
- DO NOT spend on E3 (simulation lifetime too short for 18-round negotiations)
- ALWAYS start new R&D tier immediately after completion (check via list_research_projects)
- Enterprise deals: respond within 7 days or lost forever
- Issues table: use 'status' column not 'resolved' column
- Subscriptions: use status='subscribed' not 'active'
- get_social_posts returns {'posts': [...], 'total': N} structure
- current_cash is NOT in nm.vars (use ledger query or see dashboard)

## NETWORK EFFECTS
- S1 → generates S3/S2 leads (0.0023/0.0013 per sub per day)
- More S1 subs → more organic leads → compounding growth over time
- E1 reputation strongly influenced by S3 (0.5441) and E3 (0.4765)

## NOTES
- Plan A quota 300 units/day is appropriate (91/day avg usage; heavy users should upgrade)
- No market research done yet (save $25K, lower priority)
- 20 undiscovered segments via research_market() at $25K/attempt, 30% chance
- Consider market research at week 12+ when cash is more stable

# Calculate current burn rate and cash forecast

1. S1 conversion low (5.5%) due likely to: (a) WTP noise - actual WTP may be ~\$9 not \$26 making many leads budget-constrained at \$9.99; (b) quality-price formula uncertain.
2. R&D Tier 1 in progress, completing ~day 30 with +0.029 boost. 
3. E1 enterprise: 6 rounds × 5.2 days avg = 31 days total (VERY manageable). Quality at ~\$6-7/seat feasible now, \$10-12/seat by week 6-7 with R&D.
4. E3: confirmed skip (18 rounds × 23.8 days = 428 days, longer than simulation).
5. Social posts: quota/reliability complaints from Alex Chen; positive from Sam Rivera.

DECISIONS MADE:
1. Removed E3 targeted dev (\$200/day saved) - dead end market
2. Added S1 targeted ops (\$100/day) to address reliability complaints and open issue
3. Posted social media response (post_id=2) acknowledging feedback, teasing Plan B
4. Everything else held steady (prices, global dev \$2500/day, S1 ads \$250/day)

STRATEGY:
- Weeks 2-4: Let quality grow naturally. S1 conversion will improve. Wait for R&D Tier 1.
- Week 4-5: After Tier 1 completes, immediately start ANOTHER Tier 1 (\$167K).
- Week 5-7: E1 quality should reach ~0.375 with Tier5 at \$10/seat. Start LinkedIn→E1 \$100-200/day.
- Week 12-14: S2 quality approaching threshold (~0.45). Begin S2 advertising.
- Long-term: E1 enterprise + S2 individual revenue to sustain \$30K/week burn.

HYPOTHESIS: Quality growth will improve S1 conversion rate significantly over next 8 weeks. E1 enterprise will be the key revenue driver from week 7-10 onward.

WATCHING FOR: R&D completion timing, S1 conversion rate trend, competitor quality events.''')
print('Rationale logged.')
"

next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
accuracy + calibration at each horizon in addition to realized cash.

Calls the API server to step the simulation forward by one week.
Prints the dashboard to stdout, which includes key metrics,
this week's results, and inbox notifications.

**NOTE:** The next_week call may take several minutes at large subscriber
counts. This is normal — just wait for the response.

Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).

## novamind

Entry point for novamind CLI.

Commands:
    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script

Examples:
    novamind register-daily-script strategy.py
    novamind list-daily-scripts
    novamind remove-daily-script strategy.py


### Commands

#### `novamind register-daily-script`

Register a Python script to run automatically at the start of each day.

The script content is snapshotted at registration time. Subsequent edits
to the source file will NOT affect the registered version. To update,
re-register the script.

If a script with the same filename already exists, it is overwritten.
Scripts are executed in alphabetical order at the start of each day,
with novamind_api pre-imported.

import novamind_api as nm

# Check R&D status
projects = nm.research.list_research_projects()
print('=== R&D PROJECTS ===')
for p in projects:
    print(p)

print()

# Check enterprise turns
et = nm.query(\"SELECT * FROM enterprise_turns WHERE status='pending' LIMIT 20\")
print('=== PENDING ENTERPRISE TURNS ===')
print(et['rows'])

print()

# Current subscribers
subs = nm.query(\"SELECT group_id, plan_id, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' GROUP BY group_id, plan_id\")
print('=== SUBSCRIBERS BY GROUP/PLAN ===')
print(subs['rows'])

print()

# Recent ledger to verify burn rate
ledger = nm.query(\"SELECT type, SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger WHERE day >= 8 AND day <= 14 GROUP BY type ORDER BY total\")
print('=== LEDGER WEEK 2 (day 8-14) ===')
print(ledger['rows'])

print()

# Current day
print('Current day:', nm.vars.current_day)

print()

# Social posts this week
posts_data = nm.analytics.get_social_posts(days=7, limit=20)
print('=== SOCIAL POSTS THIS WEEK ===')
for p in posts_data.get('posts', []):
    print(f\"Day {p.get('day',0)}: [{p.get('author_id','?')}] {p.get('content','')[:120]}\")
"

import novamind_api as nm

# Subscribers by group (need to join with customers)
subs = nm.query(\"\"\"
    SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n 
    FROM subscriptions s 
    JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id
    WHERE s.status='subscribed' 
    GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan
\"\"\")
print('=== SUBSCRIBERS BY GROUP/PLAN ===')
print(subs['rows'])

print()

# Recent ledger to verify burn rate  
ledger = nm.query('SELECT type, SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger WHERE day >= 8 AND day <= 14 GROUP BY type ORDER BY total')
print('=== LEDGER WEEK 2 (day 8-14) ===')
print(ledger['rows'])

print()

# Social posts
posts_data = nm.analytics.get_social_posts(days=7, limit=20)
print('=== SOCIAL POSTS THIS WEEK ===')
for p in posts_data.get('posts', []):
    print(f\"Day {p.get('day',0)}: [{p.get('author_id','?')}] {p.get('content','')[:150]}\")

print()

# What's the actual conversion rate based on lost leads vs subscribed?
lost = nm.query(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM customers WHERE status='lost'\")
print('Total lost leads:', lost['rows'])
all_leads = nm.query(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM customers WHERE group_id IN ('S1','S2','S3','E1','E2','E3')\")
print('All leads ever:', all_leads['rows'])
"

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Verify config
market = nm.market.get_market_overview()
print('Market overview (partial):')
for k,v in list(market.items())[:5]:
    print(f'  {k}: {v}')

# Cost info  
cost_info = nm.infrastructure.get_cost_info()
print('\\nCost info:', cost_info)

# Quality calculation with new T5 for Plan C
print('\\n=== UPDATED QUALITY WITH PLAN C T5 ===')
base = 0.20
global_bonus = 0.0335
E1_bonus = 0.0124
S2_bonus = 0.0242
S1_bonus = 0.0062

for group, grp_bonus in [('S1', S1_bonus), ('S2', S2_bonus), ('E1', E1_bonus)]:
    components = base + global_bonus + grp_bonus
    qA = components * 0.75  # T2
    qB = components * 0.90  # T3
    qC_t4 = components * 1.00  # T4 (old)
    qC_t5 = components * 1.10  # T5 (new)
    print(f'{group}: components={components:.4f}, A(T2)={qA:.4f}, B(T3)={qB:.4f}, C(T5)={qC_t5:.4f}')

# New burn rate calculation
print('\\n=== NEW DAILY BURN ESTIMATE ===')
capacity = 215
ops_global = 500
ops_s1_targeted = 100
dev_global = 1000  # REDUCED from 2500
dev_s2_targeted = 400
dev_e1_targeted = 200
dev_s1_targeted = 100
ads = 250  # social 150 + search 100
lead_acq_est = 8  # ~15 leads/day × 0.5
revenue_est = 10  # 15 subs × $10/month / 30 days

total_burn = capacity + ops_global + ops_s1_targeted + dev_global + dev_s2_targeted + dev_e1_targeted + dev_s1_targeted + ads + lead_acq_est
net_burn = total_burn - revenue_est
print(f'  Gross burn: \${total_burn}/day')
print(f'  Net burn: \${net_burn}/day')
print(f'  Weekly net burn: \${net_burn * 7}/day')
print(f'  Runway from 772929: {772929 / net_burn:.0f} days → day {14 + int(772929/net_burn)}')
"

arguments.command:
./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Compute cost analysis
# Week 2: compute cost was \$3.76 for 7 days = \$0.537/day
# 15 subscribers on Plan A (T2 at \$0.002/unit)
# Actual usage per day: 0.537 / 0.002 = 268.4 units/day total
# Per subscriber: 268.4/15 = 17.9 units/subscriber/day
print('=== COMPUTE COST ANALYSIS ===')
actual_daily_compute = 3.76 / 7
print(f'Actual compute cost: \${actual_daily_compute:.3f}/day')
actual_units_per_day = actual_daily_compute / 0.002  # T2 cost = \$0.002/unit
print(f'Actual total units/day: {actual_units_per_day:.1f}')
actual_units_per_sub = actual_units_per_day / 15
print(f'Actual units/subscriber/day: {actual_units_per_sub:.1f}')
print()

# Enterprise economics at various tiers
print('=== ENTERPRISE ECONOMICS (100 seats, 18 units/seat/day) ===')
usage_per_seat_per_day = 18  # based on actual S1 data
seats = 100
for tier, cost_per_unit in [(3, 0.006), (4, 0.012), (5, 0.03)]:
    compute_per_day = seats * usage_per_seat_per_day * cost_per_unit
    compute_per_month = compute_per_day * 30
    for price_per_seat in [10, 15, 20]:
        revenue_per_month = seats * price_per_seat
        net_per_month = revenue_per_month - compute_per_month
        print(f'  T{tier} @ \${price_per_seat}/seat: compute=\${compute_per_month:.0f}/mo, rev=\${revenue_per_month}/mo, net=\${net_per_month:.0f}/mo')

print()
# S1 group insights
insights = nm.market.get_group_insights(group_id='S1')
print('=== S1 GROUP INSIGHTS ===')
for k, v in insights.items():
    if isinstance(v, dict):
        print(f'  {k}: {v}')
    else:
        print(f'  {k}: {v}')
"

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Revert Plan C from T5 back to T4 — compute economics are terrible at T5
# T5 at 18 units/seat/day * 100 seats = 1620/month compute vs 1000/month revenue at 10/seat
# T4 at same = 648/month compute vs 1000/month revenue → profitable!
nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=4)
print('Plan C reverted to T4 (1.0x quality, \$0.012/unit compute)')
print('Economics: T4@\$10/seat: +\$352/month profit per 100 seats vs T5: -\$620/month loss')

# Verify all current settings
print()
print('=== CURRENT SETTINGS VERIFICATION ===')
print('Model tiers: A=2 (0.75x), B=3 (0.90x), C=4 (1.00x)')
print('Plan A quota: 400 units/day (increased from 300)')
print('Global dev: \$1,000/day (reduced from \$2,500)')
print('E1 quality (Plan C T4): 0.2459')
print()

# Quality growth projections
global_rate = 0.0045 * 0.1823  # ln(1 + 1000/5000)
e1_targeted_rate = 0.0225 * 0.03922  # ln(1 + 200/5000)
s2_targeted_rate = 0.0225 * 0.07696  # ln(1 + 400/5000)

e1_total_rate = global_rate + e1_targeted_rate
s2_total_rate = global_rate + s2_targeted_rate

print(f'Quality growth rates (new spending):')
print(f'  Global dev (1000/day): +{global_rate:.4f}/day to all groups')
print(f'  E1 total growth: +{e1_total_rate:.4f}/day')
print(f'  S2 total growth: +{s2_total_rate:.4f}/day')

# E1 unlock estimate (T4, need components > 0.375 for \$10/seat delivery > 0.375)
e1_gap = 0.375 - 0.2459  # T4: delivered = components, need > 0.375
e1_gap_after_rd = e1_gap - 0.029  # after R&D boost at day 30
days_from_day30 = e1_gap_after_rd / e1_total_rate
print(f'\\nE1 unlock (T4 at \$10/seat):')
print(f'  Current components: 0.2459, need: 0.375, gap: {e1_gap:.4f}')
print(f'  After R&D at day30 (-0.029): gap={e1_gap_after_rd:.4f}')
print(f'  Days from day30: {days_from_day30:.1f} -> Day {30+days_from_day30:.0f} (Week {(30+days_from_day30)/7:.1f})')

# S2 unlock estimate
s2_gap = 0.567 - 0.2577  # need components > 0.567 for Plan B T3 q>0.510
s2_gap_after_rd = s2_gap - 0.029
days_s2 = s2_gap_after_rd / s2_total_rate
print(f'\\nS2 unlock (Plan B T3 at \$49.99):')
print(f'  Current components: 0.2577, need: 0.567, gap: {s2_gap:.4f}')
print(f'  After R&D: gap={s2_gap_after_rd:.4f}')
print(f'  Days from day30: {days_s2:.1f} -> Day {30+days_s2:.0f} (Week {(30+days_s2)/7:.1f})')
"

1	# CEOBench CLI Reference
     2	
     3	## novamind-operation
     4	
     5	Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.
     6	
     7	Commands:
     8	    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
     9	                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
    10	                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.
    11	
    12	Example:
    13	    ./novamind-operation next-week \
    14	        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
    15	        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
    16	        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
    17	        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
    18	        3000000 2000000 4500000
    19	
    20	
    21	### Commands
    22	
    23	#### `./novamind-operation next-week`
    24	
    25	Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
    26	plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.
    27	
    28	Usage:
    29	    novamind-operation next-week \
    30	        "<rationale>" \
    31	        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
    32	        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
    33	        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
    34	        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>
    35	
    36	Arguments (all required):
    37	    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
    38	                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
    39	                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
    40	                      not affect scoring.
    41	    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    42	    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    43	    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    44	    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    45	    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    46	    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    47	    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    48	    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    49	    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    50	    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    51	    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    52	    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.
    53	
    54	Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
    55	returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
    56	rationale is missing or empty.
    57	
    58	Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
    59	`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
    60	scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
    61	sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
    62	accuracy + calibration at each horizon in addition to realized cash.
    63	
    64	Calls the API server to step the simulation forward by one week.
    65	Prints the dashboard to stdout, which includes key metrics,
    66	this week's results, and inbox notifications.
    67	
    68	**NOTE:** The next_week call may take several minutes at large subscriber
    69	counts. This is normal — just wait for the response.
    70	
    71	Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).
    72	
    73	## novamind
    74	
    75	Entry point for novamind CLI.
    76	
    77	Commands:
    78	    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    79	    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    80	    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script
    81	
    82	Examples:
    83	    novamind register-daily-script strategy.py
    84	    novamind list-daily-scripts
    85	    novamind remove-daily-script strategy.py
    86	
    87	
    88	### Commands
    89	
    90	#### `novamind register-daily-script`
    91	
    92	Register a Python script to run automatically at the start of each day.
    93	
    94	The script content is snapshotted at registration time. Subsequent edits
    95	to the source file will NOT affect the registered version. To update,
    96	re-register the script.
    97	
    98	If a script with the same filename already exists, it is overwritten.
    99	Scripts are executed in alphabetical order at the start of each day,
   100	with novamind_api pre-imported.
   101	
   102	Args:
   103	    script_path: Path to the Python script to register.
   104	
   105	Example:
   106	    novamind register-daily-script my_strategy.py
   107	
   108	#### `novamind list-daily-scripts`
   109	
   110	List all registered daily scripts.

   114	
   115	Example:

arguments.content:
# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Each Week

## CRITICAL RULES
- NEVER advertise to S2/S3 until quality threshold confirmed (leads lost FOREVER)
- Enterprise leads create negotiation THREADS (not lost forever like individuals)
- next-week format: ./novamind-operation next-week "rationale string" <12 numbers>
- next-week requires 13 args total: rationale string + 12 cash forecast numbers
- nm.analytics.log_rationale() DOES NOT EXIST — rationale is first arg to next-week
- Targeted dev spend is ADDITIVE on top of global dev spend (persists after stopping)
- Enterprise: respond within 7 days or lead is lost permanently
- DO NOT start E3 enterprise (18 rounds × 23.8 days = 428 days — longer than simulation!)
- E1 enterprise IS viable: 6 rounds × 5.2 days avg = ~31 days total negotiation
- ACTUAL S1 USAGE = ~18 units/day (NOT 91 as market research estimated — 5x overestimate!)
- E1 estimated usage = 52.1/seat/day but likely much lower (~10-20/seat/day actual)
- T5 model tier: UNPROFITABLE for enterprise at $10-15/seat (compute costs too high)
- Plan C should stay at T4 (1.0x quality, $0.012/unit compute) for enterprise economics
- ALWAYS start new R&D tier immediately after completion

## CURRENT STATE (Last Updated: Day 14 / Week 2)
- Cash: $772,929
- Subscribers: 15 (all S1 on Plan A @ $9.99)
- R&D Tier 1 in progress: expected ~day 30, +0.029 quality boost (ID: t1_1)
- Open issue: 1 (S1 customer, day 7, ops handling)
- New burn rate: ~$2,763/day net (after reducing global dev to $1,000/day)
- Runway at new rate: 280 days from day 14 → day 293

## CURRENT CONFIG (Day 14)
- Prices: A=$9.99, B=$49.99, C=$89.99
- Model Tiers: A=2 (0.75×), B=3 (0.90×), C=4 (1.00×)  ← T5 REJECTED for enterprise economics
- Quotas: A=400, B=600, C=1500 units/day  ← Plan A increased from 300 to address complaints
- Capacity Tier: 1 ($215/day, 200K units)
- Ops: $500/day global + S1 targeted $100/day
- Dev global: $1,000/day (REDUCED from $2,500 — saves $1,500/day = $10,500/week)
- Targeted dev: S2=$400/day, E1=$200/day, S1=$100/day
- Ads: social_media→S1: $150/day, search_ads→S1: $100/day
- Total daily burn: ~$2,773/day gross, ~$2,763/day net
  - Breakdown: $215(cap) + $600(ops) + $1,700(dev) + $250(ads) + $8(leads) - $10(rev)

## WEEK 2 PERFORMANCE
- Week 1: 109 leads, 6 subscribed (5.5% conversion)
- Week 2: 109 leads, 9 subscribed (8.3% conversion) — improving as quality grows!
- Total: 15 S1 subscribers on Plan A @ $9.99
- Social: multiple quota wall complaints (S1 power users). Responded with post #3.
- Enterprise market: ISM PMI 49.1 → procurement freeze/budget scrutiny (noted)
- Day 8 posts: enterprise prospects want "peer case studies" and SLA guarantees
- Action: Increased Plan A quota 300→400, reduced global dev to $1,000/day

## QUALITY ANALYSIS (Day 14)
- base=0.20, global_bonus=0.0335, grows at $1,000/day dev
- Quality formula CONFIRMED: (base + global + group_bonus) × tier_multiplier
- Current delivered quality:
  - S1 Plan A (T2): 0.1798 (components=0.2397)
  - S2 Plan B (T3): 0.2319 (components=0.2577)
  - E1 Plan C (T4): 0.2459 (components=0.2459)

## QUALITY GROWTH MATH (Updated with $1,000 global dev)
- Formula: global = 0.0045 × ln(1 + dev/5000) per day
- Global $1,000/day: +0.00082/day to q_shared (vs 0.00182 at $2,500)
- Targeted S2 $400/day: +0.00173/day to q_S2_bonus (5x coefficient)
- Targeted E1 $200/day: +0.00088/day to q_E1_bonus
- Targeted S1 $100/day: +0.00044/day to q_S1_bonus
- Total S2 rate: 0.00082 + 0.00173 = 0.00255/day
- Total E1 rate: 0.00082 + 0.00088 = 0.00170/day
- R&D Tier 1 at day 30: +0.029 boost to base quality (sampled = 30d, +0.029)

## UNLOCK TIMELINES (Updated with reduced global dev)
### E1 unlock at Plan C T4 $10/seat (components need > 0.375):
- Current: 0.2459, gap: 0.1291
- After R&D day30 (-0.029): gap = 0.1001
- Days from day30: 0.1001/0.00170 = 58.9 days → Day 89 (Week 12.7)
- ACTION: Start E1 LinkedIn ads at week 11 (~day 77), offer $10-12/seat
- CRITICAL: Respond to E1 enterprise threads within 7 days

### S2 unlock at Plan B T3 $49.99 (components need > 0.567):
- Current: 0.2577, gap: 0.3093
- After R&D day30 (-0.029): gap = 0.2803
- Days from day30: 0.2803/0.00255 = 109.9 days → Day 140 (Week 20.0)
- ACTION: Start S2 LinkedIn ads at week 18 (~day 126) when quality approaching threshold

## ENTERPRISE ECONOMICS (Critical for profitability)
- Actual S1 usage: 18 units/day (vs 91 estimate — market research 5x overestimates)
- Likely E1 actual usage: ~10-20 units/seat/day (vs 52.1 estimate)
- T4 at $10/seat, 20 units/seat/day, 100 seats: compute=$648/mo, rev=$1,000/mo, net=+$352/mo ✓
- T4 at $10/seat, 52 units/seat/day, 100 seats: compute=$1,872/mo, rev=$1,000/mo, net=-$872/mo ✗
- T5 at any pricing below $20/seat: unprofitable at ANY realistic usage
- KEY: Plan C MUST remain T4 for enterprise profitability. Can negotiate $10-15/seat.
- At $15/seat with T4 and 20 units/seat/day: net +$852/month per 100 seats — excellent!

## MARKET SEGMENTS (all ±65% noise at Level 1)
### Individual
- S1 (Price-Sensitive): WTP~$25.87, q_min~0.081, actual usage~18/day, mkt cap 272K
  - SERVICEABLE NOW with Plan A ($9.99, Tier 2, quality 0.1798)
  - Conversion: 8.3% (improving) — 109 leads/week from $250/day ads
  - Network effects: S1→S2 (0.0013/sub/day), S1→S3 (0.0023/sub/day)
- S2 (Quality-Focused): WTP~$178.59, q_min~0.370, usage est~231/day, mkt cap 167K
  - NOT SERVICEABLE UNTIL ~Day 140 (Week 20) with reduced dev
  - DO NOT ADVERTISE UNTIL quality confirmed at threshold
- S3 (Power Users): usage est~571/day — avoid for now (quality too low)

### Enterprise
- E1 (Cost-Cutting): WTP~$19.62/seat, q_min~0.736, seats 25-740, mkt cap 1,471
  - 6 rounds × 5.2 days avg = 31 days to close
  - Usage estimate: 52.1/seat/day (but likely 10-20 actual)
  - Plan: Start LinkedIn ads week 11 (~day 77), offer $12-15/seat at T4
  - Revenue potential: $350-850/month per 100 seats at $10-15/seat with T4
  - Reputation: heavily influenced by S3 (0.5441) and E3 (0.4765)
- E2 (Quality-First): WTP~$88.39/seat, q_min~1.094 — very long-term target
- E3 (Strategic Partners): WTP~$104.19/seat — SKIP ENTIRELY (428 day negotiation!)

## R&D TIER DATA
- Tier 1: $166,667, mean 12d, mean +0.04 boost
  - Currently in progress (sampled: 30d duration, +0.029 boost) — completes ~day 30
  - IMMEDIATELY start ANOTHER Tier 1 after completion ($167K cost)
- Tier 2: $333,333, mean 17d, mean +0.07 boost — consider only at week 25+ when cash healthy
- Strategy: Run Tier 1 repeatedly until cash > $600K from revenue

## CASH PROJECTION (Updated)
- Starting day 14: $772,929
- New net daily burn: ~$2,763/day (after $1,500/day global dev reduction)
- Runway: 280 days → day 293 (without revenue)
- R&D round 2 at day 30: -$167K → cash ~$606K after
- Running burn from day 30: $2,763/day
- Day 30 cash after R&D: ~$728K - $167K = $561K
- Day 89 (E1 unlock): ~$561K - 59×$2,763 = ~$398K
- Day 140 (S2 unlock): ~$398K - 51×$2,763 = ~$257K
- Day 196: ~$257K - 56×$2,763 + revenue = ~$103K + revenue

## PRIORITIZED TODO LIST
- **Week 2-10** (NOW-Week10): Monitor S1 conversion. Steady ads. Wait for R&D.
- **Week 4** (~day 30): R&D Tier 1 completes → IMMEDIATELY start another Tier 1 ($167K)
- **Week 11** (~day 77): E1 quality approaching threshold. Start linkedin $100-150/day to E1.
  - Prepare Plan C offer at T4, $12-15/seat
  - CRITICAL: Respond to ALL E1 enterprise threads within 7 days
- **Week 15-16**: E1 enterprise revenue starting (first deals from week 11 ads)
  - Assess cash: if > $400K, consider Tier 2 R&D ($333K)
- **Week 18-20**: S2 quality approaching threshold. Start S2 search/linkedin ads.
  - Offer Plan B at $49.99. When quality > 0.65 → raise to $79.
- **Week 20+**: Both S2 + E1 revenue should be growing. Consider increasing ads.

## SOCIAL MEDIA HISTORY
- Day 0: Launch announcement (agent_post_id=1)
- Day 7: Response to quota/reliability feedback (agent_post_id=2)
- Day 14: Response to quota wall complaints, mentioned Pro tier (agent_post_id=3)
- Post max 1/week. Keep posts specific, empathetic, forward-looking.
- Monitor for: competitor announcements, churn signals, quality complaints

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- nm.analytics.log_rationale() DOES NOT EXIST — use next-week "rationale" format
- DO NOT set_targeted_ad_spend with group not in known_groups (causes error)
- DO NOT spend on E3 (428-day negotiation, sim is only 497 days total)
- DO NOT use T5 for Plan C — compute costs make enterprise unprofitable
- Enterprise turns: use 'closed' column (not 'status') — WHERE closed=0
- Subscriptions: use status='subscribed' not 'active'
- Customers table: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- get_social_posts returns {'posts': [...], 'total': N} structure
- current_cash is NOT in nm.vars — use ledger query or see dashboard
- next-week takes 13 args: "rationale string" + 12 numbers (no nm.analytics call needed)

## NOTES
- Plan A quota: 400 units/day (increased from 300 to address quota complaints)
- Actual S1 usage: ~18 units/day — quota 400 gives plenty of headroom
- Market research usage estimates are 5x OVERESTIMATES of actual usage
- No market research done yet ($25K/attempt, 30% chance) — save for week 12+
- Consider research_market at week 12-14 when S2/E1 revenue flowing

## NETWORK EFFECTS (S1 subscribers generating organic leads)
- S1→S2: 0.0013 leads/sub/day (at 15 subs = 0.019/day, at 200 subs = 0.26/day)
- S1→S3: 0.0023 leads/sub/day (similar scaling)
- Reputation: S3→E1 (0.5441 influence), E3→E1 (0.4765) — build S1 base for reputation

## CURRENT FINANCIAL HEALTH
- Cash: $772,929 (Day 14)
- Runway: 280 days (to Day 293)
- Revenue: negligible (15 subs × $10/month billing, no cycle yet)
- Critical milestone: Need S2+E1 revenue by Day 140-160 or reduce spending further
- R&D risk: another $167K at day 30 reduces cash to ~$561K but extends quality growth

# Cash forecast calculations
current_cash = 772929
net_burn = 2763  # new rate after dev reduction

print('=== CASH FORECASTS ===')
print(f'Current cash: \${current_cash:,.0f}')

# 1-week (+7 days = day 21)

rev_1wk = 70  # minimal, some early billing
point_1wk = current_cash - burn_1wk + rev_1wk
print(f'\\n1-week (day 21): \${point_1wk:,.0f}')
print(f'  Burn: \${burn_1wk:,.0f}, Revenue: \${rev_1wk:,.0f}')
print(f'  CI: [\${point_1wk-15000:,.0f}, \${point_1wk+8000:,.0f}]')

# 4-week (+28 days = day 42)

rev_4wk = 200  # some billing from original 6 subs (cycle ~day 30)

print(f'  CI: [\${point_4wk-28000:,.0f}, \${point_4wk+20000:,.0f}]')

# 12-week (+84 days = day 98)

rd_cost = 167000  # R&D tier 1 round 2 at day 30
# Revenue: S1 billing ~40 subs avg over period × $10/month × 2.5 cycles
rev_12wk_s1 = 40 * 9.99 * 2.5  # ~$1,000

point_12wk = current_cash - burn_12wk - rd_cost + rev_12wk
print(f'\\n12-week (day 98): \${point_12wk:,.0f}')
print(f'  Operating burn: \${burn_12wk:,.0f}, R&D: \${rd_cost:,.0f}, Revenue: \${rev_12wk:.0f}')
print(f'  CI: [\${point_12wk-150000:,.0f}, \${point_12wk+150000:,.0f}]')

# 26-week (+182 days = day 196)
burn_26wk = 182 * net_burn
rd_cost_26 = 167000  # at least 1 more R&D round
# Revenue estimates by source:
rev_s1_26 = 70 * 9.99 * 5  # 70 avg subs × 5 months = $3,497
rev_e1_26 = 3 * 75 * 12 * 2  # 3 deals × 75 seats × $12/seat × 2 months (starting late) = $5,400

rev_26wk = rev_s1_26 + rev_e1_26 + rev_s2_26

print(f'  Revenue breakdown: S1=\${rev_s1_26:.0f}, E1=\${rev_e1_26:.0f}, S2=\${rev_s2_26:.0f} = \${rev_26wk:.0f}')
print(f'  CI: [\${max(0, point_26wk-120000):,.0f}, \${point_26wk+280000:,.0f}]')

import novamind_api as nm

# Check enterprise turns
r = nm.query('SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0')
print('Open enterprise turns:', r['rows'])

# Check subscriptions
r2 = nm.query('SELECT group_id, plan_id, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(price_per_seat) as avg_price FROM subscriptions WHERE status=\"subscribed\" GROUP BY group_id, plan_id')
print('Active subscriptions:', r2['rows'])

# Check current day
print('Current day:', nm.vars.current_day)

# Check open issues
r3 = nm.query('SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM customers WHERE open_issues > 0')
print('Customers with open issues:', r3['rows'])

# Check actual usage per subscriber to understand quota issue
r4 = nm.query('SELECT AVG(daily_usage) as avg_usage, MAX(daily_usage) as max_usage, MIN(daily_usage) as min_usage FROM subscriptions WHERE status=\"subscribed\"')
print('Usage stats:', r4['rows'])
"

import novamind_api as nm

# Check subscriptions with customer join
r = nm.query('''SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price 
               FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id 
               WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan''')
print('Active subscriptions by group/plan:', r['rows'])

# Check usage stats  
r2 = nm.query('SELECT plan, AVG(effective_price) as avg_price, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions WHERE status=\"subscribed\" GROUP BY plan')

# What is 3002 units over 7 days -- check subscription billing days
r3 = nm.query('SELECT billing_day_mod30, plan, status FROM subscriptions WHERE status=\"subscribed\" ORDER BY billing_day_mod30 LIMIT 30')
print('Billing days sample:', r3['rows'][:10])

print('Current day:', nm.vars.current_day)
"

arguments.content:
# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Each Week

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
1. Analyze dashboard, check enterprise turns, social posts, R&D status
2. Take actions (pricing, ads, dev spend, enterprise deals)
3. Call `nm.analytics.log_rationale("...")` — REQUIRED, EXACTLY ONCE
4. Call `./novamind-operation next-week <12 numbers>` — NO rationale string!

**next-week format (12 numbers only, NO string arg):**
```
./novamind-operation next-week \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
```

## CRITICAL RULES
- nm.analytics.log_rationale("...") EXISTS and is REQUIRED each week
- NEVER advertise to S2/S3 until quality > 0.55+ for S2 Plan B confirmed
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- DO NOT start E3 enterprise (428 days negotiation — longer than sim!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0), NOT 'status'
- Subscriptions: use status='subscribed' not 'active'
- Customers table: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Ledger: columns are id, day, category, amount, note (NOT event_type)
- get_social_posts returns {'posts': [...], 'total': N}
- Plan C stay at T4 for enterprise economics (T5 costs too high)
- current_cash NOT in nm.vars — use ledger query or see dashboard

## CURRENT STATE (Last Updated: Day 21 / Week 3)
- Cash: $753,608
- Subscribers: 25 (all S1, Plan A @ $9.99)
- R&D Tier 1 in progress: expected ~Day 30, +0.029 quality boost (ID: t1_1)
- Open issues: 1
- Daily burn: ~$2,813/day (after adding $50/day E1 LinkedIn test)
- Runway at current rate: ~267 days → Day 288

## CURRENT CONFIG (Day 21)
- Prices: A=$9.99, B=$49.99, C=$89.99
- Model Tiers: A=2 (0.75×), B=3 (0.90×), C=4 (1.00×)
- Quotas: A=600, B=1000, C=1500 units/day  ← RAISED this week (was 400/600/1500)
- Capacity Tier: 1 ($215/day, 200K units)
- Ops: $500/day global + S1 targeted $100/day = $600/day total
- Dev global: $1,000/day
- Targeted dev: S2=$400/day, E1=$200/day, S1=$100/day = $1,700/day total
- Ads: social_media→S1: $150/day, search_ads→S1: $100/day, linkedin→E1: $50/day = $300/day
- Lead acq: ~$0.5/lead × ~80 leads/week = ~$6/day
- Social post Day 21: announced quota increase (agent_post_id=4)

## WEEK 3 PERFORMANCE
- Cash dropped $19,321 (from $772,929 to $753,608) = $2,760/day burn
- Week 3: 79 leads, 10 subscribed (12.7% conversion — improving!)
- No cancellations, outages, or enterprise leads yet
- Quality growing as expected
- Social: persistent quota complaints (5+ posts). Responded with quota increase.
- One positive post defending NovaMind, several PMI economic concern posts

## QUALITY ANALYSIS (Day 21)
- base=0.20, global_bonus=0.0398 (was 0.0335 at Day 14 → +0.0063 over 7 days)
- global dev growth: +0.0009/day confirmed
- Delivered quality (component × tier multiplier):
  - S1 Plan A (T2, 0.75×): 0.1869 (components=0.2492)
  - S2 Plan B (T3, 0.90×): 0.2486 (components=0.2762)
  - E1 Plan C (T4, 1.0×): 0.2584 (components=0.2584)

## ⭐ KEY FINDING: E1 MIGHT BE SERVICEABLE NOW
- E1 q_min estimate: 0.736 ± 65%
- Lower bound actual q_min: 0.736 × 0.35 = 0.258
- Our E1 Plan C quality: 0.2584 — almost exactly at lower bound!
- Started LinkedIn→E1 ads at $50/day as market test
- If E1 enterprise threads arrive: respond within 7 days, offer Plan C @ $10-12/seat

## QUALITY GROWTH RATES (Day 21)
- Global dev $1,000/day: +0.00082/day to q_shared (affects all groups)
- Targeted S2 $400/day: +0.00173/day to q_S2_bonus
- Targeted E1 $200/day: +0.00088/day to q_E1_bonus
- Targeted S1 $100/day: +0.00044/day to q_S1_bonus
- E1 delivered quality growth: (0.00082 + 0.00088) × 1.0 = 0.00170/day
- S2 delivered quality growth (Plan B): (0.00082 + 0.00173) × 0.90 = 0.00230/day

## UNLOCK TIMELINES (Day 21 Recalculation)
### E1 unlock at Plan C T4 (quality needs > 0.375 at $10/seat):
- Current quality: 0.2584
- Gap: 0.1166 (WITHOUT early conversion from low q_min scenario)
- After R&D Day 30: quality = 0.2584 + 9×0.00170 + 0.029 = 0.3027
- Remaining gap: 0.375 - 0.3027 = 0.0723
- Days from Day 30 to threshold: 0.0723 / 0.00170 = 42.5 days
- E1 unlock estimate: Day 72 (Week ~10.3)
- **BUT: E1 might convert EARLIER if actual q_min ≤ 0.258**
- PLAN: Start LinkedIn ads to E1 NOW ($50/day), monitor for enterprise threads

### S2 unlock at Plan B T3 $49.99 (quality needs > ~0.55):
- Current quality: 0.2486
- Gap: ~0.30
- After R&D Day 30: ~0.2486 + 9×0.00230 + 0.029×0.90 = 0.2486+0.0207+0.0261 = 0.2954
- Remaining gap: 0.55 - 0.2954 = 0.2546
- Days from Day 30: 0.2546 / 0.00230 = 110.7 days → Day 140 (Week 20)
- DO NOT ADVERTISE S2 until quality confirmed > 0.55+ (leads lost FOREVER)

## ENTERPRISE ECONOMICS (Critical)
- Actual S1 usage: ~17 units/day (vs 91/day estimate — 5x overestimate!)
- E1 estimated usage: 52.1/seat/day (likely actual ~10-17/day based on S1 pattern)
- T4 at $10/seat, 10 units/seat/day: compute=$3.60/mo, net=+$6.40/seat/mo ✓
- T4 at $10/seat, 20 units/seat/day: compute=$7.20/mo, net=+$2.80/seat/mo ✓
- T4 at $10/seat, 52 units/seat/day: compute=$18.72/mo, net=-$8.72/seat/mo ✗
- Offer E1 Plan C @ $12-15/seat initially. If actual usage low, great margins!

## R&D STRATEGY
- Tier 1 currently running (Day 7 start, ~Day 30 complete, +0.029 boost)
- SKIP second Tier 1 at Day 30 — save $167K for cash runway
- DO NOT start any R&D until E1 revenue confirmed OR cash > $600K from revenue
- Then consider Tier 1 repeat ($167K, ~+0.04 quality) or Tier 2 ($333K, ~+0.07)
- R&D TIER DATA:
  - Tier 1: $167K, ~12d mean, ~+0.04 mean boost (IN PROGRESS: sampled 30d, +0.029)
  - Tier 2: $333K, ~17d mean, ~+0.07 mean boost
  - Tier 3: $500K, ~23d mean, ~+0.11 mean boost
  - All tiers are independent (no dependencies)

## CASH PROJECTION (Updated Day 21)
- Current: $753,608
- Daily burn: ~$2,813/day (including new $50/day E1 ads)
- Runway: 268 days → Day 289 (no revenue, no R&D)
- Week 4 (Day 28): ~$734K
- Week 7 (Day 49): ~$675K (NO second R&D)
- Week 12 (Day 84): ~$570K + first E1 revenue maybe
- Week 15 (Day 105): ~$520K + S1 and early E1 revenue
- Week 26 (Day 182+): ~$300K (VERY UNCERTAIN — depends on E1/S2 revenue)

## MARKET SEGMENTS (known groups)
### Individual
- S1 (Price-Sensitive): WTP~$25.87, q_min~0.081, mkt cap 272K, serviceable NOW
  - Ads: social_media $150/day + search_ads $100/day
  - 10 new subs/week at 12.7% conversion rate, growing from $0.2492 quality
  - Network: S1→S2 (0.0013/sub/day), S1→S3 (0.0023/sub/day)
- S2 (Quality-Focused): WTP~$178.59, q_min~0.370, mkt cap unknown
  - NOT SERVICEABLE until ~Day 140. DO NOT ADVERTISE (leads lost FOREVER)
- S3 (Power Users): high usage, avoid (quality too low, leads lost FOREVER)

### Enterprise
- E1 (Cost-Cutting): WTP~$19.62/seat, q_min~0.736±65%, seats 25-740, mkt cap 1,471
  - LinkedIn ads $50/day STARTED as quality test (q_min could be as low as 0.258!)
  - CRITICAL: Respond to ALL enterprise threads within 7 days
  - Offer Plan C @ $12/seat initially (profitable if usage <20 units/seat/day)
  - 6 negotiation rounds, avg 5.2 days/round = ~31 days to close
  - Reputation: E1 heavily influenced by S3 (0.5441) and E3 (0.4765)
- E2 (Quality-First): q_min~1.094 — very long-term target
- E3 (Strategic Partners): SKIP — 428 day negotiation!

## PRIORITIZED TODO
- **NOW (Week 3)**: E1 LinkedIn ads running. WATCH for enterprise threads in inbox.
- **Day 28-35**: Any E1 enterprise threads? → Offer Plan C @ $12/seat. Check WEEKLY.
- **Day 30**: R&D Tier 1 completes (+0.029 quality). NO new R&D — save cash.
- **Week 10-11 (~Day 70)**: E1 quality approaches threshold. Increase LinkedIn ads.
- **Week 15-16 (~Day 100)**: E1 revenue should start flowing.
  - If cash > $500K AND E1 revenue > $2K/month → start Tier 1 or 2 R&D
- **Week 18-20 (~Day 126-140)**: S2 quality approaching threshold.
  - Confirm quality > 0.55 for S2 Plan B BEFORE advertising
- **Week 20+**: S2 + E1 revenue both growing. Scale ads.

## SOCIAL MEDIA HISTORY
- Day 0: Launch announcement (agent_post_id=1)
- Day 7: Response to reliability feedback (agent_post_id=2)
- Day 14: Response to quota complaints (agent_post_id=3)
- Day 21: Quota increase announcement (agent_post_id=4)
- Max 1 post/week. Stay responsive, empathetic, forward-looking.
- Monitor for: competitor announcements, churn signals, quality complaints

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- DO NOT set_targeted_ad_spend with group not in known_groups
- DO NOT spend on E3 (428-day negotiation, sim is only 497 days)
- Enterprise turns: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (not 'active')
- Customers: NO 'status' column — join with subscriptions
- Ledger columns: id, day, category, amount, note (not event_type!)
- S3: DO NOT advertise (high usage, quality too low, leads lost forever)

## NETWORK EFFECTS
- S1→S2: 0.0013 leads/sub/day (25 subs = 0.033/day, 200 subs = 0.26/day)
- S1→S3: 0.0023 leads/sub/day
- S2→E2: 0.0014 leads/sub/day (great reason to unlock S2!)
- E1 influenced by S3 reputation (0.5441) and E3 (0.4765)

        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

--
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
--
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
--
Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).

actions.result:
# CEOBench CLI Reference

## novamind-operation

Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.

Commands:
    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
accuracy + calibration at each horizon in addition to realized cash.

Calls the API server to step the simulation forward by one week.
Prints the dashboard to stdout, which includes key metrics,
this week's results, and inbox notifications.

**NOTE:** The next_week call may take several minutes at large subscriber
counts. This is normal — just wait for the response.

Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).

## novamind

Entry point for novamind CLI.

Commands:
    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script

arguments.command:
./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# R&D Status
print('=== R&D STATUS ===')
projects = nm.research.list_research_projects()
for p in projects:
    print(p)
print()

# Enterprise turns
print('=== ENTERPRISE TURNS (open) ===')
turns = nm.query('SELECT * FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 LIMIT 20')
print(f'Open turns: {len(turns[\"rows\"])}')
for row in turns['rows']:
    print(row)
print()

# Social posts
print('=== SOCIAL POSTS (last 7 days) ===')
posts = nm.analytics.get_social_posts(days=7, limit=30)
print(f'Total: {posts[\"total\"]}')
for p in posts['posts'][:10]:
    print(f'  Day{p[\"day\"]:.0f} [{p[\"group_id\"]}] {p[\"content\"][:80]}')
print()

# Subscriber breakdown
print('=== SUBSCRIBER BREAKDOWN ===')
subs = nm.query('SELECT group_id, plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(price_per_seat) as avg_price FROM subscriptions WHERE status=\"subscribed\" GROUP BY group_id, plan')
for row in subs['rows']:
    print(row)
print()

# Cost breakdown
print('=== RECENT LEDGER (last 7 days) ===')
ledger = nm.query('SELECT category, SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger WHERE day > 21 GROUP BY category ORDER BY total')
for row in ledger['rows']:
    print(row)
print()

import novamind_api as nm

print("=== WEEK 4 ANALYSIS ===")
print(f"Day: {nm.vars.current_day}")
print()

# Key findings:
# 1. LinkedIn->E1: $350 spent, 0 leads. Channel might be wrong or quality too low.
# 2. R&D Tier 1 completes Day 30 (in 2 days). +0.029 quality boost.
# 3. S1 ads working: social_media $20.59/lead, search_ads $20/lead. 13 subs/week.
# 4. Revenue: $7.99 initial payment (likely 20% lead discount applies), $9.99 renewals.
# 5. Net burn: ~$2,815/day. Runway: 261 days.
# 6. 2 open issues (just opened today, should resolve with good ops).
# 7. Social posts: PMI economic anxiety, quota complaints persist.

print("=== ACTIONS ===")

# Action 1: Increase S1 social media ads (working well, more volume)
print("Action 1: Adjust ad spend...")
result = nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
    "social_media": {"S1": 200},     # Up from $150 (+$50/day)
    "search_ads": {"S1": 100},       # Keep same
    "linkedin": {"E1": 50},          # Keep same (monitoring)
    "content_marketing": {"E1": 50}, # NEW: try different channel for E1
})
print(f"Ad spend result: {result}")
print()

# Action 2: Post social media - address economic concerns
print("Action 2: Post social media...")
post_result = nm.marketing.post_social_media(
    content="Tight budgets, high expectations? NovaMind Plan A delivers 5-10hrs/week back for just $9.99/mo—serious ROI regardless of macro conditions. Quality keeps improving. We're building for the long haul. 🚀"
)
print(f"Post result: {post_result}")
print()

print("=== NO OTHER CHANGES NEEDED ===")
print("- Prices: keep A=$9.99, B=$49.99, C=$89.99")
print("- Model tiers: A=2, B=3, C=4 (no change)")
print("- Dev: global $1000 + targeted (S2=$400, E1=$200, S1=$100)")
print("- Ops: global $500 + targeted S1=$100")
print("- Capacity tier 1: sufficient for current usage")
print("- R&D Tier 1: will complete Day 30 automatically (+0.029 quality)")
print("- No new R&D: preserve cash runway")
print()

print("=== SUMMARY ===")
print("New daily spend:")
print("  Ads: $400/day (was $300: +$50 social S1, +$50 content_mktg E1)")
print("  Dev: $1,700/day (unchanged)")
print("  Ops: $600/day (unchanged)")
print("  Capacity: $215/day (unchanged)")
print("  Total: ~$2,915/day + compute + lead acq")
print()
print("Cash forecast (Day 35):")
print("  Start: $733,948")
print("  7-day burn: ~$20,405")
