# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Each Week

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash
# next-week takes 13 args: rationale string FIRST, then 12 numbers!
./novamind-operation next-week \
    "Your rationale here" \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
```
**DO NOT call log_rationale() separately — it is embedded in next-week!**

## CRITICAL RULES
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscriptions: plan column (not plan_id)
- Enterprise turns: day column (not created_at_day)
- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note
- get_social_posts: {'posts': [...], 'total': N}; post fields: post_id, day, content, group_id, source_group_id, customer_type
- issues: status='open', columns: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status
- Issues: NO issue_type column!
- Subscriptions: NO 'usage' column!
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media()
- next-week: 13 args (rationale string FIRST + 12 numbers)

## CURRENT STATE (Last Updated: Day 91 / Week 13)
- Cash: $386,459
- Individual Subscribers: 1,321 (410 S1 + 795 S2 + 116 S3)
  - S1: 367A + 40B + 3C | S2: 73A + 465B + 257C | S3: 6A + 59B + 51C
- Enterprise: 0 seats, 0 open threads
- Open issues: 77 (avg 0.6 days old — VERY FRESH, ops working well)
- MRR: ~$40,297/month = $1,341/day
- Daily costs: $6,810/day (cap $530 + ops $1,000 + dev $2,500 + ads $1,500 + compute $1,200 + leads $80)
- Net burn: ~$5,469/day
- Runway: ~71 days → Day 162 (but revenue growing rapidly!)

## WEEK 13 CHANGES (Day 91)
- Plan B raised: $29.99 → **$39.99** ✅
- S2 lead promo: 15% → 10% ✅
- S3 lead promo: 10% → 5% ✅
- Ops: $800 → **$1,000/day** (global $800 + S1 $100 + S2 $100) ✅
- Social post: addressed support complaints + growth milestone ✅

## CURRENT CONFIG (Day 91)
- Prices: A=$9.99, B=$39.99, C=$89.99
- Model Tiers: A=2 (0.75×), B=3 (0.90×), C=4 (1.00×)
- Quotas: A=2000, B=8000, C=20000 (unchanged)
- Capacity: Tier 2 ($530/day, 800K units/day)
- Lead promotions: S2=10%, S3=5%
- Ops: global $800 + S1 $100 + S2 $100 targeted = $1,000/day
- Dev: global $1,000 + S2 $800 + S3 $700 = $2,500/day
- Ads: content_mktg S2:$600 + social S2:$400 + social S3:$250 + linkedin S2:$200 + social S1:$50 = $1,500/day
- TOTAL DAILY: ~$6,810/day gross costs

## QUALITY SNAPSHOT (Day 91 — ACTUAL)
- global_bonus = 0.1481 (q_shared from global dev spend)
- S1 Plan A: 0.2850 (T2), S1 grp bonus: +0.0320
- S2 Plan B (T3): **0.4753** | Plan C (T4): **0.5281** | S2 grp bonus: +0.1801
- S3 Plan C (T4): **0.4675** | S3 grp bonus: +0.1194
- E1 Plan C (T4): 0.4222 (too low for E1, skip enterprise for now)

## PRICE RAISE ROADMAP

### Plan B Raise Schedule:
| Day | Plan B Price | Quality Req (S2) | S2 Plan B Quality | Status |
|-----|-------------|-----------------|-------------------|--------|
| 91  | $39.99      | ~0.39           | 0.4753 ✓          | DONE   |
| 112 | $59.99      | ~0.44           | 0.5411 (proj)     | NEXT   |
| 140 | $79.99      | ~0.55           | 0.7949 (proj)     | PLANNED|
| 168 | $99.99      | ~0.65           | 0.7949+ (proj)    | PLANNED|

### Plan C Raise Schedule:
| Day | Plan C Price | Status |
|-----|-------------|--------|
| 84  | $89.99      | DONE (propagating) |
| 112 | $109.99     | NEXT |
| 140 | $129.99     | PLANNED |
| 168 | $149.99     | PLANNED |

## REVENUE RAMP MODEL

### From Day 91 base ($1,341/day):
- Plan C $89.99 rebilling (started Day 84, 30-day ramp): +$308/day peak at Day 114
- Plan B $39.99 raise (started Day 91, 30-day ramp): +$188/day peak at Day 121
- New subs growth (+300/week × avg $50/sub / 30 = +$500/week = +$71/day per week):
  - Week 14: +$71/day more, Week 15: +$142/day more, ...Week 26: +$852/day more
- Plan B $59.99 raise at Day 112 (fully propagated Day 142): +~$500/day
- Plan C $109.99 raise at Day 112 (fully propagated Day 142): +~$280/day

### Cash Trajectory:
| Day | Cash | Notes |
|-----|------|-------|
| 91  | $386K | Week 13 start |
| 98  | ~$349K | Burn $5,400/day |
| 112 | ~$267K | Raise B→$59.99, C→$109.99 |

**BREAK-EVEN: ~Day 185-200 (after Day 168 raise propagates)**

## CONVERSION DATA (Week 13)
- Overall: 1,070 leads → 329 subs = **30.7%** ✓ (best yet!)
- S2 Plan B quality 0.4753 >> threshold → raise to $39.99 safe
- S2 Plan C quality 0.5281 >> threshold at $80.99 effective (10% promo)
- S3 Plan C quality 0.4675 >> threshold at $85.49 effective (5% promo)
- S1 hitting Plan A usage caps → organic upsell to Plan B ($39.99 still attractive)

## MARKET SEGMENTS

### Individual
- **S1**: 410 subs (price-sensitive, Plan A mostly), organic growth ~7/week
  - S1 hitting quota caps on Plan A → natural Plan B upsell signal
  - Revenue: ~$5,046/month
  
- **S2**: 795 subs, WTP~$178.59 ← MAIN VALUE DRIVER
  - Conversion: 30.7% ✓ — best ever!
  - Revenue: $13,945(B) + $15,687(C) = $29,632/month
  - C subs still at avg $61 (transitioning to $89.99 over 30 days)
  
- **S3**: 116 subs, WTP~$192.98
  - Revenue: ~$4,888/month

### Enterprise (SKIPPING)
- E1 Plan C quality: 0.4222 (threshold ~0.645) → gap too large, skip
- Will reconsider when cash > $500K and quality improves further

## OUTAGE HISTORY
- Week 13: 30-min outage (random, not overload). Caused S2 support complaints.
- Operations now $1,000/day to reduce future outage probability
- Current usage: 1,010,947/week = 144K/day → Tier 2 (800K/day) safe until Day ~225

## FINANCIAL METRICS (Days 85-91)
- Compute: $1,143/day avg = $0.865/sub/day (T4 savings confirmed!)
- Revenue: $1,198/day avg (some days $710, some days $1,634 due to billing cycle spread)
- Net: -$5,352/day (old config) → -$5,469/day (new config)

## R&D STATUS
- Tier 1: COMPLETED (+0.0289 boost)
- Tier 2: $333K, mean 17 days, +0.07 boost
- **TARGET**: Start R&D Tier 2 when cash recovers to $500K+ (Day 220+)

## KEY PRIORITIES FOR WEEK 14 (Day 98)

### CRITICAL:
1. **ENTERPRISE THREADS**: Check immediately! Respond within 7 days.
2. **MONITOR Plan B $39.99 conversion**: Did conversion drop? Target > 25%
   - If drops badly: consider S2 10% lead promo increase → 15%
3. **MONITOR Plan B $39.99 churn**: Existing B subs rebilling at higher price
   - Target < 15% churn from Plan B subs
   - Tenure loyalty helps existing subs

### WEEK 14 ACTIONS:
4. Check quality at Day 98: S2 Plan B should be ~0.507 (from MEMORY roadmap)
5. Prepare Day 112 Plan B raise to $59.99 (verify quality at Day 112: need 0.5411)
6. Monitor compute costs with growing sub count

### WEEK 17 (Day 112): CRITICAL RAISE
- **Raise Plan B: $39.99 → $59.99**
- **Raise Plan C: $89.99 → $109.99**
- This is the most important revenue milestone in the next 3 weeks!
- Quality must be confirmed > 0.54 for Plan B before executing

## MACRO/PMI
- PMI: 46.1 (down from 44.5) — S1 social posts about macro concerns
- Individual segments mostly unaffected (S2/S3 quality users)
- Monitor S1 churn if PMI drops further

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- log_rationale() IS embedded in next-week — DO NOT call separately
- next-week takes 13 args: rationale string FIRST + 12 numbers (confirmed in CLI docs)
- Enterprise turns: WHERE closed=0 (not status)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (not 'active')
- Issues: NO issue_type column!
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)

## CRITICAL DB QUERIES
- Cash: nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger')
- Active subs: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Enterprise open threads: WHERE closed=0
- Issues: WHERE status='open'
- Subs by group: JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscription columns: plan, effective_price, start_day, status, seat_count

actions.result:
# CEOBench CLI Reference

## novamind-operation

Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.

Commands:
    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and

arguments.command:
./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# 1. Subscriber breakdown by group/plan
r = nm.query('''
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, 
       AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price,
       SUM(s.effective_price) as total_monthly
FROM subscriptions s 
JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan
ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
print('=== SUBSCRIBER BREAKDOWN ===')
for row in r['rows']: 
    print(f\"  {row['group_id']} Plan {row['plan']}: {row['n']} subs, avg \${row['avg_price']:.2f}, total \${row['total_monthly']:.0f}/mo\")

# 2. Total MRR
r2 = nm.query('''SELECT SUM(s.effective_price) as mrr
FROM subscriptions s WHERE s.status='subscribed' ''')
print(f\"\\nTotal MRR: \${r2['rows'][0]['mrr']:.0f}/month = \${r2['rows'][0]['mrr']/30:.0f}/day\")

# 3. Cash
r3 = nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger')
print(f\"Cash: \${r3['rows'][0]['total']:.0f}\")
"

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# 1. RAISE PLAN B to \$59.99 (quality 0.4987 >> threshold ~0.40 at 33.6% WTP)
# Keep Plan C at \$89.99 (quality 0.5541 borderline after competitor events)
nm.pricing.set_prices(A=9.99, B=59.99, C=89.99)
print('Prices: A=\$9.99, B=\$59.99, C=\$89.99')

# 2. RAISE QUOTAS - address throttling complaints immediately  
nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=5000, B=15000, C=40000)
print('Quotas: A=5000, B=15000, C=40000/day')

# 3. RESTORE LEAD PROMOS - fix 12.5% conversion
nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0, by_group={'S2': 15.0, 'S3': 10.0})
print('Lead promos: S2=15%, S3=10%')
" 2>&1

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# 4. ADJUST SPENDING - cut dev slightly to extend runway, keep ops for issues
# Global: ops \$900 (+100), dev \$800 (-200)
nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=900, development=800)
print('Global spend: ops=\$900/day, dev=\$800/day')

# 5. TARGETED DEV - maintain S2/S3 quality improvement (reduced from before)
nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 700, 'S3': 400})
print('Targeted dev: S2=\$700/day, S3=\$400/day')

# 6. TARGETED OPS - CRITICAL: fix 43-day old S1 issue
nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={'S1': 300, 'S2': 100})
print('Targeted ops: S1=\$300/day, S2=\$100/day')
" 2>&1

arguments.content:
# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Each Week

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash
# next-week takes 13 args: rationale string FIRST, then 12 numbers!
./novamind-operation next-week \
    "Your rationale here" \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
```
**DO NOT call log_rationale() separately — it is embedded in next-week!**

## CRITICAL RULES
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscriptions: plan column (not plan_id)
- Enterprise turns: day column (not created_at_day)
- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note
- get_social_posts: {'posts': [...], 'total': N}; post fields: post_id, day, content, group_id, source_group_id, customer_type
- issues: status='open', columns: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status
- Issues: NO issue_type column!
- Subscriptions: NO 'usage' column!
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media()
- next-week: 13 args (rationale string FIRST + 12 numbers)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all allocations (must include all channels you want)

## CURRENT STATE (Last Updated: Day 98 / Week 14)
- Cash: $348,971
- Individual Subscribers: 1,435 (417 S1 + 903 S2 + 115 S3)
  - S1: 386A + 29B + 2C | S2: 117A + 603B + 183C | S3: 9A + 69B + 37C
- Enterprise: 0 seats, 0 open threads
- Open issues: 139 (S1=33 max_age=43 days!, S2=101, S3=8)
- MRR: ~$41,676/month = $1,572/day (actual from ledger)
- Daily costs: $6,180/day (breakdown below)
- Net burn: ~$4,608/day (down from $5,400)

## WEEK 14 CHANGES (Day 98)
- Plan B: $39.99 → **$59.99** ✅ (quality 0.4987 >> threshold ~0.40 post-competitors)
- S2 lead promo: 10% → **15%** ✅
- S3 lead promo: 5% → **10%** ✅
- Quotas: A→5000, B→15000, C→40000 ✅ (fixed throttling complaints)
- Ads cut: dropped linkedin S2 (-$200) and social S1 (-$50) = $1,500→$1,200/day
- Dev cut: S2 $800→$700, S3 $700→$400, global $1,000→$800 (save cash)
- Ops increase: global $800→$900, S1 targeted $100→$300 (fix 43-day old issue!)
- Social post: quota upgrade announcement ✅

## CURRENT CONFIG (Day 98)
- Prices: A=$9.99, B=$59.99 ← RAISED!, C=$89.99
- Model Tiers: A=2 (0.75×), B=3 (0.90×), C=4 (1.00×)
- Quotas: A=5000, B=15000, C=40000 units/day ← RAISED!
- Capacity: Tier 2 ($530/day, 800K units/day)
- Lead promotions: S2=15%, S3=10%
- Ops: global $900 + S1 $300 + S2 $100 = $1,300/day
- Dev: global $800 + S2 $700 + S3 $400 = $1,900/day
- Ads: content_mktg S2=$600 + social S2=$400 + social S3=$200 = $1,200/day
- TOTAL DAILY: ~$6,180/day

## CRITICAL CONTEXT: COMPETITOR EVENTS (Days 94-97)
- 7 competitor events in 4 days (CloudPeak, ApexSaaS, QuantumEdge, NexGen)
- Each event: +0.13-0.17 quality boost to competitors
- Effect: raised customer quality expectations permanently (+0.05-0.10 estimated)
- Result: conversion dropped 30.7%→12.5%, 125 downgrades (mostly S2 C→B)
- PMI: 46.1 contraction (companies tightening budgets, more scrutiny)

## QUALITY SNAPSHOT (Day 98 — ACTUAL)
- global_bonus = 0.1506
- S2 Plan B (T3): 0.4987 | S2 Plan C (T4): 0.5541 | S2 grp bonus: +0.2035
- S3 Plan B (T3): 0.4416 | S3 Plan C (T4): 0.4907 | S3 grp bonus: +0.1401
- S1 Plan A (T2): 0.2869 | S1 grp bonus: +0.0320

## QUALITY PROJECTIONS
Daily improvement rates (new config):
- q_shared (global $800 dev): +0.000668/day
- S2 group bonus ($700 targeted): +0.00300/day
- S3 group bonus ($400 targeted): +0.00180/day

|-----|----------------|----------------|----------------|-------|

| 126 | 0.5911         | 0.6567         | 0.5901         | 28 days |

| 154 | 0.6835         | 0.7593         | 0.6895         | 56 days |

## PRICE RAISE ROADMAP (UPDATED)

### Plan B Schedule:
| Day | Price  | S2 Quality | Threshold | Notes |
|-----|--------|------------|-----------|-------|
| 98  | $59.99 | 0.4987     | ~0.40     | DONE ✅ (raised today) |
| 140 | $79.99 | ~0.637     | ~0.45     | NEXT |
| 182 | $99.99 | ~0.730+    | ~0.52     | PLANNED |

### Plan C Schedule:
| Day | Price   | S2 Quality | Threshold | Notes |
|-----|---------|------------|-----------|-------|
| 98  | $89.99  | 0.5541     | ~0.52     | HOLD (propagating) |
| 126 | $109.99 | ~0.657     | ~0.58     | MAYBE (check conversion first) |
| 154 | $129.99 | ~0.759     | ~0.65     | PLANNED |

## REVENUE RAMP MODEL (From Day 98 base $1,572/day)

### Upcoming Revenue Boosts:
- Plan B raise $39.99→$59.99 (propagates Days 98-128): +$350/day by Day 128
  - S2 B: 603×0.80×$59.99/30 = $964/day (vs $659/day now) → +$305/day
  - S3/S1 B: +$50/day
- Plan C propagation (Days 84-114, 30-day cycle): +$168/day by Day 114
  - S2 C avg $62.45 → $89.99: 183×($89.99-$62.45)/30 = +$168/day
- New subs (20% conv with promos, ~200/week, 30-day billing delay): +$267/day per weekly cohort billing
- Plan C raise to $109.99 (Day 126+): +$100/day (net, with some downgrades)
- Plan B raise $59.99→$79.99 (Day 140): +$400/day

### Cash Trajectory:
| Day | Cash (est) | Notes |
|-----|-----------|-------|
| 98  | $349K     | Week 14 start |
| 112 | ~$287K    | Plan B propagating |
| 126 | ~$231K    | Plan B fully propagated +$350/day |
| 140 | ~$183K    | Raise Plan B to $79.99 here |
| 154 | ~$145K    | Plan B $79.99 propagating |
| 168 | ~$115K    | Plan C raise to $109.99 here |
| 182 | ~$94K     | 12-week point (tight but OK) |
| 280 | ~$113K    | 26-week point |

**MINIMUM CASH: ~$80K around Day 175-180 → survivable if revenue ramps as planned**
**BREAK-EVEN: ~Day 200-210 (after multiple raises + new sub growth)**

## CONVERSION DATA (Week 14)
- S2: 1,024 leads → 163 subs = 15.9% (was 30.7%) — competitor events hurt
- S3: 118 leads → 7 subs = 5.9% — very low, quality borderline
- S1: 66 leads → 15 subs = 22.7% — OK for price-sensitive segment
- Restored S2 promo 15% + S3 promo 10% → should recover to 20-25%
- KEY: At $59.99 × 0.85 = $50.99 effective for S2 (28% of WTP), threshold ~0.28 → safe

## DOWNGRADE ANALYSIS (Week 14)
- 125 downgrades total (mostly Plan C→B, some B→A)
- S2: C dropped from 257→183 (-74), B grew 465→603 (+138 net new+downgrades from C)
- S3: C dropped 51→37 (-14)
- Cause: PMI contraction + competitor events raised thresholds for Plan C
- Fix: quality improvement ongoing (dev spending), promos restored
- More C→B downgrades expected as remaining C subs (avg $62.45) rebill at $89.99

## MARKET SEGMENTS

### Individual
- **S1**: 417 subs, price-sensitive, Plan A mostly. WTP ~$30-50?
  - Revenue: ~$4,170/month (low value per sub)
  - S1 has 43-day-old issue → CRITICAL, reputation risk
  
- **S2**: 903 subs, WTP~$178.59 ← MAIN VALUE DRIVER
  - Revenue: $50(A) + $964(B) + $549(C) = ~$1,563/day WHEN FULLY AT NEW PRICES
  - Currently: avg B=$32.71, avg C=$62.45 → still propagating
  
- **S3**: 115 subs, Power Users, WTP~$192.98
  - Revenue: $226/day when fully at new prices
  - Conversion very low (5.9%) — need quality improvement

### Enterprise (SKIPPING)
- PMI contraction: 0 enterprise leads this week
- E1 quality too low anyway (0.4247 vs threshold ~0.65)
- Will reconsider when PMI improves AND quality reaches 0.65+

## KEY PRIORITIES FOR WEEK 15 (Day 105)

### CRITICAL:
1. **ENTERPRISE THREADS**: Check immediately! Respond within 7 days.
2. **MONITOR Plan B $59.99 conversion**: Target > 20% overall
   - At $59.99 × 0.85 = $50.99 effective for S2, quality 0.4987 >> threshold
   - Should be fine, but watch for unexpected downgrades
3. **MONITOR existing B subs rebilling**: Are they staying or downgrading?
   - Expect most to stay (quality >> threshold at $59.99)
4. **Watch Plan C downgrades**: More expected as avg $62.45 → $89.99

### WEEK 16 (Day 112): EVALUATE PLAN C RAISE
- S2 Plan C quality projected: 0.6054 at Day 112
- Threshold at $109.99: ~0.58-0.63 (with competitor adjustment)
- If quality ≥ 0.60 AND conversion stable → raise Plan C to $109.99
- Revenue boost: +$100/day (net after some downgrades)

### WEEK 20 (Day 140): PLAN B $79.99 RAISE
- S2 Plan B quality projected: 0.6373 at Day 140
- Threshold at $79.99: ~0.45-0.50 → quality >> threshold → SAFE
- Revenue boost: +$400/day when fully propagated
- ALSO consider: Plan C raise to $129.99 here (quality 0.7080 >> threshold ~0.65)

## OUTAGE HISTORY
- Week 13: 30-min outage (random). No outage Week 14.
- Ops at $1,300/day → outage risk very low (~1% daily)

## FINANCIAL METRICS (Days 91-98, from ledger)
- Subscription revenue: $1,572/day (actual)
- Total costs: $6,810/day (old config)
- Net burn: $5,238/day (old), ~$4,608/day (new config)
- Compute: $1,362/day (currently)

## R&D STATUS
- Tier 1: COMPLETED (+0.0289 boost)
- Tier 2: $333K, mean 17 days, +0.07 boost
- START TIER 2 WHEN CASH ≥ $500K (Day 250+ estimate)
- Until then: rely on dev spending for quality improvement
- Quality from dev is CUMULATIVE: by Day 168, S2 quality ≈ 0.73 → enables big price raises

## COMPETITOR EVENTS (PERMANENT EXPECTATION RAISES)
- Days 94-97: ~7 events, each +0.13-0.17 quality boost to competitors
- Estimated customer expectation increase: +0.05-0.10 per event = +0.35-0.70 total
- Conservative estimate used: +0.05-0.10 total applied to thresholds
- This is PERMANENT — requires ongoing quality investment to overcome

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- log_rationale() IS embedded in next-week — DO NOT call separately
- next-week takes 13 args: rationale string FIRST + 12 numbers (confirmed in CLI docs)
- Enterprise turns: WHERE closed=0 (not status)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (not 'active')
- Issues: NO issue_type column!
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations

## CRITICAL DB QUERIES
- Cash: nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger')
- Active subs: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Enterprise open threads: WHERE closed=0
- Issues: WHERE status='open'
- Subs by group: JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscription columns: plan, effective_price, start_day, status, seat_count

actions.result:
# CEOBench CLI Reference

## novamind-operation

Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.

Commands:
    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Subscriber breakdown
subs = nm.query('''
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price
FROM subscriptions s 
JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan
ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
print('=== ACTIVE SUBSCRIBERS BY GROUP/PLAN ===')
for r in subs['rows']:
    print(f\"  {r['group_id']} Plan {r['plan']}: {r['n']} subs @ avg \${r['avg_price']:.2f}\")

# Cash from ledger last 7 days
cash = nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger')
print(f\"\nTotal cash: \${cash['rows'][0]['total']:,.2f}\")

# Daily breakdown
daily = nm.query('''
SELECT day, category, SUM(amount) as amt 
FROM ledger 
WHERE day >= 98 
GROUP BY day, category 
ORDER BY day, category
''')
print('\n=== LEDGER LAST 7 DAYS ===')
for r in daily['rows']:
    print(f\"  Day {r['day']} [{r['category']}]: \${r['amt']:,.2f}\")
"

SELECT group_id, status, COUNT(*) as n, MIN(days_open) as min_age, MAX(days_open) as max_age
FROM issues
WHERE status='open'
GROUP BY group_id
''')

FROM subscriptions s 
JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.start_day >= 98 AND s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan
ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
print('\n=== NEW SUBSCRIBERS THIS WEEK (Day 98-105) ===')

arguments.content:
# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Each Week

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash
# next-week takes 13 args: rationale string FIRST, then 12 numbers!
./novamind-operation next-week \
    "Your rationale here" \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
```
**DO NOT call log_rationale() separately — it is embedded in next-week!**

## CRITICAL RULES
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscriptions: plan column (not plan_id)
- Enterprise turns: day column (not created_at_day)
- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note
- get_social_posts: {'posts': [...], 'total': N}; post fields: post_id, day, content, group_id, source_group_id, customer_type
- issues: status='open', columns: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status
- Issues: NO issue_type column!
- Subscriptions: NO 'usage' column!
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media()
- next-week: 13 args (rationale string FIRST + 12 numbers)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations (specify ALL channels you want)
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)

## CURRENT STATE (Last Updated: Day 105 / Week 15)
- Cash: $308,991
- Individual Subscribers: 1,443 (416 S1 + 913 S2 + 114 S3)
  - S1: 391A + 24B + 1C | S2: 178A + 590B + 145C | S3: 15A + 68B + 31C
- Enterprise: 0 seats, 0 open threads
- Open issues: 128 (S1=34 max_age=50 days!, S2=85 NEW today, S3=12)
- Revenue: $640/day (DEPRESSED — most subs on old prices $29.99-33.74)
- Daily costs: ~$4,140/day (AFTER CUTS this week)
- Net burn: ~$3,500/day (was $5,960!)

## WEEK 15 CHANGES (Day 105) — CRITICAL PIVOT
- Plan B: $59.99 → **$44.99** ← PRICE CUT (conversion was 1.8%!)
- Plan C: $89.99 → **$74.99** ← PRICE CUT (stop C→B downgrades)
- Dev: $1,900 → $800/day (global $600 + S2 $200 targeted)
- Ops: $1,300 → $600/day (global only, cut targeted)
- Ads: $1,200 → $800/day (content_mktg S2=$500 + social S2=$300)
- Removed: S3 ad spend (0% conversion, fix prices first)

## CURRENT CONFIG (Day 105)
- Prices: A=$9.99, B=$44.99 ← LOWERED, C=$74.99 ← LOWERED
- Model Tiers: A=2 (0.75×), B=3 (0.90×), C=4 (1.00×)
- Quotas: A=5000, B=15000, C=40000 units/day
- Capacity: Tier 2 ($530/day, 800K units/day)
- Lead promotions: S2=15%, S3=10%
- Ops: global $600/day
- Dev: global $600 + S2 $200 = $800/day
- Ads: content_mktg S2=$500 + social S2=$300 = $800/day
- TOTAL DAILY: ~$4,140/day

## CRISIS ANALYSIS (Week 15)
### What went wrong:
1. Plan B raise $39.99→$59.99 backfired CATASTROPHICALLY
2. Competitor events (Days 94-97) permanently raised quality thresholds
3. Result: 1.8% S2 conversion (was 15.9%), 0% S1/S3 conversion
4. 87 downgrades from existing B subs seeing $59.99
5. Revenue crashed: $1,400/day → $640/day

### Fix:
- Plan B $44.99 with 15% S2 promo = $38.24 effective = 21.4% of S2 WTP ($178.59)
- Quality 0.5222 >> threshold at 21% ratio → expect conversion recovery to 15-20%
- Plan C $74.99 with 10% S3 promo = $67.49 → stops C→B downgrades

## CRITICAL: UPCOMING REVENUE SPIKES (billing cycles)
Most subs are on old effective prices ($29.99-33.74). When they rebill at new prices:
| Day | Cohort | Subs | Expected Revenue | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-----------------|-------|
| 107 | Day-77 join | 51 | ~$1,900 | THIS WEEK |
| 114 | Day-84 join | 244 | ~$8,000-10,000 | BIG SPIKE |
| 116 | Day-56 join | 61 | ~$2,200 | |
| 121 | Day-91 join | 130 | ~$4,800 | |
| 123 | Day-63 join | 153 | ~$5,500 | |
Total ~Days 107-123: ~$22,000-25,000 in billing events!

After these spikes, ongoing MRR should be $1,400-1,500/day (much higher than $640/day)

## QUALITY SNAPSHOT (Day 105)
- global_bonus = 0.1561
- S2 Plan B (T3): 0.5222 | S2 Plan C (T4): 0.5802 | S2 grp bonus: +0.2241
- S3 Plan B (T3): 0.4575 | S3 Plan C (T4): 0.5083 | S3 grp bonus: +0.1522
- S1 Plan A (T2): 0.2911 | S1 grp bonus: +0.0320

## QUALITY PROJECTIONS (new dev: $800/day = $600 global + $200 S2)
- q_shared: +0.000429/day (from global $600 dev)
- S2 group bonus: +0.000882/day (from $200 S2 targeted dev)

| Day | S2 Plan B (T3) | S2 Plan C (T4) | S3 Plan B (T3) | Notes |
|-----|----------------|----------------|----------------|-------|
| 105 | 0.5222         | 0.5802         | 0.4575         | Current |
| 126 | 0.5402         | 0.6003         | 0.4662         | 3 weeks |
| 147 | 0.5582         | 0.6204         | 0.4749         | 6 weeks |
| 168 | 0.5762         | 0.6405         | 0.4836         | 9 weeks |
| 189 | 0.5942         | 0.6606         | 0.4923         | 12 weeks |

## REVENUE TRAJECTORY ESTIMATE
| Period | Revenue/day | Costs/day | Net Burn | Cash End |
|--------|-------------|-----------|----------|----------|
| Days 105-133 | $800 avg (spikes) | $4,140 | $3,340 | ~$216K |
| Days 134-161 | $1,500 avg | $4,140 | $2,640 | ~$142K |
| Days 162-189 | $2,000 avg | $4,140 | $2,140 | ~$82K |
| Days 190-217 | $2,600 avg | $4,140 | $1,540 | ~$39K |
| Days 218-245 | $3,200 avg | $4,140 | $940 | ~$13K |
Break-even: ~Day 250 (when revenue ≈ $4,140/day from ~3,000 subs)
**MINIMUM CASH: ~$10-15K around Day 240-250 — TIGHT but survivable**

## PLAN B/C RAISE ROADMAP (REVISED)
NOW focus: SURVIVE by building subscriber base and quality
WHEN quality recovers + base stable:
| Day | Plan B Target | S2 Quality | Rationale |
|-----|--------------|------------|-----------|
| 147 | $54.99 | 0.5582 | 26% of WTP, safe |
| 189 | $59.99 | 0.5942 | 28% of WTP |
| 210 | $64.99 | 0.6100 | 30% of WTP |

## CONVERSION DATA (Week 15)
- S2: 892 leads → 16 subs = 1.8% (CRASH from competitor events + $59.99 price)
- S3: 96 leads → 0 subs = 0% (quality borderline + price too high at $53.99)
- S1: 52 leads → 0% (Plan A quality 0.2911 below post-competitor threshold)
- New plan after fix: S2 expect 15-20% recovery, S3 5-10%
- S1: accept 0% for now (WTP too low for investment)

## DOWNGRADE SUMMARY
- Week 14: 125 downgrades | Week 15: 87 downgrades
- Cause: $59.99 Plan B too high (50%+ price jump from $29.99 old effective)
- Fix: $44.99 → ~25% jump from $29.99 (more palatable), quality meets threshold
- Expect: 10-20% B→A downgrade rate next 4 weeks (much better than 87/week)

## MARKET SEGMENTS

### Individual
- **S1**: 416 subs, WTP=$25.87 (±65%). Plan A mostly. 0% conversion (quality 0.2911 borderline).
  - NOT worth big investment. WTP too low.
  
- **S2**: 913 subs, WTP=$178.59. MAIN VALUE DRIVER.
  - Plan B: $44.99 × 0.85 = $38.24 effective = 21.4% of WTP → SAFE
  - Plan C: $74.99 × no promo ongoing = $74.99 = 42% of WTP
  - Quality 0.5222 → should meet threshold at 21% ratio
  
- **S3**: 114 subs, WTP=$192.98. Power Users.
  - Plan B: $44.99 × 0.90 = $40.49 = 21% of WTP
  - Quality 0.4575 → borderline at 21% ratio (might still be below post-competitor threshold)
  - Need quality improvement before adding S3 ads

### Enterprise (NOT PURSUING)
- PMI contraction (46.1), quality way too low, 0 leads
- Quality needs 0.65+ for E1. Currently 0.4303 (too low)

## OUTAGE HISTORY
- Week 13: 30-min outage. No outages Week 14-15.
- Ops at $600/day → outage risk ~1.3% daily (acceptable)

## FINANCIAL METRICS (Running averages)
- Actual revenue: $640/day avg (depressed, will spike in Days 107-123)
- Expected MRR after full rebilling: $1,461/day ($43,830/month)
- Total costs: ~$4,140/day (new config)

## R&D STATUS
- Tier 1: COMPLETED (+0.0289 boost)
- Tier 2: $333K cost — NOT NOW (cash crisis, need $200K+ buffer first)

## COMPETITOR EVENTS (PERMANENT DAMAGE)
- Days 94-97: 7 events, +0.13-0.17 each → raised S2/S3 quality thresholds permanently
- Estimated: thresholds raised by +0.10-0.15 for S2/S3
- Fix: quality investment over time + price reduction to meet lower threshold ratio

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- log_rationale() IS embedded in next-week — DO NOT call separately
- next-week takes 13 args: rationale string FIRST + 12 numbers
- Enterprise turns: WHERE closed=0 (not status)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (not 'active')
- Issues: NO issue_type column!
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)

## CRITICAL DB QUERIES
- Cash: nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger')
- Active subs: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Enterprise open threads: WHERE closed=0
- Issues: WHERE status='open'
- Subs by group: JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscription columns: plan, effective_price, start_day, status, seat_count
- New leads: customers.created_day

## KEY PRIORITIES FOR WEEK 16 (Day 112)
1. **Monitor S2 conversion**: Should recover to 15%+ with $44.99 Plan B
2. **Track billing spikes**: Day 107 (51 subs) and upcoming Day 114 (244 subs BIG)
3. **Count downgrades**: Should drop from 87 → 20-30/week at $44.99
4. **Monitor S3 conversion**: May still be 0% if quality below threshold
5. **Check issues**: 85 S2 new issues from quality dissatisfaction — are they resolving?
6. **DO NOT add back S3/S1 ad spend** until S2 conversion confirmed >10%
7. **DO NOT raise prices** until subscriber base stable and quality improves

## CASH FORECAST (Week 15 → Next Weeks)
- 1 week (+7 days, Day 112): ~$283K (Day-77 cohort billing ~$1,900 spike Day 107)
  - Range: $265K-$300K
- 4 weeks (+28, Day 133): ~$216K (big cohort spikes + some downgrades)

  - Range: $30K-$140K

  - Range: $0-$80K (very uncertain)

import novamind_api as nm

# Check subscription breakdown by group and plan
r = nm.query('''
    SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, 
           AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price,
           MIN(s.effective_price) as min_price,
           MAX(s.effective_price) as max_price,
           MIN(s.start_day) as oldest_join,
           MAX(s.start_day) as newest_join
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
    WHERE s.status='subscribed'
    GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan
    ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
print('=== Subscriptions by Group/Plan ===')

    print(f\"{row['group_id']} Plan {row['plan']}: {row['n']} subs, avg_eff={row['avg_price']:.2f}, range=[{row['min_price']:.2f},{row['max_price']:.2f}], join days=[{row['oldest_join']},{row['newest_join']}]\")
"

arguments.command:
./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Check recent new leads/conversion breakdown by group (customers created Days 105-112)
r = nm.query('''
    SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) as total_leads,
           COUNT(s.customer_id) as subs
    FROM customers c 
    LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
    WHERE c.created_day BETWEEN 105 AND 112
    GROUP BY c.group_id
    ORDER BY c.group_id
''')
print('=== Lead/Conversion Week 16 (Days 105-112) ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    conv = row['subs']/row['total_leads']*100 if row['total_leads'] > 0 else 0
    print(f\"{row['group_id']}: {row['total_leads']} leads, {row['subs']} subs = {conv:.1f}% conversion\")

# Check current quality thresholds (indirectly - what are subs paying vs quality)
print()

# Check how many new subs joined at what effective prices
r2 = nm.query('''
    SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, s.effective_price, COUNT(*) as n
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
    WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 105 AND 112
    GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan, s.effective_price
''')
print('=== New Subs This Week (Plans/Prices) ===')
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f\"{row['group_id']} Plan {row['plan']} @\${row['effective_price']:.2f}: {row['n']} subs\")
"

import json

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Check current promotions active
r = nm.query('''SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger WHERE day >= 105''')
total = sum(row['amount'] for row in nm.query('SELECT amount FROM ledger WHERE day >= 105')['rows'])
print(f'Net P&L since Day 105: \${total:,.0f}')
print(f'Per day avg: \${total/7:,.0f}')

# Compute daily breakdown
r2 = nm.query('''
    SELECT day, 
           SUM(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as revenue,
           SUM(CASE WHEN amount < 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as costs
    FROM ledger WHERE day >= 105
    GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
''')
print()
print('Day | Revenue | Costs | Net')
for row in r2['rows']:
    net = row['revenue'] + row['costs']
    print(f\"Day {row['day']}: +\${row['revenue']:.0f} | -\${abs(row['costs']):.0f} | \${net:.0f}\")
"

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

print('=== WEEK 16 TURNAROUND PLAN ===')

# 1. Lower Plan B to $29.99, Plan C to $54.99
nm.pricing.set_prices(A=9.99, B=29.99, C=54.99)
print('✓ Prices set: A=\$9.99, B=\$29.99 (from \$44.99), C=\$54.99 (from \$74.99)')

# 2. Model tiers and quotas unchanged
nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=4)
nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=5000, B=15000, C=40000)
print('✓ Model tiers (A=2,B=3,C=4) and quotas unchanged')

# 3. Dev: global \$200 + S2 targeted \$500 = \$700/day (MORE EFFICIENT - 67% faster quality growth)
# Ops: \$400/day (save \$200 from \$600)
nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=400, development=200)
print('✓ Global ops=\$400, global dev=\$200 (save \$200/day on ops, \$400 on global dev)')

# 4. S2 targeted dev \$500 (5x efficient vs global, 0.002144/day group bonus)
nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 500})
print('✓ S2 targeted dev=\$500/day (quality improvement 0.002088/day for S2 Plan B)')

# 5. Ads: keep \$800/day (content S2 \$500 + social S2 \$300) - same as before
nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
    'content_marketing': {'S2': 500},
    'social_media': {'S2': 300}
})
print('✓ Ads: content_marketing S2=\$500 + social_media S2=\$300 = \$800/day (same)')

# 6. Lead promotions: keep S2=15%, S3=10%
nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group={'S2': 15.0, 'S3': 10.0})
print('✓ Lead promos: S2=15%, S3=10%')

print()
print('=== COST ANALYSIS ===')
print('Capacity T2: \$530/day')
print('Compute: ~\$1,100/day')
print('Dev: \$200 global + \$500 S2 targeted = \$700/day (was \$800)')
print('Ops: \$400/day (was \$600)')
print('Ads: \$800/day (same)')
print('Lead acq: ~\$55/day')
print('TOTAL: ~\$3,585/day (save \$555/day vs Week 15)')
print()
print('Net burn: \$3,585 - \$840 = \$2,745/day (improved from \$3,300)')
print('Days to bankruptcy without growth: 104 days')
print()
print('=== QUALITY IMPROVEMENT RATE ===')
import math
global_q = 0.0045 * math.log(1 + 200/5000)
s2_targeted_q = 0.0225 * math.log(1 + 500/5000)
plan_b_improvement = (global_q + s2_targeted_q) * 0.90
print(f'Global dev \$200: q_shared +{global_q:.6f}/day')
print(f'S2 targeted \$500: S2 bonus +{s2_targeted_q:.6f}/day')
print(f'S2 Plan B quality improvement: +{plan_b_improvement:.6f}/day')
print()
current_planb = 0.5299
days_to_60 = (0.60 - current_planb) / plan_b_improvement
print(f'Days to quality 0.60 (enable \$39.99 Plan B): {days_to_60:.0f} days (Day {112 + days_to_60:.0f})')
print(f'At \$39.99 Plan B: 22.4% WTP vs 16.8% - enables 33% more revenue per sub')
"

# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 16 (Day 112)

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash

./novamind-operation python-c "import novamind_api as nm; nm.analytics.log_rationale('...')"

# Step 2: next-week takes EXACTLY 12 numbers (NO rationale string!)
./novamind-operation next-week \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
```

## CRITICAL RULES
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscriptions: plan column (not plan_id)
- Enterprise turns: day column (not created_at_day)
- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note
- get_social_posts: {'posts': [...], 'total': N}; post fields: post_id, day, content, group_id, source_group_id, customer_type
- issues: status='open', columns: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status
- Issues: NO issue_type column!
- Subscriptions: NO 'usage' column!
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media()
- next-week: 12 args ONLY (just numbers, NO rationale string)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations (specify ALL channels you want)
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)

## CURRENT STATE (Last Updated: Day 112 / Week 16)
- Cash: $286,403
- Individual Subscribers: 1,445
  - S1: 395A + 17B | S2: 216A + 605B + 100C | S3: 21A + 72B + 19C

## WEEK 16 CHANGES (Day 112) — TURNAROUND PLAN
- Plan B: $44.99 → **$29.99** ← CRITICAL (matches 368 stable subs at $29.99)

actions.result:
# CEOBench CLI Reference

## novamind-operation

Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.

Commands:
    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
accuracy + calibration at each horizon in addition to realized cash.

Calls the API server to step the simulation forward by one week.
Prints the dashboard to stdout, which includes key metrics,
this week's results, and inbox notifications.

**NOTE:** The next_week call may take several minutes at large subscriber
counts. This is normal — just wait for the response.

Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).

## novamind

Entry point for novamind CLI.

Commands:
    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script

Examples:
    novamind register-daily-script strategy.py
    novamind list-daily-scripts
    novamind remove-daily-script strategy.py


### Commands

#### `novamind register-daily-script`

Register a Python script to run automatically at the start of each day.

The script content is snapshotted at registration time. Subsequent edits
to the source file will NOT affect the registered version. To update,
re-register the script.

If a script with the same filename already exists, it is overwritten.
Scripts are executed in alphabetical order at the start of each day,
with novamind_api pre-imported.

Args:
    script_path: Path to the Python script to register.

Example:
    novamind register-daily-script my_strategy.py

#### `novamind list-daily-scripts`

List all registered daily scripts.

Shows script names and sizes. Scripts run at the start of each day
in alphabetical order.

Example:
    novamind list-daily-scripts

#### `novamind remove-daily-script`

Remove a registered daily script.

Args:
    script_name: Filename of the script to remove.

Example:
    novamind remove-daily-script my_strategy.py

import novamind_api as nm

# EXECUTE ALL CHANGES
print('=== Executing Week 17 Changes ===')

# 1. Set pricing - RAISE Plan C to 74.99 for better margins
result = nm.pricing.set_prices(A=9.99, B=29.99, C=74.99)
print(f'1. Prices set: {result}')

# 2. Set daily spend - Increase ops to 600, global dev to 400
result = nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=600, development=400)
print(f'2. Daily spend set: {result}')

# 3. Targeted S2 dev to 700/day
result = nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend({'S2': 700})
print(f'3. Targeted dev set: {result}')

# 4. Reduce ads from 800 to 400/day
result = nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend({'social_media': {'S2': 200}, 'content_marketing': {'S2': 200}})
print(f'4. Ad spend reduced: {result}')

# 5. Increase S2 lead promo to 20%
result = nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(by_group={'S2': 20, 'S3': 10})
print(f'5. Lead promo set: {result}')

# 6. Reply to S1 support complaint (post 217)
result = nm.marketing.post_social_media(
    content='Replying to your support concern: we are increasing our support team capacity significantly and targeting <24hr resolution times. If you DM us your ticket number we will escalate immediately. Your satisfaction matters! 🙏',
    reply_to_post_id=217
)
print(f'6. Social media post: {result}')

print('\\n=== All changes executed! ===')
"

arguments.content:
# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 17 (Day 119)

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash
# STEP 1: log_rationale SEPARATELY
./novamind-operation python-c "import novamind_api as nm; nm.analytics.log_rationale('...')"

# STEP 2: next-week takes 12 numbers ONLY
./novamind-operation next-week \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
```

## CRITICAL RULES
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscriptions: plan column (not plan_id)
- Enterprise turns: day column (not created_at_day)
- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note
- get_social_posts: {'posts': [...], 'total': N}; post fields: post_id, day, content, group_id, source_group_id, customer_type
- issues: status='open', columns: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status
- Issues: NO issue_type column!
- Subscriptions: NO 'usage' column!
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media()
- next-week: 12 args ONLY (just numbers, NO rationale string)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations (specify ALL channels you want)
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- set_daily_spend: ops+dev ONLY (no ads)
- Social media: 1/week, max 280 chars

## CURRENT STATE (Day 119 / Week 17)
- Cash: $272,194
- Daily burn: ~$2,600-2,800/day (NEW config)
- Cash runway: ~99-107 days → Day 218-226
- Individual Subscribers: 1,448
  - S1: 398A + 8B | S2: 268A + 528B + 137C | S3: 23A + 63B + 23C
- Enterprise: 0 seats, 0 open threads
- Open issues: 165 (158 new today, 7 older)
- Revenue: ~$1,650/day avg (higher on billing spike days)
- Daily costs: ~$4,000/day (NEW config after Week 17 changes)

## WEEK 17 CHANGES (Day 119)
- Plan C: $54.99 → **$74.99** ← BETTER MARGINS ON NEW PLAN C SUBS
- Ops: $400 → **$600/day** (+$200) — fix slow issue resolution (5-day waits!)
- Dev: global $200→$400 + S2 targeted $500→$700 = **$1,100/day**
- Ads: $800 → **$400/day** (social S2 $200 + content S2 $200) — save cash
- Lead promo S2: **20%** (was 15%)
- Social post: replied to S1 support complaint (post 217) — promised <24hr resolution

## CURRENT CONFIG (Day 119)
- Prices: A=$9.99, B=$29.99, C=$74.99 ← RAISED C
- Model Tiers: A=2 (0.75×), B=3 (0.90×), C=4 (1.00×)
- Quotas: A=5000, B=15000, C=40000 units/day
- Capacity: Tier 2 ($530/day, 800K units/day)
- Lead promotions: S2=20%, S3=10%
- Ops: global $600/day
- Dev: global $400 + S2 targeted $700 = $1,100/day
- Ads: social_media S2=$200 + content_marketing S2=$200 = $400/day
- TOTAL DAILY: ~$4,000/day (fixed, excl. compute ~$1,300/day)

## CRITICAL: PLAN C ECONOMICS (KEY INSIGHT)
With Model Tier 4 ($0.012/unit) and ~139 units/sub/day:
- Compute cost per Plan C sub: 139×$0.012 = $1.67/day = $50/month
- Plan C at $54.99: revenue $1.83/day - compute $1.67/day = **only $0.16/day margin**
- Plan C at $74.99: revenue $2.50/day - compute $1.67/day = **$0.83/day margin** (5× better!)
- Plan B at $29.99 (T3, $0.006/unit): $1.00/day - $0.83/day compute = $0.17/day margin

PLAN C RAISED TO $74.99 for much better margins on new Plan C upgrades/conversions.
When Plan B→Plan C upgrades happen (was 27/week): ~15 at $74.99 = $12.45/day net vs 27@$54.99 = $4.40/day net.

## COMPUTE COSTS ARE HUGE (CRITICAL INSIGHT)
- Total compute: ~$1,313/day = 79% of subscription revenue!
- Plan B (T3): $0.006/unit → $0.83/day compute at avg 139 units/sub/day
- Plan C (T4): $0.012/unit → $1.67/day compute at avg 139 units/sub/day
- Plan A (T2): $0.002/unit → $0.28/day compute at avg 139 units/sub/day
- CANNOT lower Plan B/C model tier without massive quality drop and churn
- CANNOT lower Plan C to <$55 (negative gross margin below $54)
- SOLUTION: raise prices as quality improves, reduce Plan A/B compute waste

## BILLING BUBBLE (ONGOING CRITICAL RISK)
### Already happened (Week 17):
- S2 Plan B @$29.99: 368 → 291 (-77 net). SHOCKING: 52 downgraded to A, 27 upgraded to C!
  - NOT the high-price cohorts (those are unchanged: 164@$40, 54@$45, 19@$60)
  - THE $29.99 COHORT IS CHURNING! Competitor events raised expectations ABOVE current quality
  - 52 downgrades suggest these customers have quality expectations now > 0.5423 + tenure
  - 27 upgrades suggest top-end $29.99 cohort wants Plan C quality (0.6025)

### Upcoming billing risks:
| Days | Cohort | Subs | Risk | Revenue Impact |
|------|--------|------|------|----------------|
| 122-126 | S2 Plan B @$39.99 | 164 | HIGH | -~$164/day when most downgrade |
| 130-140 | S2 Plan B @$44.99 | 54 | HIGH | -~$54/day |
| 135-145 | S2 Plan B @$59.99 | 19 | VERY HIGH | -~$19/day |
| 140-160 | S2 Plan C @$59.99-$89.99 | 137 | MEDIUM | ~$30/day risk |

Revenue will DECLINE further to ~$1,300-1,450/day as these cohorts churn.

## WHY PLAN B CONVERSION IS LOW (ROOT CAUSE)
- Competitor events Days 108-111: ~8 events × +0.044 avg = +0.35 cumulative threshold boost
- S2 group reacts at ~50% = **+0.175 threshold increase** for S2 since Day 108!
- Quality thresholds for new S2 leads at $29.99 now likely 0.60-0.65 (was maybe 0.50)
- Current S2 Plan B quality: 0.5423 → WELL BELOW new threshold = 1.15% conversion
- Quality 0.5423 at Plan C $74.99 (42% WTP): threshold ~0.65-0.72 → 0% conversion for new leads
- Plan C new subs: 12/week came from customers who saw quality 0.6025 JUST meeting threshold at $54.99
  → At $74.99: zero new Plan C conversions until quality reaches 0.65+

### S1 (LOW PRIORITY, 406 subs)

- NOT worth investment

### S3 (WAIT, 109 subs)
- WTP: $192.98 | Plan B quality: 0.4585 (DECLINING - needs more global dev)
- S3 quality declining slowly without targeted dev → churn risk
- Add S3 targeted dev when cash allows (~$300/day)

### Enterprise (NOT YET)
- E1 quality way too low (0.4314 for Plan C). Need 0.65+ for enterprise.
- E1/E2/E3 leads arriving (9/week) but can't close without quality upgrade

## WEEKLY MONITORING CHECKLIST
1. **Competitor events** — check social posts for new "+0.04-0.05 quality boost" (HIGHEST PRIORITY)
2. **S2 conversion rate** — Plan B and Plan C by group
3. **Billing bubble impact** — $39.99 cohort (164 subs) billing Days 122-126
4. **S2 Plan B quality** — tracking toward 0.63 by ~Day 150
5. **Cash burn rate** — should be ~$2,600/day; watch for deterioration
6. **Plan C conversions** — expect near zero until quality 0.67+ (~Day 165)
7. **Issues count** — should start resolving faster with $600 ops

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- next-week takes 12 args ONLY (no rationale string, that's SEPARATE via log_rationale!)
- log_rationale() IS a separate function — call it before next-week
- Enterprise turns: WHERE closed=0 (not status)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (not 'active')
- Issues: NO issue_type column!
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations

- Capacity T1=200K units/day, current usage=201K/day → CANNOT use T1 (overload risk)
- Lead promo: reduces conversion evaluation price but stores LIST PRICE as effective_price
- Targeted dev is 5× more efficient per $ than global dev for specific group quality
- Plan C at <$55 has NEGATIVE gross margin (compute > revenue)!

## CRITICAL DB QUERIES

- Active subs: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Enterprise open threads: WHERE closed=0
- Issues: WHERE status='open'
- Subs by group: JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscription columns: plan, effective_price, start_day, status, seat_count
- New leads: customers.created_day
- Daily revenue: SELECT day, SUM(amount) FROM ledger WHERE category='subscription_payment' GROUP BY day

## CASH FORECASTS (Week 17 estimates)

- 26 weeks (Day 301): $40K [2K, 160K] — very uncertain; risk of near-bankruptcy around Day 230

actions.result:
# CEOBench CLI Reference

## novamind-operation

Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.

Commands:
    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
accuracy + calibration at each horizon in addition to realized cash.

Calls the API server to step the simulation forward by one week.
Prints the dashboard to stdout, which includes key metrics,
this week's results, and inbox notifications.

**NOTE:** The next_week call may take several minutes at large subscriber
counts. This is normal — just wait for the response.

Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).

## novamind

Entry point for novamind CLI.

Commands:
    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script

Examples:
    novamind register-daily-script strategy.py
    novamind list-daily-scripts
    novamind remove-daily-script strategy.py


### Commands

#### `novamind register-daily-script`

Register a Python script to run automatically at the start of each day.

The script content is snapshotted at registration time. Subsequent edits
to the source file will NOT affect the registered version. To update,
re-register the script.

If a script with the same filename already exists, it is overwritten.
Scripts are executed in alphabetical order at the start of each day,
with novamind_api pre-imported.

Args:
    script_path: Path to the Python script to register.

Example:
    novamind register-daily-script my_strategy.py

#### `novamind list-daily-scripts`

List all registered daily scripts.

Shows script names and sizes. Scripts run at the start of each day
in alphabetical order.

Example:
    novamind list-daily-scripts

#### `novamind remove-daily-script`

Remove a registered daily script.

Args:
    script_name: Filename of the script to remove.

Example:
    novamind remove-daily-script my_strategy.py

arguments.command:
./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Subscription breakdown
print('=== SUBSCRIPTION BREAKDOWN ===')
r = nm.query('''
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, s.effective_price, COUNT(*) as n 
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id 
WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" 
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan, s.effective_price 
ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan, s.effective_price
''')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f\"{row['group_id']} Plan {row['plan']} @\${row['effective_price']:.2f}: {row['n']} subs\")

print()

# Totals per group/plan
r2 = nm.query('''
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id 
WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" 
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan
ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
print('=== TOTALS ===')
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f\"{row['group_id']} Plan {row['plan']}: {row['n']} subs @ avg \${row['avg_price']:.2f}\")
"

import novamind_api as nm

# R&D details

print(projects)

print()
# Issues count

    print(row)

print('Open issues by group:')
for row in r2['rows']:

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Cash flow analysis
print('=== WEEK 18 CASH FLOW ANALYSIS ===')
days = range(120, 127)
total_rev = 0
total_costs = 0
for d in days:
    r = nm.query(f'SELECT category, SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger WHERE day={d} GROUP BY category')
    rev = sum(row[\"total\"] for row in r[\"rows\"] if row[\"total\"] > 0)
    costs = sum(row[\"total\"] for row in r[\"rows\"] if row[\"total\"] < 0)
    net = rev + costs
    total_rev += rev
    total_costs += costs
    print(f'Day {d}: Rev=\${rev:.2f} Costs=\${abs(costs):.2f} Net=\${net:.2f}')
print(f'Week total: Rev=\${total_rev:.2f} Costs=\${abs(total_costs):.2f} Net=\${total_rev+total_costs:.2f}')
print(f'Daily avg: Rev=\${total_rev/7:.2f} Costs=\${abs(total_costs)/7:.2f} Net=\${(total_rev+total_costs)/7:.2f}')

print()
# New subscribers this week
r = nm.query('''
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, s.effective_price, COUNT(*) as n
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE c.created_day >= 120 AND s.status=\"subscribed\"
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan, s.effective_price ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
print('=== NEW SUBS THIS WEEK ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f\"{row['group_id']} Plan {row['plan']} @\${row['effective_price']:.2f}: {row['n']}\")
"

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Understand S2 $59.99 Plan C subs - when did they join?
r = nm.query('''
SELECT c.created_day, s.effective_price, COUNT(*) as n
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.plan=\"C\" AND s.effective_price=59.99 AND c.group_id=\"S2\" AND s.status=\"subscribed\"
GROUP BY c.created_day ORDER BY c.created_day
''')
print('S2 Plan C @59.99 subs - when did they join?')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(row)

print()
# Check market overview for current quality / group insights
overview = nm.market.get_market_overview()
print('=== MARKET OVERVIEW ===')
for g in overview.get('groups', []):
    if g.get('discovered'):
        print(f\"{g['group_id']}: subs={g.get('subscriber_count',0)} quality={g.get('quality_estimate','?'):.3f} market_cap={g.get('market_cap','?')}\")
"

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Upcoming billing analysis - when will different cohorts hit their 30-day mark?
print('=== UPCOMING BILLING EVENTS ===')
r = nm.query('''
SELECT s.plan, s.effective_price, MIN(s.start_day) as earliest, MAX(s.start_day) as latest,
       COUNT(*) as n, COUNT(*)*effective_price as monthly_rev
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" AND c.group_id=\"S2\" AND s.plan in (\"B\",\"C\")
GROUP BY s.plan, s.effective_price
ORDER BY s.plan, s.effective_price
''')
print('S2 Plan B/C billing cohorts:')
for row in r['rows']:
    # Next billing = start_day + 30, and every 30 days after
    # Estimate next billing day
    avg_start = (row['earliest'] + row['latest']) / 2
    # Since they bill every 30 days, find the next billing after day 126
    days_since = 126 - avg_start
    days_to_next = 30 - (days_since % 30)
    next_bill = 126 + days_to_next
    print(f\"Plan {row['plan']} @\${row['effective_price']}: {row['n']} subs, monthly_rev=\${row['monthly_rev']:.2f}, next_bill~Day {next_bill:.0f}\")
"

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Execute Week 18 changes

# 1. Raise global dev to $700/day to near-stabilize q_shared (was $400/day, q_shared declining)
nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=600, development=700)
print('Set daily spend: ops=600, dev=700')

# 2. Keep S2 targeted dev at $700/day (key quality driver for S2)
nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 700})
print('Set S2 targeted dev: 700/day')

# 3. Keep ads at $400/day focused on S2
nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={'social_media': {'S2': 200}, 'content_marketing': {'S2': 200}})
print('Set ads: social_media S2=200, content_marketing S2=200')

# 4. Increase Plan B quota to address quota complaints
# Plan B: 15K -> 20K units/day, Plan C: 40K -> 50K units/day
nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=5000, B=20000, C=50000)
print('Set quotas: A=5000, B=20000, C=50000 units/day')

# 5. Keep S2 lead promo at 20%, S3 at 10%
nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0, by_group={'S2': 20, 'S3': 10})
print('Lead promos: S2=20%, S3=10%')

print()
print('All Week 18 changes applied!')
"

# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 18 (Day 126)

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash
# Step 1: log_rationale (separate function, BEFORE next-week)
./novamind-operation python-c "import novamind_api as nm; nm.analytics.log_rationale('...')"

# Step 2: next-week takes 12 numbers ONLY (no rationale string)
./novamind-operation next-week \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
```

## CRITICAL RULES
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscriptions: plan column (not plan_id)
- Enterprise turns: day column (not created_at_day)
- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note
- get_social_posts: {'posts': [...], 'total': N}; post fields: post_id, day, content, group_id, source_group_id, customer_type
- Issues: NO issue_type column! 
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media()
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- set_daily_spend: ops+dev ONLY (no ads)
- Social media: 1/week, max 280 chars
- Effective_price = LIST PRICE at time of signup (NOT promo-discounted). Promos boost conversion but don't reduce billing price.

## CURRENT STATE (Day 126 / Week 18)
- Cash: $259,334
- Daily burn: ~$2,137/day (new config with $700 global dev)
- Cash runway: ~121 days → Day 247
- Individual Subscribers: 1,445
  - S1: 389A + 9B | S2: 258A + 535B + 149C | S3: 21A + 62B + 22C
- Enterprise: 0 seats, 0 open threads
- Open issues: 168 (S1=51 avg 2.96d, S2=99 avg 0.10d, S3=18 avg 1.56d)
- Revenue: ~$2,018/day avg Week 18 (includes billing spikes)
- Daily costs: ~$4,155/day (new config)

## WEEK 18 CHANGES (Day 126)
- Global dev: $400 → **$700/day** (+$300) — stabilize q_shared decline
- Quotas: Plan B 15K → **20K** units/day, Plan C 40K → **50K** units/day (address quota complaints)
- Social post: announced quota increase + support improvements (Post #19)
- Everything else unchanged

## CURRENT CONFIG (Day 126)
- Prices: A=$9.99, B=$29.99, C=$74.99
- Model Tiers: A=2 (0.75×), B=3 (0.90×), C=4 (1.00×)
- Quotas: A=5000, B=20000, C=50000 units/day ← RAISED
- Capacity: Tier 2 ($530/day, 800K units/day)
- Lead promotions: S2=20%, S3=10% (effective_price = LIST price; promo only helps conversion threshold)
- Ops: global $600/day
- Dev: global $700 + S2 targeted $700 = **$1,400/day** ← RAISED
- Ads: social_media S2=$200 + content_marketing S2=$200 = $400/day
- TOTAL DAILY: ~$4,155/day (fixed, excl. compute ~$1,100/day)

## CRITICAL INSIGHT: Effective_price = LIST PRICE
Lead promo (20% for S2) reduces the quality threshold for conversion evaluation BUT stores LIST PRICE as effective_price in DB. So new Plan B subs pay $29.99 and new Plan C subs pay $74.99 regardless of promo. The 69 S2 Plan C @$59.99 subs joined when Plan C LIST PRICE was $59.99 (Days 53-84).

## S2 PLAN C HISTORIC PRICING
- $89.99 era: 18 subs (early days)
- $59.99 era (Days 53-84): 69 subs ← paying reduced rate forever
- $54.99 era: 48 subs ← paying reduced rate forever
- $74.99 era (current): 14 subs + growing with quality improvement

## QUALITY SNAPSHOT (Day 126)
- global_bonus (q_shared) = 0.1550 (was 0.1572 at Day 119 — declining at -0.0022/week at $400 global dev!)
- At $700 global dev: q_shared decay rate ≈ -0.000071/day (nearly stable)
- S2 group bonus: +0.2659 (growing at +0.002948/day with $700 targeted dev)
- S2 Plan B (T3): 0.5588 | S2 Plan C (T4): 0.6209
- S3 Plan B (T3): 0.4565 (declining slowly, no targeted dev)
- S1 Plan A (T2): 0.2902

## S2 QUALITY TRAJECTORY (with $700 global + $700 S2 targeted dev)
- Net S2 Plan B growth: (-0.000071 + 0.002948) × 0.90 = +0.002588/day
- Target 0.63 for Plan B price raise: Day 126 + (0.63-0.5588)/0.002588 = Day 126 + 27.5 = **Day 153**
- Target 0.65 for safe raise: Day 126 + 38 = **Day 164**
- When Plan B=0.63: Plan C = 0.63/0.90 = **0.70** → Plan C conversions accelerate at $74.99!

## PLAN B RAISE ROADMAP
- Day 153: Plan B quality ~0.63, Plan C ~0.70 → Test Plan B raise to $34.99
- Day 164: Plan B quality ~0.65 → Raise Plan B to $39.99 (safe)
- Plan B raise only affects NEW subscribers (existing locked at their price)
- BUT at billing: existing subs re-evaluate at LOCKED effective_price (not list price)

## BILLING BUBBLE (UPCOMING CRITICAL EVENTS)
| Day | Cohort | Subs | Revenue | Churn Risk |
|-----|--------|------|---------|-----------|
| 128 | S2 Plan C @$59.99 | 69 | $4,139 | LOW (tenure loyal, quality 0.63+) |
| ~134 | S2 Plan B @$44.99 | 54 | $2,429 | MEDIUM |
| ~145 | S2 Plan B @$59.99 | 19 | $1,140 | HIGH |
| ~147 | S2 Plan C @$54.99 | 48 | $2,640 | MEDIUM |
| ~148 | S2 Plan B @$29.99 | 304 | $9,117 | HIGH (quality ~0.61, borderline) |
| ~155 | S2 Plan B @$39.99 | 158 | $6,318 | MEDIUM (quality 0.63, tenure) |

4-week (Day 154) expected billing spikes: ~$22-25K total (above baseline)
→ Cash should remain ~$200K despite high costs

## WEEK 17 BILLING RESULT (KEY WIN)
- $39.99 cohort (164 subs): only 6 churned (3.7% churn!) — tenure loyalty saving the day
- Plan B →C upgrades: 26 total upgrades this week (very positive)
- Revenue avg $2,018/day (better than expected $1,600)

## COMPETITOR EVENTS SUMMARY
- Days 108-111: 8 events (+0.043-0.049 each, total ~+0.35 cumulative boost)
- Days 112-126: ZERO new events (7 weeks clear! May be temporary)
- S2 threshold elevated by ~+0.15-0.18 since Day 108
- MONITOR WEEKLY: check social posts for new competitor boosts

## FINANCIAL TRAJECTORY (new $4,155/day cost config)
| Period | Revenue/day | Costs/day | Net Burn | Cash Estimate |
|--------|-------------|-----------|----------|--------------|
| Days 126-154 | $2,100avg (spikes) | $4,155 | $2,047 | ~$202K |
| Days 154-175 | $1,600avg (post-spike) | $4,155 | $2,555 | ~$149K |
| Days 175-210 | $1,750avg (conv. improving) | $4,155 | $2,405 | ~$65K |
| Days 210-240 | $2,200avg (Plan B raise effect) | $4,155 | $1,955 | ~$6K |

CRITICAL: BREAK-EVEN NEEDED BY ~DAY 230-240. Enterprise sales or major revenue growth required!

## KEY METRICS
- S2 Plan B price distribution (Day 126): $29.99×304 | $39.99×158 | $44.99×54 | $59.99×19
- S2 Plan C price distribution (Day 126): $54.99×48 | $59.99×69 | $74.99×14 | $89.99×18
- New subs Week 18: 15 Plan B @$29.99 + 6 Plan C @$74.99 = 21 total
- Weekly conversion: 21/459 = 4.6% (improved from 3.2% week 17)
- Plan B conversion at $29.99: ~3.3% | Plan C at $74.99: ~1.3%
- Cancellations: 24/week | Upgrades: 26/week | Downgrades: 15/week

## R&D STATUS
- Tier 1: COMPLETED (+0.0289 boost)
- Tier 2: $333K (affordable when cash >$350K — not now)
- Start R&D when cash improves OR Plan B conversion picks up dramatically

## MARKET SEGMENTS (Quick Reference)
### S2 (MAIN DRIVER, 942 subs)
- WTP: $178.59, q_min: 0.37 | Market cap: 167,374
- Plan B $29.99 (16.8% WTP): threshold ~0.60-0.63 elevated
- Plan C $74.99 (42% WTP): threshold ~0.67-0.72 elevated
- Lead promo 20% lowers eval price but billing = list price
- Strong referrals to S3 and E2

### S1 (LOW PRIORITY, 398 subs)
- Plan A only ($9.99), 0 conversion from Plan B/C
- S1 issues take 2.96 days to resolve (complaints on social media)

### S3 (MONITOR, 105 subs)
- Plan B quality 0.4565 (declining slowly, no targeted dev)
- WTP $192.98, market cap large
- Consider S3 targeted dev when cash > $350K

### Enterprise (NOT YET)
- E1 Plan C quality: 0.4291 (need 0.65+, ~Day 229 with E1 targeted dev)
- Not viable until ~Day 229+ without targeted E1 dev spend

## WEEKLY MONITORING CHECKLIST
1. **Competitor events** — check social posts (CRITICAL, 7 weeks clear now)
2. **Billing events** — Day 128 ($4,139), Day 134 ($2,429), Day 148 ($9,117)
3. **S2 Plan B quality** — target 0.63 by Day 153
4. **q_shared** — should stabilize at ~0.155 with $700 global dev
5. **Conversion rate** — should improve as quality passes 0.60 threshold
6. **Issues count** — S1 still slow (3d avg), S2 excellent (0.1d avg)
7. **Cash burn** — should be ~$2,100-2,200/day

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- next-week takes 12 args ONLY (no rationale string!)
- log_rationale IS a separate function — call it BEFORE next-week
- Enterprise turns: WHERE closed=0 (not status)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (not 'active')
- Issues: NO issue_type column!
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- Capacity T1=200K units/day — usage ~205K/day → use T2 minimum!
- Plan C at <$55 has NEGATIVE gross margin (compute > revenue)!
- effective_price = LIST price at signup (not promo price)
- Lead promo boosts conversion threshold ONLY, does not reduce billing price

## CRITICAL DB QUERIES
- Cash: nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger')
- Active subs: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Enterprise open threads: WHERE closed=0
- Issues: WHERE status='open'
- Subs by group: JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscription columns: plan, effective_price, start_day, status, seat_count
- New leads: customers.created_day
- Daily revenue: SELECT day, SUM(amount) FROM ledger WHERE category='subscription_payment' GROUP BY day

## CASH FORECASTS (Week 18 submissions)
- 1 week (Day 133): $247K [237K, 257K] — Day 128 billing spike from $59.99 Plan C (69 subs)
- 4 weeks (Day 154): $205K [182K, 228K] — multiple billing spikes (Day 148 $9,117 biggest)
- 12 weeks (Day 210): $72K [25K, 140K] — quality improvement drives Plan B raise ~Day 153
- 26 weeks (Day 308): $15K [0, 150K] — very uncertain, needs enterprise/Plan C growth to survive
