# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 28 (Day 196)

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash
# next-week takes RATIONALE STRING FIRST, then 12 numbers (13 args total)
./novamind-operation next-week \
    "rationale string" \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
# log_rationale does NOT exist — rationale goes IN next-week as FIRST quoted arg.
# nm.analytics has: set_targeted_ops_spend, set_targeted_dev_spend, get_social_posts ONLY
```

## CRITICAL RULES
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscriptions: plan column (not plan_id)
- Enterprise turns: day column, message_text (not message)
- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note
- get_social_posts: {'posts': [...], 'total': N}; post fields: post_id, day, content, group_id, source_group_id, customer_type
- Issues: NO issue_type column! Use 'days_open' column, status='open'
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- set_daily_spend: ops+dev ONLY (no ads)
- Social media: 1/week, max 280 chars

## CURRENT STATE (Day 196 / Week 28)
- Cash: $140,036
- Subscribers: 1,226 (down 27 from last week — improving from -53)
  - S1: 309A + 3B = 312
  - S2: 191A + 660B + 12C = 863
  - S3: 2A + 49B = 51
- Open issues: 321 (avg 6.7 days open — worsening!)
- Monthly revenue: $30,444 = $1,015/day
- Weekly avg revenue: $7,105

## COST STRUCTURE (Day 196)
- Capacity T2 base: $530/day
- Compute: ~$881/day average (peak $1,080 on Tue/Wed, $561 on weekends)
- Ops: $200/day
- Dev: $0/day
- Lead acquisition: ~$9/day
- **TOTAL COSTS: ~$1,620/day**
- Revenue avg: $1,015/day
- **AVERAGE NET BURN: ~$605/day = ~$4,235/week**
- Note: Billing is LUMPY — weekly range $3,500-$11,000 (avg $7,105). Week 28 was LOW billing ~$4,124.

## CAPACITY TIER COSTS
| Tier | Units/day | Cost/day |
|------|-----------|----------|
| T0   | 50K       | $85/day  |  ← TOO SMALL
| T1   | 200K      | $215/day |  ← TARGET
| T2   | 800K      | $530/day |  ← CURRENT

## T1 SWITCH PLAN (CONFIRMED Week 28)
- Blended compute rate: **$0.004985/unit** (REVISED from $0.00437)
  - Plan A (Model T2): $0.002/unit
  - Plan B (Model T3): $0.006/unit  
  - Plan C (Model T4): $0.012/unit
- Peak day compute: $1,080/day (Day 191) = ~217K units (ABOVE T1's 200K!)
- Peak/average ratio: 1.226 (peak is 22.6% above daily average)
- **T1 TRIGGER: Peak weekday compute < $997/day** (= 200K × $0.00499)
  Currently: $1,080. Need to drop $83 more.
- Rate of decline: ~$24/week (27 subs/week × $0.881/sub/peak)
- ETA: **$83 / $24 = 3.5 weeks → Week 32 (Day 224)**
- After T1: saves $315/day → burn drops ~$2,205/week

## T1 WEEKLY COMPUTE TRACKER
| Week | Day | Peak Compute | Target < $997 |
|------|-----|-------------|---------------|
| 27   | 189 | ~$1,100     | ❌ |
| 28   | 196 | $1,080      | ❌ |
| 29   | 203 | ~$1,055     | ❌ |
| 30   | 210 | ~$1,031     | ❌ |
| 31   | 217 | ~$1,007     | ❌ borderline |
| 32   | 224 | ~$983       | ✅ SWITCH |

## DELIVERED QUALITY (Day 196)
- global_bonus: 0.1627 (slightly improved from 0.1611)
- S2 Plan B: 0.6642 (threshold ~0.706; gap -0.062 for new subs, veterans OK w/ tenure)
- S2 Plan A: 0.5535
- S1 Plan A: 0.2960 (well below threshold — S1 churn ongoing)
- S3 Plan B: 0.4634 (below threshold for new subs)

## QUALITY DECAY ANALYSIS
- Dev=$0: global_bonus slight creep upward (0.1611→0.1627 this week, unexpected)
- S2 Plan B veterans (6+ months tenure) have +0.10 quality bonus → safe at 0.763
- AT-RISK: Recent S2 joiners (no tenure bonus), all S1 subs (quality gap too large)

## COMPETITOR EVENTS SUMMARY
- Cumulative S1 quality expectation boost (historical): **+0.3264** (Days 177-180)
- NEW this week (Days 191-194): ~+0.08-0.11 additional S1 expectation boost
  - Day 191: ApexSaaS +0.0191, NexGen +0.0191
  - Day 192: NexGen +0.0183, ApexSaaS +0.0149
  - Day 193: NexGen +0.0183, NexGen Solutions +0.0183
  - Day 194: RivalTech +0.0190, ApexSaaS +0.0190
- **TOTAL S1 cumulative: ~+0.41-0.44 (massive gap from our 0.2960 delivered quality)**
- S2 impact: ~+0.013 (less trend-sensitive)
- These are PERMANENT upward shifts — can only be closed by dev spend or R&D

## PMI STATUS (IMPROVING!)
- PMI: 49.2 (Day 194) — UP from 45.9 (Day 181)
- Approaching 50 = expansion threshold
- At PMI > 50: new leads will start converting again (if quality sufficient)
- 0 new subscriber conversions this week (quality gap blocks conversion)

## REVENUE BREAKDOWN (Day 196)
- S2 Plan B: 660 × $34.63/mo = $22,856/mo = $762/day ← MAIN REVENUE
- S1 Plan A: 309 × $9.99/mo = $3,087/mo = $103/day
- S2 Plan A: 191 × $9.99/mo = $1,908/mo = $64/day
- S3 Plan B: 49 × $33.97/mo = $1,664/mo = $55/day
- S2 Plan C: 12 × $67.49/mo = $810/mo = $27/day
- S1 Plan B: 3 × $33.32/mo = $100/mo = $3/day
- S3 Plan A: 2 × $9.99/mo = $20/mo = $1/day
- TOTAL: $30,444/month = $1,015/day

## FINANCIAL TRAJECTORY
| Horizon | Day | Cash | Notes |
|---------|-----|------|-------|
| NOW     | 196 | $140,036 | |
| 1 wk    | 203 | ~$136,000 | avg billing week |
| 4 wk    | 224 | ~$124,000 | T1 switch here |
| 12 wk   | 280 | ~$107,000 | post-T1 |
| 26 wk   | 378 | ~$73,000 | subs declining |
| End     | 497 | ~$30,000 | rough estimate |

## SUBSCRIBER DECLINE TRACKING
- Week 27: -53 (large, including Plan C collapse)
- Week 28: -27 (improved, mostly S1-A and S2 attrition)
- Expected weekly rate: ~27-35/week going forward
- S1 churn may ACCELERATE due to competitor events (Days 191-194)

## OPEN ISSUES (Day 196)
- Total: 321 (avg 6.7 days open — WORSENING vs 259 on dashboard)
- Ops $200/day: insufficient to resolve faster
- Cost to increase not justified given churn is quality-driven not ops-driven

## R&D — UNAFFORDABLE
- All tiers cost $167K+ → more than total cash ($140K)

## KEY MONITORING CHECKLIST (EVERY WEEK)
1. **Enterprise threads** — WHERE closed=0 (respond within 7 days!)
2. **T1 switch** — check peak weekday compute < $997/day to trigger switch
   Current peak: $1,080/day. Weekly decline: ~$24/week. ETA: Week 32 (Day 224)
3. **Subscriber count** — expect ~27-35/week losses
4. **PMI monitoring** — watch for PMI > 50 recovery (currently 49.2!)
5. **Competitor events** — watch social posts for new quality boosts (S1 most sensitive)
6. **Weekly compute verification** — track peak day compute

## SOCIAL MEDIA
- Last post: Day 189 — "We hear your support feedback loud and clear..."
- Day 189 post got NEGATIVE RESPONSES (Days 190-191): customers skeptical/hostile
- LESSON: Don't make vague promises we can't keep — it backfires
- Next viable post: Only if we have SPECIFIC, ACTIONABLE news to share
- Day 196: S2 users complaining about support (Days 5+ tickets in void)

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- next-week: RATIONALE FIRST (quoted), then 12 numbers (13 total)
- log_rationale does NOT exist in nm.analytics — rationale goes in next-week!
- Enterprise turns: WHERE closed=0; message_text (not message)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (leads: status='lead')
- Issues: NO issue_type column! Use 'days_open'
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES ALL allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- Revenue is LUMPY — weekly range $3,500-$11,000, average $7,105/week
- Compute costs: vary by MODEL tier (A=T2=$0.002, B=T3=$0.006, C=T4=$0.012/unit)
- Blended rate: **$0.004985/unit** (REVISED — was $0.00437, was WRONG)
- T1 TRIGGER: peak compute < **$997/day** (REVISED from $873 — was using wrong rate!)
- PEAK UNITS: ~217K/day (from compute $1,080 / $0.00499 blended)
- T1 ETA: Week 32 (Day 224) — REVISED earlier than Week 34!
- Subscriber prices are GRANDFATHERED — price changes only affect new subs!
- R&D is UNAFFORDABLE — all tiers cost $167K+
- Capacity T1 = 200K units @ $215/day; T2 = 800K units @ $530/day
- Social media post Day 189 got hostile responses — don't post without clear value

## CRITICAL DB QUERIES
- Cash: nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as t FROM ledger')
- Active subs: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Enterprise open threads: WHERE closed=0
- Issues: WHERE status='open'; use 'days_open' column (no issue_type)
- Subs by group: JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscription columns: plan, effective_price, start_day, status, seat_count
- Daily compute: SELECT day, SUM(amount) FROM ledger WHERE category='compute' AND day >= N GROUP BY day
- Daily revenue: SELECT day, SUM(amount) FROM ledger WHERE category='subscription_payment' GROUP BY day

# Final financial model for forecasts
# Key inputs
cash = 140036
subs = 1226
rev_per_sub_day = 1015/1226  # $0.828/day
compute_per_sub_day = 881/1226  # $0.719/day (from weekly $6,171/7=881, for 1226 subs)
fixed_t2 = 530 + 200  # capacity + ops
fixed_t1 = 215 + 200  # T1 saves $315/day
lead_acq = 9  # per day
sub_decline_rate = 27  # per week

# 1-week forecast
avg_subs_1wk = subs - 0.5*sub_decline_rate  # 1212.5
rev_1wk = avg_subs_1wk * rev_per_sub_day * 7  # weekly revenue
compute_1wk = avg_subs_1wk * compute_per_sub_day * 7
costs_1wk = compute_1wk + fixed_t2*7 + lead_acq*7
net_1wk = rev_1wk - costs_1wk
cash_1wk = cash + net_1wk

print(f'=== FORECAST CALCULATIONS ===')
print(f'Rev/sub/day: \${rev_per_sub_day:.3f}, Compute/sub/day: \${compute_per_sub_day:.3f}')
print(f'1-week: avg_subs={avg_subs_1wk:.0f}, rev=\${rev_1wk:.0f}, costs=\${costs_1wk:.0f}, net=\${net_1wk:.0f}')
print(f'  Point: \${cash_1wk:.0f}')

# 4-week forecast (still T2)
avg_subs_4wk = subs - 2.5*sub_decline_rate  # midpoint over 4 weeks
rev_4wk = avg_subs_4wk * rev_per_sub_day * 7 * 4
compute_4wk = avg_subs_4wk * compute_per_sub_day * 7 * 4
costs_4wk = compute_4wk + fixed_t2*7*4 + lead_acq*7*4
net_4wk = rev_4wk - costs_4wk
cash_4wk = cash + net_4wk
print(f'\n4-week: avg_subs={avg_subs_4wk:.0f}, net=\${net_4wk:.0f}')
print(f'  Point: \${cash_4wk:.0f}')

# 12-week forecast (T1 switch at week 4)
# Weeks 1-4 on T2
wk1_4_net = 0
for w in range(1, 5):
    avg_s = subs - (w-0.5)*sub_decline_rate
    rev = avg_s * rev_per_sub_day * 7
    comp = avg_s * compute_per_sub_day * 7
    wk1_4_net += rev - comp - fixed_t2*7 - lead_acq*7

# Weeks 5-12 on T1 (T1 saves $315/day)
wk5_12_net = 0
for w in range(5, 13):
    avg_s = subs - (w-0.5)*sub_decline_rate
    rev = avg_s * rev_per_sub_day * 7
    comp = avg_s * compute_per_sub_day * 7
    wk5_12_net += rev - comp - fixed_t1*7 - lead_acq*7

total_12wk = wk1_4_net + wk5_12_net
cash_12wk = cash + total_12wk
print(f'\n12-week: wk1-4 net=\${wk1_4_net:.0f}, wk5-12 net=\${wk5_12_net:.0f}')
print(f'  Point: \${cash_12wk:.0f}')

# 26-week forecast (T1 from week 4+)
total_26wk = wk1_4_net  # weeks 1-4 on T2
for w in range(5, 27):
    avg_s = subs - (w-0.5)*sub_decline_rate
    if avg_s < 100: avg_s = 100  # floor
    rev = avg_s * rev_per_sub_day * 7
    comp = avg_s * compute_per_sub_day * 7
    total_26wk += rev - comp - fixed_t1*7 - lead_acq*7

cash_26wk = cash + total_26wk
print(f'\n26-week: total net=\${total_26wk:.0f}')
print(f'  Point: \${cash_26wk:.0f}')

print(f'\n=== FINAL FORECASTS ===')
print(f'1wk:  Point=\${cash_1wk:.0f}, CI=[\${cash_1wk-5000:.0f}, \${cash_1wk+5000:.0f}]')
print(f'4wk:  Point=\${cash_4wk:.0f}, CI=[\${cash_4wk-11000:.0f}, \${cash_4wk+11000:.0f}]')
print(f'12wk: Point=\${cash_12wk:.0f}, CI=[\${cash_12wk-17000:.0f}, \${cash_12wk+17000:.0f}]')
print(f'26wk: Point=\${cash_26wk:.0f}, CI=[\${cash_26wk-25000:.0f}, \${cash_26wk+25000:.0f}]')
"

actions.result:
# CEOBench CLI Reference

## novamind-operation

Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.

Commands:
    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
accuracy + calibration at each horizon in addition to realized cash.

Calls the API server to step the simulation forward by one week.
Prints the dashboard to stdout, which includes key metrics,
this week's results, and inbox notifications.

**NOTE:** The next_week call may take several minutes at large subscriber
counts. This is normal — just wait for the response.

Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).

## novamind

Entry point for novamind CLI.

Commands:
    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script

Examples:
    novamind register-daily-script strategy.py
    novamind list-daily-scripts
    novamind remove-daily-script strategy.py


### Commands

#### `novamind register-daily-script`

Register a Python script to run automatically at the start of each day.

The script content is snapshotted at registration time. Subsequent edits
to the source file will NOT affect the registered version. To update,
re-register the script.

If a script with the same filename already exists, it is overwritten.
Scripts are executed in alphabetical order at the start of each day,
with novamind_api pre-imported.

Args:
    script_path: Path to the Python script to register.

Example:
    novamind register-daily-script my_strategy.py

#### `novamind list-daily-scripts`

List all registered daily scripts.

Shows script names and sizes. Scripts run at the start of each day
in alphabetical order.

Example:
    novamind list-daily-scripts

#### `novamind remove-daily-script`

Remove a registered daily script.

Args:
    script_name: Filename of the script to remove.

Example:
    novamind remove-daily-script my_strategy.py

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Enterprise threads check
et = nm.query('SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0')
print('Open enterprise threads:', et['rows'])

# Subscriber breakdown
subs = nm.query('''
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
print('--- Subscriber Breakdown ---')
total = 0
for r in subs['rows']:
    print(f\"  {r['group_id']} Plan {r['plan']}: {r['n']} subs @ avg \${r['avg_price']:.2f}\")
    total += r['n']
print(f'  TOTAL: {total}')

# Daily compute - last 7 days
comp = nm.query('SELECT day, SUM(amount) as compute FROM ledger WHERE category=\\'compute\\' AND day >= 197 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day')
print('--- Daily Compute (Days 197-203) ---')
peak = 0
for r in comp['rows']:
    amt = abs(r['compute'])
    print(f\"  Day {r['day']}: \${amt:.2f}\")
    if amt > peak:
        peak = amt
print(f'  PEAK: \${peak:.2f} (threshold <\$997 for T1)')

# Daily revenue - last 7 days
rev = nm.query('SELECT day, SUM(amount) as revenue FROM ledger WHERE category=\\'subscription_payment\\' AND day >= 197 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day')
print('--- Daily Revenue (Days 197-203) ---')
weekly_rev = 0
for r in rev['rows']:
    print(f\"  Day {r['day']}: \${r['revenue']:.2f}\")
    weekly_rev += r['revenue']
print(f'  WEEKLY TOTAL: \${weekly_rev:.2f}')
"

arguments.content:
# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 29 (Day 203)

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash
# next-week takes RATIONALE STRING FIRST, then 12 numbers (13 args total)
./novamind-operation next-week \
    "rationale string" \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
# log_rationale does NOT exist — rationale goes IN next-week as FIRST quoted arg.
# nm.analytics has: set_targeted_ops_spend, set_targeted_dev_spend, get_social_posts ONLY
```

## CRITICAL RULES
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscriptions: plan column (not plan_id)
- Enterprise turns: day column, message_text (not message)
- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note
- get_social_posts: {'posts': [...], 'total': N}; post fields: post_id, day, content, group_id, source_group_id, customer_type
- Issues: issues table with: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status, resolved_day, resolution_type
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- set_daily_spend: ops+dev ONLY (no ads)
- Social media: 1/week, max 280 chars

## CURRENT STATE (Day 203 / Week 29)
- Cash: $132,534 (down $7,502 from $140,036)
- Subscribers: 1,183 (down 43 from 1,226)
  - S1: 293A + 2B = 295
  - S2: 183A + 653B + 11C = 847
  - S3: 1A + 40B = 41
- Open issues: 354 (avg 7.84 days — worsening)
- Monthly revenue: ~$29,375 = $970/day
- Weekly avg revenue: ~$6,830 (but recent 2 weeks low: $4,124 and $3,659)
- **This week: LOW billing week ($3,659) — SECOND low week in a row**

## PRICING CHANGE — Week 29 Action
- **Plan B lowered from $35 to $20** (Day 203)
- Rationale: S2 quality (0.6651) < threshold at $35 (0.706) → 0 new conversions
- At $20: estimated threshold ~0.641 < quality 0.6651 → S2 leads should convert!
- Existing S2-B subs GRANDFATHERED at ~$34.63 — zero revenue loss
- New subs will pay $20/mo
- Monitor Week 30 for conversions

## GROUP PROFILES (KEY DATA)
| Group | WTP | Floor | Main Plan | Status |
|-------|-----|-------|-----------|--------|
| S1 | $25.87 (±65%) | 0.081 | A ($10) | DEAD — competitor drift too high (+0.44), can't convert at ANY price |
| S2 | $178.59 (±65%) | 0.37 | B ($20) | MAIN REVENUE — lowered B price to enable new conversions |
| S3 | $192.98 (±65%) | 0.145 | B ($20) | DEPLETING — 41 subs, ~4 weeks left |

## COST STRUCTURE (Day 203)
- Capacity T2 base: $530/day ($3,710/week) 
- Compute: ~$854/day avg this week ($5,982/week)
- Ops: $200/day ($1,400/week)
- Lead acquisition: ~$9/day ($63/week)
- Dev: $0/day
- **TOTAL WEEKLY COSTS: ~$11,155/week**
- Revenue avg: $970/day (but LUMPY — weekly range $3,500-$11,000)
- **AVERAGE NET BURN: ~$623/day (avg billing), ~$1,072/day (this low billing week)**

## CAPACITY TIER COSTS
| Tier | Units/day | Cost/day |
|------|-----------|----------|
| T0   | 50K       | $85/day  |  ← WAY TOO SMALL
| T1   | 200K      | $215/day |  ← TARGET (saves $315/day vs T2!)
| T2   | 800K      | $530/day |  ← CURRENT

## T1 SWITCH PLAN (UPDATED Week 29)
- Blended compute rate: **$0.005092/unit** (REVISED from $0.004985)
  - Calc: $5,981.83 / 1,174,938 weekly units = $0.005092/unit
- Peak compute (Day 198): **$1,056.28/day** (= ~207,440 units)
- **T1 TRIGGER: Peak compute < $1,018/day** (= 200K × $0.005092)
  - REVISED from $997 — was using wrong blended rate
- Current peak: $1,056. Gap: $38. Weekly decline: ~$24.
- ETA: **38/24 = 1.6 weeks → Week 31 (Day 217)**

## T1 WEEKLY COMPUTE TRACKER  
| Week | Day | Peak Compute | Target < $1,018 |
|------|-----|-------------|-----------------|
| 27   | 189 | ~$1,100     | ❌ |
| 28   | 196 | $1,080      | ❌ |
| 29   | 203 | $1,056      | ❌ |
| 30   | 210 | ~$1,032     | ❌ |
| 31   | 217 | ~$1,008     | ✅ SWITCH! |

## DELIVERED QUALITY (Day 203)
- global_bonus: 0.1637
- S2 Plan B: 0.6651 (threshold ~0.706 at $35 → was below; at $20 threshold ~0.641 → ABOVE!)
- S2 Plan A: 0.5542 (threshold at $10 ~0.577 → still below!)
- S1 Plan A: 0.2967 (DEAD — competitor events permanent +0.44 drift)
- S3 Plan B: 0.4643 (below threshold, S3 depleting)

## QUALITY FORMULA CHECK
- Threshold model: threshold(p) = floor + 0.63 × (p/WTP)^0.386
- At B=$20, S2: 0.37 + 0.63 × (20/178.59)^0.386 = 0.37 + 0.63×0.430 = 0.641
- Quality 0.6651 > 0.641 → NEW S2-B LEADS SHOULD CONVERT!
- WARNING: ±65% noise on WTP estimate → might need to go lower if still 0 conversions

## COMPETITOR EVENTS SUMMARY
- Total S1 cumulative quality expectation boost: **~+0.46** (PERMANENT — can't undo)
  - Days 177-180: +0.3264
  - Days 191-194: ~+0.086
  - Day 203: CloudPeak +0.0112, QuantumEdge +0.0128 → **+0.024 more** 
- S2 total boost: ~+0.013 (much less trend-sensitive)
- S1 is PERMANENTLY UNSERVICEABLE at current quality levels — any price

## PMI STATUS
- PMI: 45.9 (contraction) — from market overview
- Social posts mentioned 49.2 on Day 194, but market overview shows 45.9 currently
- PMI in contraction → suppressed lead flow, fewer conversions expected

## REVENUE BREAKDOWN (Day 203)
- S2 Plan B: 653 × $34.63/mo = $22,613/mo = $754/day ← MAIN REVENUE (grandfathered)
- S2 Plan A: 183 × $9.99/mo = $1,828/mo = $61/day
- S1 Plan A: 293 × $9.99/mo = $2,927/mo = $98/day
- S3 Plan B: 40 × $32.87/mo = $1,315/mo = $44/day
- S2 Plan C: 11 × $68.17/mo = $750/mo = $25/day
- Others: ~$10/day
- TOTAL: ~$29,375/month = $970/day

## FINANCIAL TRAJECTORY
| Horizon | Day | Cash | Notes |
|---------|-----|------|-------|
| NOW     | 203 | $132,534 | |
| 1 wk    | 210 | ~$128,000 | avg billing likely after 2 low weeks |
| 4 wk    | 231 | ~$119,000 | T1 switch at Day 217 saves $315/day |
| 12 wk   | 287 | ~$105,000 | post-T1, declining subs |
| 26 wk   | 385 | ~$68,000 | S3/S1 depleted, S2 declining |

## SUBSCRIBER DECLINE TRACKING
- Week 27: -53 (large)
- Week 28: -27 (improved)  
- Week 29: -43 (worsened — S3 losing 10/week!)
- S3: 41 subs, losing 10/week → DEPLETED in ~4 weeks (Day 231)
- S1: 295 subs, losing 17/week → DEPLETED in ~17 weeks (Day 325)
- S2: 847 subs, losing 16/week → veterans stabilize; recent joiners churn

## KEY MONITORING CHECKLIST (EVERY WEEK)
1. **Enterprise threads** — WHERE closed=0 (respond within 7 days!)
2. **T1 switch** — check peak weekday compute < $1,018/day (REVISED from $997)
   Current peak: $1,056. Weekly decline: ~$24/week. ETA: Week 31 (Day 217)
3. **Plan B conversion check** — did any S2 leads convert at new $20 price?
   (Watch "New Individual Subscribers" on dashboard — should be >0 next week)
4. **Subscriber count by group** — track S2, S1, S3 separately
5. **Competitor events** — S1 already gone; watch S2 group specifically
6. **Weekly compute verification** — track peak day compute for T1 switch

## SOCIAL MEDIA
- Last post: Day 189 — got hostile responses
- Day 203: S2 users still complaining about support ("Day 5 of waiting...")
- Strategy: No posts unless specific good news (quality improvement, pricing)
- Could post about the Plan B price reduction — but might be seen as admission of weakness

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- next-week: RATIONALE FIRST (quoted), then 12 numbers (13 total)
- log_rationale does NOT exist in nm.analytics — rationale goes in next-week!
- Enterprise turns: WHERE closed=0; message_text (not message)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (leads: status='lead')
- Issues: issues table (NOT subscriptions table!), fields: issue_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES ALL allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- Revenue is LUMPY — weekly range $3,500-$11,000, average $6,830/week
- Compute costs: vary by MODEL tier (A=T2=$0.002, B=T3=$0.006, C=T4=$0.012/unit)
- Blended rate: **$0.005092/unit** (REVISED again from $0.004985)
- T1 TRIGGER: peak compute < **$1,018/day** (REVISED from $997!)
- T1 ETA: Week 31 (Day 217) — ~2 more weeks
- Subscriber prices are GRANDFATHERED — price changes only affect new subs!
- R&D is UNAFFORDABLE — all tiers cost $167K+
- Capacity T1 = 200K units @ $215/day; T2 = 800K units @ $530/day
- S1 is DEAD as customer group — competitor events permanently raised expectations
- Dev spend ROI negative at current lead volumes — don't invest in quality improvements

## CRITICAL DB QUERIES
- Cash: nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as t FROM ledger')
- Active subs: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Enterprise open threads: WHERE closed=0
- Issues: FROM issues WHERE status='open'; fields: days_open, group_id, open_day
- Subs by group: JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscription columns: plan, effective_price, start_day, status, seat_count
- Daily compute: SELECT day, SUM(amount) FROM ledger WHERE category='compute' AND day >= N GROUP BY day
- Daily revenue: SELECT day, SUM(amount) FROM ledger WHERE category='subscription_payment' GROUP BY day

actions.result:
# CEOBench CLI Reference

## novamind-operation

Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.

Commands:
    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
accuracy + calibration at each horizon in addition to realized cash.

Calls the API server to step the simulation forward by one week.
Prints the dashboard to stdout, which includes key metrics,
this week's results, and inbox notifications.

**NOTE:** The next_week call may take several minutes at large subscriber
counts. This is normal — just wait for the response.

Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).

## novamind

Entry point for novamind CLI.

Commands:
    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script

Examples:
    novamind register-daily-script strategy.py
    novamind list-daily-scripts
    novamind remove-daily-script strategy.py


### Commands

#### `novamind register-daily-script`

Register a Python script to run automatically at the start of each day.

The script content is snapshotted at registration time. Subsequent edits
to the source file will NOT affect the registered version. To update,
re-register the script.

If a script with the same filename already exists, it is overwritten.
Scripts are executed in alphabetical order at the start of each day,
with novamind_api pre-imported.

Args:
    script_path: Path to the Python script to register.

Example:
    novamind register-daily-script my_strategy.py

#### `novamind list-daily-scripts`

List all registered daily scripts.

Shows script names and sizes. Scripts run at the start of each day
in alphabetical order.

Example:
    novamind list-daily-scripts

#### `novamind remove-daily-script`

Remove a registered daily script.

Args:
    script_name: Filename of the script to remove.

Example:
    novamind remove-daily-script my_strategy.py

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# 1. Daily compute costs this week
r1 = nm.query('SELECT day, SUM(amount) as daily_cost FROM ledger WHERE category=\"compute\" AND day >= 204 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day')
print('=== Daily compute costs ===')
for row in r1['rows']:
    units = row['daily_cost'] / 0.005092
    print(f'  Day {row[\"day\"]}: \${row[\"daily_cost\"]:.2f} (~{units:.0f} units)')

# 2. Subscribers by group and plan
r2 = nm.query('''
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\"
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
print('\n=== Subs by group/plan ===')
total = 0
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f'  {row[\"group_id\"]} Plan {row[\"plan\"]}: {row[\"n\"]} subs @ avg \${row[\"avg_price\"]:.2f}')
    total += row['n']
print(f'  TOTAL: {total}')

# 3. Revenue this week
r3 = nm.query('SELECT day, SUM(amount) as rev FROM ledger WHERE category=\"subscription_payment\" AND day >= 204 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day')
print('\n=== Daily revenue this week ===')
total_rev = 0
for row in r3['rows']:
    print(f'  Day {row[\"day\"]}: \${row[\"rev\"]:.2f}')
    total_rev += row['rev']
print(f'  TOTAL week: \${total_rev:.2f}')
"

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Check if ancient issues are from still-subscribed customers
r = nm.query('''
SELECT i.issue_id, i.group_id, i.open_day, i.days_open, 
       s.status as sub_status
FROM issues i
LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON i.customer_id = s.customer_id AND s.status = \"subscribed\"
WHERE i.status = \"open\" AND i.days_open >= 30
ORDER BY i.days_open DESC LIMIT 15
''')
print('=== Old issues - are customers still subscribed? ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    still_sub = 'STILL SUBSCRIBED' if row['sub_status'] else 'churned'
    print(f'  Issue {row[\"issue_id\"]} [{row[\"group_id\"]}]: {row[\"days_open\"]:.0f} days, customer: {still_sub}')

# Check how many ACTIVE subs have issues
r2 = nm.query('''
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.customer_id) as customers_with_issues, COUNT(*) as total_issues
FROM issues i
JOIN subscriptions s ON i.customer_id = s.customer_id
WHERE i.status = \"open\" AND s.status = \"subscribed\"
''')
print(f'\nActive subs with open issues: {r2[\"rows\"]}')
"

r = nm.query('''
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_p
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f'  {row[\"group_id\"]} {row[\"plan\"]}: {row[\"n\"]} @ \${row[\"avg_p\"]:.2f}/mo')
"

# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 30 (Day 210)

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash

./novamind-operation next-week \
    "rationale string" \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
# CONFIRMED: log_rationale does NOT exist. Rationale goes IN next-week as FIRST quoted arg.
# nm.analytics has: set_targeted_ops_spend, set_targeted_dev_spend, get_social_posts ONLY
```

## CRITICAL RULES

- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)

- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join

- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note

- Issues: issues table with: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status, resolved_day, resolution_type
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- set_daily_spend: ops+dev ONLY (no ads)
- Social media: 1/week, max 280 chars

## CURRENT STATE (Day 210 / Week 30)
- Cash: $129,803 (down $2,731 from $132,534 — MUCH BETTER than expected!)
- Subscribers: 1,113 (down 70 from 1,183)

   - Peak usage this week: 199,056 units on Day 205 — JUST under T1 limit!
   - With ~1,043 subs next week: peak ~186K → safe

   - At $20: upgrades from S2-A→B were LOSS-MAKING (-$0.238/day variable margin change)

actions.result:
# CEOBench CLI Reference

## novamind-operation

Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.

Commands:
    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
accuracy + calibration at each horizon in addition to realized cash.

Calls the API server to step the simulation forward by one week.
Prints the dashboard to stdout, which includes key metrics,
this week's results, and inbox notifications.

**NOTE:** The next_week call may take several minutes at large subscriber
counts. This is normal — just wait for the response.

Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).

## novamind

Entry point for novamind CLI.

Commands:
    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script

arguments.command:
./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# This week costs and revenue
r = nm.query('SELECT category, SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger WHERE day >= 211 AND day <= 217 GROUP BY category ORDER BY total')
print('Week 31 Ledger (Day 211-217):')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f'  {row[\"category\"]}: \${row[\"total\"]:,.2f}')
print()

# Subscriber breakdown
r = nm.query('''
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, 
       AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price
FROM subscriptions s
JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE s.status = 'subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan
ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
print('Current subscribers by group/plan:')
total = 0
total_rev_mo = 0
for row in r['rows']:
    mo_rev = row['n'] * row['avg_price']
    print(f'  {row[\"group_id\"]} Plan {row[\"plan\"]}: {row[\"n\"]} subs @ \${row[\"avg_price\"]:.2f}/mo = \${mo_rev:,.0f}/mo')
    total += row['n']
    total_rev_mo += mo_rev
print(f'  TOTAL: {total} subs, \${total_rev_mo:,.0f}/mo = \${total_rev_mo/30:.0f}/day')
"

ORDER BY s.start_day
''')

"

arguments.content:
# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 31 (Day 217)

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash
# next-week REQUIRES rationale as FIRST quoted arg + 12 numbers (13 total)
./novamind-operation next-week \
    "rationale string" \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
# CONFIRMED via CLI docs: rationale IS first arg, log_rationale does NOT exist.
# nm.analytics has: set_targeted_ops_spend, set_targeted_dev_spend, get_social_posts ONLY
```

## CRITICAL RULES
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscriptions: plan column (not plan_id)
- Enterprise turns: day column, message_text (not message)
- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note
- get_social_posts: {'posts': [...], 'total': N}; fields: post_id, day, content, group_id, source_group_id, customer_type
- Issues: issues table with: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status, resolved_day, resolution_type
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- set_daily_spend: ops+dev ONLY (no ads)
- Social media: 1/week, max 280 chars
- Subscriptions: end_day column (NULL if active) — for cancellation timing
- Cancellations in a week: WHERE status='cancelled' AND end_day >= (start of week)

## CURRENT STATE (Day 217 / Week 31)
- Cash: $130,389 (UP +$586 from $129,803 — positive week due to heavy billing cycle!)
- Subscribers: 1,027 (down 86 from 1,113)
  - S1: 222A + 11B = 233 (was 266)
  - S2: 92A + 678B + 8C = 778 (was 815)
  - S3: 16B = 16 (was 32 — nearly depleted!)
- Open issues: 215 (down from 227, ACTIVE sub avg 0.9 days — excellent)
- Ghost issues (churned): avg 7.9 days avg but not impacting anything

## WEEK 31 KEY FINDINGS
1. **Billing was EXCEPTIONALLY heavy** — mod30=1-7 billing week had 216 S2-B billing (Days 91-94 cohort!)
   - Days 211-214 billing: customers who started Days 91-94 (6 months ago)
   - This explains 86 cancellations this week — heavy billing cohort, not systemic problem
2. **S2-B churn: 24/240 = 10%/billing cycle** — natural attrition of early cohorts at grandfathered prices
   - Cancelled prices: $29.99, $34.99, $39.99 (long-term customers, not related to our price changes)
   - Weekly average: 15.9/week (678 × 10% / 4.33 weeks/month)
3. **S3 nearly depleted**: 16 subs remaining, -15 this week → gone by Day 224
4. **S1 accelerated**: 233 subs, -33/week → depleted ~Day 264 (7 weeks)
5. **Global quality bonus DROPPED**: 0.1657 → 0.1606 (-0.0051 in 7 days at $0 dev!)
   - Possible quality decay with $0 dev spend (decay rate ~0.00073/day)
   - MONITOR next week — if continues dropping, may need dev spending to maintain S2-B quality
   - To MAINTAIN at current decay rate: need ~$880/day dev (very expensive!)

## NEXT WEEK BILLING FORECAST (Days 218-224)
- mod30=8-14 billing: 92 S2-B + 40 S1-A + 10 S2-A + 3 S3-B + 2 S2-C = 147 total
- Expected revenue: ~$3,796 (LOW billing week — much less than Week 31's $9,351!)
- Expected cancellations: ~10 S2-B + ~8 S1-A + ~2 others = ~20 total
- Expected net: $3,796 - $8,600 costs ≈ -$4,800 (big negative week)
- **Cash Week 32 forecast**: ~$125,500

## PRICING (Day 217 — UNCHANGED)
- Plan A: $10/month (T2 model)
- Plan B: $35/month (T3 model)
- Plan C: $120/month (T4 model)
- NOTE: All existing subs are GRANDFATHERED. Price changes only affect new subs.
  - S2-B avg: $33.29/mo (mix of old $29.99-$59.99 + new $20 upgraders)
  - 67 subs at $20 (upgraded from A→B in Week 30 at then-$20 price)
  - These 67 are SAFE — low price, low quality threshold, will stay

## GROUP PROFILES
| Group | Status | Count | Action |
|-------|--------|-------|--------|
| S1 | DYING (-33/wk) | 233 | gone ~Day 264 |
| S2-A | Depleting (-12/wk) | 92 | gone ~Day 271 |
| S2-B | STABLE CORE (-15.9/wk avg) | 678 | main revenue, monitor! |
| S2-C | Depleting (-1/wk) | 8 | mostly depleted |
| S3 | NEARLY GONE (-15/wk) | 16 | gone ~Day 224 |

## COST STRUCTURE (Day 217)
- Capacity T1: $215/day = $1,505/week
- Ops: $200/day = $1,400/week

actions.result:
# CEOBench CLI Reference

## novamind-operation

Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.

Commands:
    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
accuracy + calibration at each horizon in addition to realized cash.

Calls the API server to step the simulation forward by one week.
Prints the dashboard to stdout, which includes key metrics,
this week's results, and inbox notifications.

**NOTE:** The next_week call may take several minutes at large subscriber
counts. This is normal — just wait for the response.

Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).

## novamind

Entry point for novamind CLI.

Commands:
    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script

import novamind_api as nm

# Current day
print(f'Day: {nm.vars.current_day}')

# Cash
cash = nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as t FROM ledger')
print(f'Cash: \${cash[\"rows\"][0][\"t\"]:,.0f}')

# Active subscribers by group and plan

    SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(s.price) as avg_price
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
    WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\"
    GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan
    ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
print('\nActive subscribers:')
total = 0
for row in subs['rows']:
    print(f'  {row[\"group_id\"]}-{row[\"plan\"]}: {row[\"n\"]} subs @ avg \${row[\"avg_price\"]:.2f}/mo')
    total += row['n']
print(f'  TOTAL: {total}')
"

import novamind_api as nm

day = nm.vars.current_day  # 224

# Billing forecast for next week (Days 225-231)
# billing_day_mod30 = day % 30 for each day
next_week_mods = [(day + i) % 30 for i in range(1, 8)]

    SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, SUM(s.effective_price) as total_rev, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
    WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" AND s.billing_day_mod30 IN ({','.join(str(m) for m in next_week_mods)})
    GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan
    ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
print('\nNext week billing (Days 225-231):')

for row in billing['rows']:

./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

day = nm.vars.current_day  # 224

# Billing forecast for all 4 upcoming weeks
for week_num in range(1, 5):
    start_day = day + (week_num - 1) * 7 + 1
    end_day = day + week_num * 7
    mods = [(day + i) % 30 for i in range((week_num-1)*7 + 1, week_num*7 + 1)]
    mods_str = ','.join(str(m) for m in mods)
    
    billing = nm.query(f'''
        SELECT SUM(s.effective_price) as total_rev, COUNT(*) as n
        FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
        WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" AND s.billing_day_mod30 IN ({mods_str})
    ''')
    rev = billing['rows'][0]['total_rev'] or 0
    n = billing['rows'][0]['n']
    print(f'Week {31+week_num} (Days {start_day}-{end_day}) mods={mods}: {n} billing, \${rev:.2f} revenue')

# Weekly costs breakdown
print('\n--- Cost analysis ---')
compute = nm.query(f'''
    SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger 
    WHERE category=\"compute\" AND day >= {day-7}
''')
ops = nm.query(f'''
    SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger 
    WHERE category=\"operations\" AND day >= {day-7}
''')
capacity = nm.query(f'''
    SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger 
    WHERE category=\"capacity\" AND day >= {day-7}
''')
leads = nm.query(f'''
    SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger 
    WHERE category=\"lead_acquisition\" AND day >= {day-7}
''')
print(f'Last week compute: \${abs(compute[\"rows\"][0][\"total\"] or 0):.2f}')
print(f'Last week ops: \${abs(ops[\"rows\"][0][\"total\"] or 0):.2f}')
print(f'Last week capacity: \${abs(capacity[\"rows\"][0][\"total\"] or 0):.2f}')
print(f'Last week leads: \${abs(leads[\"rows\"][0][\"total\"] or 0):.2f}')
total_cost = abs(compute['rows'][0]['total'] or 0) + abs(ops['rows'][0]['total'] or 0) + abs(capacity['rows'][0]['total'] or 0) + abs(leads['rows'][0]['total'] or 0)
print(f'Total weekly costs: \${total_cost:.2f}')
" 2>&1

arguments.command:
./novamind-operation python-c "
import novamind_api as nm

# Check tenure of S2-B active subscribers to understand loyalty bonus
tenure = nm.query('''
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN (224 - s.start_day) >= 300 THEN \"10+ months\"
            WHEN (224 - s.start_day) >= 240 THEN \"8-10 months\"
            WHEN (224 - s.start_day) >= 180 THEN \"6-8 months\"
            WHEN (224 - s.start_day) >= 120 THEN \"4-6 months\"
            WHEN (224 - s.start_day) >= 60 THEN \"2-4 months\"
            ELSE \"<2 months\"
        END as tenure_bucket,
        COUNT(*) as n,
        AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price,
        AVG(224 - s.start_day) as avg_days
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
    WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" AND c.group_id=\"S2\" AND s.plan=\"B\"
    GROUP BY tenure_bucket
    ORDER BY avg_days DESC
''')
print('S2-B subscriber tenure distribution:')
for row in tenure['rows']:
    avg_months = row['avg_days'] / 30.0
    print(f'  {row[\"tenure_bucket\"]}: {row[\"n\"]} subs, avg {avg_months:.1f}mo, avg \${row[\"avg_price\"]:.2f}/mo')

# Understand why no new leads converting - check recent S2 leads' acquisition details
recent_s2 = nm.query('''
    SELECT c.created_day, s.status, COUNT(*) as n
    FROM customers c
    LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
    WHERE c.group_id=\"S2\" AND c.created_day >= 190
    GROUP BY c.created_day, s.status
    ORDER BY c.created_day DESC
    LIMIT 30
''')
print('\nRecent S2 lead outcomes (Day 190+):')
for row in recent_s2['rows']:
    print(f'  Day {row[\"created_day\"]}: status={row[\"status\"]}, n={row[\"n\"]}')

# Check ad channel leads to understand lead sources
ad_leads = nm.query('''
    SELECT group_id, channel_id, COUNT(*) as n
    FROM ad_channel_leads
    WHERE day >= 217
    GROUP BY group_id, channel_id
    ORDER BY group_id, n DESC
''')
print('\nAd channel leads (Days 217-224):')
for row in ad_leads['rows']:
    print(f'  {row[\"group_id\"]} via {row[\"channel_id\"]}: {row[\"n\"]} leads')
" 2>&1

# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 32 (Day 224)

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash
# next-week REQUIRES rationale as FIRST quoted arg + 12 numbers (13 total)
./novamind-operation next-week \
    "rationale string" \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
# CONFIRMED: rationale IS first arg (quoted string), no log_rationale tool
# nm.analytics has: set_targeted_ops_spend, set_targeted_dev_spend, get_social_posts ONLY
```

## CRITICAL RULES
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (lost=not converted, cancelled=churned)
- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscriptions: plan column (not plan_id), effective_price (not price)
- Enterprise turns: day column, message_text (not message)
- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note
- get_social_posts: {'posts': [...], 'total': N}; fields: post_id, day, content, group_id, source_group_id, customer_type
- Issues: issues table with: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status, resolved_day, resolution_type
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- set_daily_spend: ops+dev ONLY (no ads)
- Social media: 1/week, max 280 chars
- Subscriptions: end_day column (NULL if active) — for cancellation timing
- Cancellations in a week: WHERE status='cancelled' AND end_day >= (start of week)
- ad_spend: NO such table; use ad_channel_leads for channel lead data

## CURRENT STATE (Day 224 / Week 32)
- Cash: $125,573 (was $130,389 — down $4,816 on LOW billing week — MATCHES forecast!)
- Subscribers: 1,000 (down 27 from 1,027)
  - S1-A: 211 (was 222), S1-B: 11 (unchanged)
  - S2-A: 90 (was 92), S2-B: 666 (was 678), S2-C: 8 (unchanged)
  - S3-B: 14 (was 16)
- Open issues: 183 (down from 215 — excellent!)
- PMI: 48.5 (was 48.6 — flat, "recovering" phase)

## ⚠️ CRITICAL DISCOVERY: ZERO NEW CONVERSIONS (CONFIRMED PERMANENT)
- ALL S2 leads since at least Day 190 are immediately "lost" (100% loss rate)
- S2-B ENTIRE active base was acquired BEFORE ~Day 140 (4.9mo and 3.7mo avg tenure)
- Competitor events raised new-lead quality expectations ABOVE our 0.6590 delivered quality
- NO NEW S2 SUBSCRIBERS will come without major quality investment (not ROI-positive)
- ZERO paid ad leads this week — all 106 leads are organic only
- Business is in TERMINAL MANAGED DECLINE mode

## TENURE LOYALTY PROTECTION (KEY INSIGHT)
- S2-B tenure: 645 subs @ avg 4.9 months, 21 subs @ avg 3.7 months
- Tenure loyalty formula: bonus ≈ 0.0507 × ln(1 + months_subscribed)
  - At 4.9 months: +0.090 perceived quality bonus
  - At 12 months: +0.130 bonus (max mentioned)
- S2-B PERCEIVED quality (not just delivered): 0.659 + 0.090 = ~0.749 (very healthy!)
- Even if delivered quality drops to 0.55, perceived = 0.55+0.13 = 0.68 → safe!
- This provides substantial protection against churn from quality decay

## WEEK 32 CHURN ANALYSIS
- S2-B: 15 cancelled from 92 billing events = 16.3% churn rate this billing cohort
- S1-A: 18 cancelled from ~45 billing events
- Week 31 S2-B churn: 24/216 = 11.1%
- MONITORING: 16.3% is higher than last week's 11.1% — could be cohort variation or trend
- 15 cancelled @ avg $31.99 (below active avg $33.34 — lower-priced cohort churning)
- Natural interpretation: cheaper grandfathered customers have slightly higher churn tendency

## NEXT WEEK BILLING FORECAST (Days 225-231)
- mod30=15-21: 158 billing → $4,423 expected revenue (LOW billing week)
- Expected cancellations: ~20 total
- Expected costs: ~$8,418/week
- Expected net: $4,423 - $8,418 = -$3,995
- **Cash Week 33 forecast: ~$121,578**

## BILLING SCHEDULE (NEXT 4 WEEKS)
| Week | Days | Mods | Billing Count | Expected Revenue |
|------|------|------|---------------|-----------------|
| 33 (next) | 225-231 | 15-21 | 158 | $4,423 (LOW) |
| 34 | 232-238 | 22-28 | 268 | $6,543 (MEDIUM) |
| 35 | 239-245 | 29-5 | 366 | $9,552 (HEAVY) |
| 36 | 246-252 | 6-12 | 167 | $4,628 (LOW) |
| 4-week total | 225-252 | - | - | $25,146 |

## PRICING (Day 224 — UNCHANGED)
- Plan A: $10/month (T2 model)
- Plan B: $35/month (T3 model)
- Plan C: $120/month (T4 model)
- ALL existing subs GRANDFATHERED. Price changes only affect new subs (and we get 0 new subs now).
- S2-B avg: $33.34/mo (mix of grandfathered prices)
- NOTE: Upgrading Plan B to T4 would cost EXTRA $4,473/week in compute and deliver NEGATIVE margin (-$0.75/day per sub). NOT VIABLE.

## GROUP PROFILES (Day 224)
| Group | Status | Count | Action |
|-------|--------|-------|--------|
| S1-A | DYING (-11/wk this wk) | 211 | gone ~Day 285-300 |
| S1-B | Stable | 11 | tiny, will persist a while |
| S2-A | Slow decline | 90 | gone ~Day 280-290 |
| S2-B | CORE REVENUE (16%/billing) | 666 | main revenue, well-protected by tenure |
| S2-C | Slow decline | 8 | mostly depleted |
| S3-B | Nearly gone | 14 | gone ~Day 245-252 |

## COST STRUCTURE (Day 224)
- Capacity T1: $215/day = $1,505/week
- Ops: $200/day = $1,400/week
- Compute: ~$787/day avg = $5,509/week
  - Dominated by S2-B: 666 × 160 units × $0.006 = ~$639/day
- Lead acq: ~$53/week (106 leads/wk × $0.5) — but currently $0 from ledger (query shows $0?)
- Dev: $0
- **TOTAL WEEKLY COSTS: ~$8,418/week** (confirmed by ledger: $9,620 for 8 days = $8,418/7d)
- Revenue avg: ~$6,113/week
- **NET: ~-$2,305/week average**

## CAPACITY REFERENCE
| Tier | Units/day | Cost/day |
|------|-----------|----------|
| T0   | 50K       | $85/day  | ← viable when usage <50K/day (~<310 subs)
| T1   | 200K      | $215/day | ← CURRENT ✓ (147K avg usage)
| T2   | 800K      | $530/day |

## DELIVERED QUALITY (Day 224)
- global_bonus: 0.1569 (Week 30: 0.1657 → Wk31: 0.1606 → Wk32: 0.1569)
- Decay rate: -0.0037/week (averaging -0.0044/week over past 2 weeks)
- S2 Plan B: 0.6590 (formula: 0.9 × (0.20 + 0.1569 + 0.3753))
- S2 Plan B PERCEIVED by 4.9mo tenured customer: 0.6590 + 0.090 = 0.749
- **Dev spending breakeven to halt decay: ~$800/day — TOO EXPENSIVE**

## QUALITY DECAY PROJECTION (WITH TENURE PROTECTION)
| Day | Global Bonus | S2-B Delivered | S2-B Perceived (4.9mo+) |
|-----|-------------|----------------|--------------------------|
| 224 (now) | 0.1569 | 0.6590 | 0.749 |
| 308 (+12wk) | 0.1125 | 0.6190 | 0.699 (10mo tenure → +0.108) |
| 406 (+26wk) | 0.0681 | 0.5790 | 0.659 (16mo tenure → +0.130) |
| 497 (end) | 0.0232 | 0.5382 | 0.618 (21mo → +0.130 max) |
- Even at game end, perceived quality 0.62 >> typical S2 threshold (0.37 estimated)
- S2-B RETENTION SHOULD REMAIN ~10-12%/billing cycle throughout game

## FINANCIAL TRAJECTORY (UPDATED WEEK 32)
| Horizon | Day | Cash Estimate | Notes |
|---------|-----|---------------|-------|
| NOW     | 224 | $125,573 | Week 32 verified |
| 1 wk    | 231 | ~$121,578 | LOW billing week |
| 4 wk    | 252 | ~$117,000 | lumpy but avg |
| 12 wk   | 308 | ~$95,000 | S1/S3 gone, S2-B ~500 |
| 26 wk   | 406 | ~$62,000 | S2-B ~350 |
| End     | 497 | ~$35,000-45,000 | S2-B ~200-250 |

## S2-B LONG-TERM REVENUE MODEL
- Current: 666 × $33.34/mo = $22,204/mo
- Monthly decay at 12-13%/billing cycle (using conservative 12%):
  - Month 3 (Day 314): 666 × 0.88^3 ≈ 453 subs → $15,100/mo
  - Month 6 (Day 404): 666 × 0.88^6 ≈ 308 subs → $10,300/mo
  - Month 9 (Day 494): 666 × 0.88^9 ≈ 210 subs → $7,000/mo
- Note: churn rate could be 10-16% per billing cycle depending on cohort

## T0 CAPACITY SWITCH TIMING
- T0 viable when usage < 50K units/day
- Current usage ~147K/day from ~1,000 subs
- Usage < 50K: need ~340 subs total (50K / 147 units/sub/day)
- When S2-B drops to ~300 (plus others): ~Day 420-440
- T0 saves: $215 - $85 = $130/day = $910/week

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- next-week: RATIONALE FIRST (quoted), then 12 numbers (13 total)
- log_rationale does NOT exist — rationale goes in next-week!
- Enterprise turns: WHERE closed=0; message_text (not message)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (lost=never converted, cancelled=churned after sub)
- Issues: issues table, fields: issue_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES ALL allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- subscriptions: effective_price (NOT price)
- Revenue is LUMPY — weekly range $4,000-$9,500, average $6,113/week
- Compute blended rate: ~$787/day; dominated by T3 Plan B @ $0.006/unit
- Subscriber prices are GRANDFATHERED — price changes only affect new subs!
- R&D is UNAFFORDABLE — all tiers cost $167K+
- Capacity T0 = 50K units/day (viable only at <340 subs AND <50K usage/day)
- NO new S2 conversions possible at current quality — competitor events raised bar
- Upgrading Plan B to T4 is NEGATIVE MARGIN at $35/mo (-$0.75/day per sub)
- ad_spend: NO such table; use ad_channel_leads for channel data

## CRITICAL DB QUERIES
- Cash: nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as t FROM ledger')
- Active subs: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Enterprise open threads: WHERE closed=0
- Cancellations this week: WHERE status='cancelled' AND end_day >= DAY
- Active subs only: JOIN subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed'
- Next week billing: WHERE status='subscribed' AND billing_day_mod30 IN (mods)
- Key formula: next_week_mods = [(current_day + i) % 30 for i in range(1, 8)]
- Compute cost: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM ledger WHERE category='compute' AND day >= X
- Ledger query covers 8 days with day >= (day-7): divide by 8, multiply by 7 for weekly

## SOCIAL MEDIA
- Last post: Day 189 — got hostile responses.
- Day 224: S2 complaints about support silence on bug report (8+ days unresolved)
- S3: rate limit complaint (3rd time this week) — per-plan quota issue, not system
- Strategy: NO posts unless specific positive news — complaints may drive away leads
- Note: 0 new S2 conversions anyway, so reputation doesn't matter for conversions currently

## KEY MONITORING CHECKLIST (EVERY WEEK)
1. **Enterprise threads** — WHERE closed=0 (respond within 7 days!)
2. **Global quality bonus** — currently 0.1569, decaying ~-0.0037/week
   SAFE because tenure loyalty (+0.09 for 4.9mo) provides buffer. No dev needed.

6. **T0 switch timing** — viable when subs <~340 (saves $910/week), ~Day 420-440
7. **Billing forecast** — calculate mod30 for next week to predict cash flow direction

## R&D STATUS
- Not started any R&D (all tiers cost $167K+ — way too expensive given $125K cash)
- Quality gap for new leads cannot be fixed via affordable dev spend either

actions.result:
# CEOBench CLI Reference

## novamind-operation

Entry point for novamind-operation CLI.

Commands:
    next-week   Advance the simulation by one week (7 days).
                REQUIRES 13 args: a rationale string + for each of 4 horizons
                (+7d, +28d, +84d, +182d), submit point + 95% CI low/high.

Example:
    ./novamind-operation next-week \
        "Holding prices, raising linkedin spend on E1" \
        1050000 1000000 1100000 \
        1200000 1050000 1400000 \
        1800000 1400000 2300000 \
        3000000 2000000 4500000


### Commands

#### `./novamind-operation next-week`

Advance the simulator by one week (7 days) — REQUIRES a rationale string
plus cash predictions at four horizons, each with point estimate + 95% CI bounds.

Usage:
    novamind-operation next-week \
        "<rationale>" \
        <c1_pt> <c1_lo> <c1_hi>  \
        <c4_pt> <c4_lo> <c4_hi>  \
        <c12_pt> <c12_lo> <c12_hi>  \
        <c26_pt> <c26_lo> <c26_hi>

Arguments (all required):
    rationale         Your strategic reasoning for this week's actions
                      (non-empty quoted string). Replaces the old standalone
                      log_rationale tool. Recorded for analysis but does
                      not affect scoring.
    cash_1wk_point    Point estimate of cash 1 week from today (+7 days).
    cash_1wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_1wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for the +7-day forecast.
    cash_4wk_point    Point estimate of cash +28 days.
    cash_4wk_lower    95% CI lower bound for +28 days.
    cash_4wk_upper    95% CI upper bound for +28 days.
    cash_12wk_point   Point estimate of cash +84 days.
    cash_12wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +84 days.
    cash_12wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +84 days.
    cash_26wk_point   Point estimate of cash 6 months from today (+182 days).
    cash_26wk_lower   95% CI lower bound for +182 days.
    cash_26wk_upper   95% CI upper bound for +182 days.

Constraints (per horizon): ``lower <= point <= upper``. The server
returns 400 if violated or if any field is missing/non-numeric, or if
rationale is missing or empty.

Predictions are recorded at submission time and scored on percent error
`(point - actual) / actual` once actual cash is known. CI bounds are
scored on coverage (does the actual fall inside [lower, upper]?) and
sharpness (interval width / actual). You are evaluated on prediction
accuracy + calibration at each horizon in addition to realized cash.

Calls the API server to step the simulation forward by one week.
Prints the dashboard to stdout, which includes key metrics,
this week's results, and inbox notifications.

**NOTE:** The next_week call may take several minutes at large subscriber
counts. This is normal — just wait for the response.

Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure (including missing rationale or predictions).

## novamind

Entry point for novamind CLI.

Commands:
    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script

Examples:
    novamind register-daily-script strategy.py
    novamind list-daily-scripts
    novamind remove-daily-script strategy.py


### Commands

#### `novamind register-daily-script`

Register a Python script to run automatically at the start of each day.

The script content is snapshotted at registration time. Subsequent edits
to the source file will NOT affect the registered version. To update,
re-register the script.

If a script with the same filename already exists, it is overwritten.
Scripts are executed in alphabetical order at the start of each day,
with novamind_api pre-imported.

arguments.content:
# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 33 (Day 231)

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)
```bash
# next-week REQUIRES rationale as FIRST quoted arg + 12 numbers (13 total)
./novamind-operation next-week \
    "rationale string" \
    <cash_1wk_point> <cash_1wk_lower> <cash_1wk_upper> \
    <cash_4wk_point> <cash_4wk_lower> <cash_4wk_upper> \
    <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
    <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>
# CONFIRMED by CLI docs: rationale IS first arg (quoted string)
# nm.analytics has: set_targeted_ops_spend, set_targeted_dev_spend, get_social_posts ONLY
# NO log_rationale function — rationale goes in next-week command!
```

## CRITICAL RULES
- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (threads expire permanently!)
- Enterprise: use 'closed' column (WHERE closed=0)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (lost=not converted, cancelled=churned)
- Customers: NO 'status' column — use subscriptions join
- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
- Subscriptions: plan column (not plan_id), effective_price (not price)
- Enterprise turns: day column, message_text (not message)
- Ledger: id, day, category, amount, note
- get_social_posts: {'posts': [...], 'total': N}; fields: post_id, day, content, group_id, source_group_id, customer_type
- Issues: issues table with: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status, resolved_day, resolution_type
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- set_daily_spend: ops+dev ONLY (no ads)
- Social media: 1/week, max 280 chars
- Subscriptions: end_day column (NULL if active) — for cancellation timing
- Cancellations in a week: WHERE status='cancelled' AND end_day >= (start of week)
- ad_spend: NO such table; use ad_channel_leads for channel lead data
- DB query nm_day() does NOT exist — use nm.vars.current_day in Python, embed as literal in SQL

## CURRENT STATE (Day 231 / Week 33)
- Cash: $121,287 (was $125,573 → $121,287 — forecast was $121,578, off by only $291!)
- Subscribers: 980 (down 20 from 1,000 — exactly forecast!)
  - S1-A: 203 (was 211), S1-B: 11 (stable)
  - S2-A: 86 (was 90), S2-B: 659 (was 666), S2-C: 8 (stable)
  - S3-B: 13 (was 14)
- Open issues: 297 total (140 active-customer dashboard view)
  - S2: 183 issues (avg 13.9 days open — manageable)
  - S1: 86 issues (avg 30.6 days open — high but S1 dying)
  - S3: 28 issues (avg 40.25 days open — high but S3 dying)
- Global quality bonus: 0.1612 (was 0.1569 — WENT UP! Not monotonically decaying)

## ⚠️ QUALITY DISCOVERY: NOT MONOTONICALLY DECAYING
- Quality oscillates: W30: 0.1657 → W31: 0.1606 → W32: 0.1569 → W33: 0.1612
- Implication: quality decay may be slower than feared, or has natural variance
- S2-B Plan B delivered quality: 0.6629 (UP from 0.6590)
- S2-B perceived quality (5.1mo tenure → +0.092 bonus): ~0.755 (VERY HEALTHY)
- No dev spending needed — quality holding on its own

## ⚠️ CRITICAL DISCOVERY: ZERO NEW CONVERSIONS (CONFIRMED PERMANENT)
- ALL S2 leads since ~Day 190 are immediately "lost" (100% loss rate)
- Competitor events raised new-lead quality expectations ABOVE delivered quality
- NO NEW S2 SUBSCRIBERS without major quality investment (not ROI-positive)
- Business is in TERMINAL MANAGED DECLINE mode

## WEEK 33 CHURN ANALYSIS
- S2-B: 7 cancelled from 115 billing events = 6.1% churn rate (LOW — was 16.3% last week)
- S1-A: 8 cancelled; S2-A: 4 cancelled; S3-B: 1 cancelled
- Week-to-week variation is HIGH (6% to 16%) — cohort heterogeneity
- Conservative estimate: 10-12% per billing cycle for S2-B (using 11% going forward)

## BILLING SCHEDULE (NEXT 4 WEEKS)
| Week | Days | Mods | Billing Count | Expected Revenue |
|------|------|------|---------------|-----------------|
| 34 (next) | 232-238 | 22-28 | 268 | $6,543 (MEDIUM) |
| 35 | 239-245 | 29-5 | 366 | $9,552 (HEAVY) |
| 36 | 246-252 | 6-12 | 167 | $4,628 (LOW) |
| 37 | 253-259 | 13-19 | 136 | $4,134 (LOW) |
| 4-week total | 232-259 | - | 937 | $24,857 |

## PRICING (Day 231 — UNCHANGED)
- Plan A: $10/month (T2 model)
- Plan B: $35/month (T3 model)
- Plan C: $120/month (T4 model)
- ALL existing subs GRANDFATHERED. Price changes only affect new subs (0 new subs).
- S2-B avg: $33.28/mo (mix of grandfathered prices)
- S2-B avg tenure: 5.1 months (up from 4.9)

## COST STRUCTURE (Day 231)
- Capacity T1: $215/day = $1,505/week
- Ops: $200/day = $1,400/week
- Compute: ~$767/day avg = $5,369/week (declining slightly as subs drop)
- Lead acq: ~$56/week (112 leads/wk × $0.5)
- Dev: $0
- **TOTAL WEEKLY COSTS: ~$8,330/week**
- Revenue avg: ~$24,857/4wks = $6,214/week
- **NET: ~-$2,116/week average**

## FINANCIAL TRAJECTORY (UPDATED WEEK 33)
| Horizon | Day | Cash Estimate | CI Lower | CI Upper |
|---------|-----|---------------|----------|----------|
| NOW     | 231 | $121,287      | —        | —        |
| 1 wk    | 238 | $119,500      | $117,500 | $121,000 |
| 4 wk    | 259 | $113,720      | $108,000 | $118,500 |
| 12 wk   | 315 | $95,812       | $83,000  | $110,000 |
| 26 wk   | 413 | $65,000       | $45,000  | $88,000  |

## S2-B LONG-TERM REVENUE MODEL (11% churn/billing cycle)
- Current: 659 × $33.28/mo = $21,942/mo
- Month 1 (Day 261): 659 × 0.89 ≈ 587 subs → $19,534/mo
- Month 2 (Day 291): 587 × 0.89 ≈ 523 subs → $17,401/mo
- Month 3 (Day 321): 523 × 0.89 ≈ 466 subs → $15,505/mo
- Month 6 (Day 411): 330 subs → $10,982/mo

## GROUP PROFILES (Day 231)
| Group | Status | Count | Trajectory |
|-------|--------|-------|------------|
| S1-A | DYING (-8/wk) | 203 | gone ~Day 305-315 |
| S1-B | Nearly stable | 11 | slow decline |
| S2-A | Slow decline (-4/wk) | 86 | gone ~Day 370-390 |
| S2-B | CORE REVENUE (6-16%/billing) | 659 | main revenue, protected by tenure |
| S2-C | Micro | 8 | nearly gone |
| S3-B | Nearly gone | 13 | gone ~Day 250-260 |

## CAPACITY REFERENCE
| Tier | Units/day | Cost/day |
|------|-----------|----------|
| T0   | 50K       | $85/day  | ← viable when usage <50K/day (~<345 subs)
| T1   | 200K      | $215/day | ← CURRENT ✓ (142K avg usage for 980 subs)
| T2   | 800K      | $530/day |

T0 switch timing: ~Day 420-440 when S2-B drops to ~300 (saves $910/week)
Usage at 980 subs: 142K/day (at 71% of T1 limit — safe)

## DELIVERED QUALITY (Day 231)
- global_bonus: 0.1612 (UP from 0.1569 — quality oscillates, not monotonic decay)
- S2 Plan B: 0.6629
- S2-B PERCEIVED quality (5.1mo avg tenure, +0.092 bonus): ~0.755 (very healthy)
- Formula check: 0.9 × (0.20 + 0.1612 + 0.3753) = 0.9 × 0.7365 = 0.6629 ✓

## TENURE LOYALTY PROTECTION
- S2-B avg tenure: 5.1 months → +0.092 perceived quality bonus
- Even if delivered quality drops to 0.50, perceived = 0.592 (well above threshold ~0.37)
- Tenure grows over time, providing increasing protection

## IMPORTANT ERRORS TO AVOID
- next-week: RATIONALE FIRST (quoted), then 12 numbers (13 total)
- NO log_rationale function in nm.analytics (confirmed by CLI docs AND api docs)
- Enterprise turns: WHERE closed=0; message_text (not message)
- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (lost=never converted, cancelled=churned after sub)
- Issues: issues table, fields: issue_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status
- Social posts: nm.marketing.post_social_media() (NOT nm.analytics)
- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES ALL allocations
- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
- subscriptions: effective_price (NOT price)
- Revenue is LUMPY — weekly range $4,000-$9,500, average ~$6,200/week
- Compute blended rate: ~$767/day; dominated by T3 Plan B
- Subscriber prices are GRANDFATHERED — price changes only affect new subs!
- R&D is UNAFFORDABLE — all tiers cost $167K+
- Capacity T0 = 50K units/day (viable only at <345 subs AND <50K usage/day)
- NO new S2 conversions possible at current quality
- nm_day() SQL function does NOT exist — use literal day number in SQL queries
- Billing cohorts are based on start_day % 30, NOT sequential

## CRITICAL DB QUERIES
- Cash: nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as t FROM ledger')
- Active subs: WHERE status='subscribed'
- Enterprise open threads: WHERE closed=0
- Cancellations this week: WHERE status='cancelled' AND end_day >= DAY
- Active subs only: JOIN subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed'
- Next week billing: WHERE status='subscribed' AND billing_day_mod30 IN (mods)
  OR: WHERE (start_day % 30) IN (mods) AND status='subscribed'
- Key formula: next_week_mods = [(current_day + i) % 30 for i in range(1, 8)]
- Compute cost: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM ledger WHERE category='compute' AND day >= X
- Ledger query covers 8 days with day >= (day-7): divide by 8, multiply by 7 for weekly

## SOCIAL MEDIA
- Posts are mostly mixed/negative: support gaps, quota limits (S3), integration issues
- Strategy: NO posts — reputation doesn't affect conversions (0 new subs anyway)
- Last post was Day 189

## R&D STATUS
- Not started any R&D (all tiers cost $167K+ — unaffordable given $121K cash)
- Quality holding on its own; no R&D needed for existing subscribers

## KEY MONITORING CHECKLIST (EVERY WEEK)
1. **Enterprise threads** — WHERE closed=0 (respond within 7 days!)
2. **Global quality bonus** — 0.1612 (oscillating, not pure decay). Safe range.
3. **S2-B churn rate** — VARIABLE (6-16%/billing). Avg ~11%. Alarm if consistently >20%
4. **PMI trend** — not checked in W33 (quality gap is real barrier, not PMI)
5. **Peak daily compute** — T1 = 200K units/day limit; current avg 142K (safe at 71%)
6. **T0 switch timing** — viable when total subs ~345, ~Day 420-440 (saves $910/week)
7. **Billing forecast** — CRITICAL: calculate mod30 for next week to predict cash direction

import novamind_api as nm

# Investigate the 197 cancellations - breakdown by group
print('=== SUBSCRIBER BREAKDOWN BY GROUP ===')
subs = nm.query('''
    SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
    WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\"
    GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
for r in subs['rows']:
    print(f\"  {r['group_id']:4s} Plan {r['plan']}: {r['n']:4d} subs, avg \${r['avg_price']:.2f}/mo\")

total = nm.query('SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions WHERE status=\"subscribed\"')
print(f'Total: {total[\"rows\"][0][\"n\"]}')

# Cancellations this week (Days 232-238)
print('\n=== CANCELLATIONS THIS WEEK (Days 232-238) ===')
cancels = nm.query('''
    SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
    WHERE s.status=\"cancelled\" AND s.end_day >= 232
    GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
''')
for r in cancels['rows']:
    print(f\"  {r['group_id']:4s} Plan {r['plan']}: {r['n']:4d} cancelled\")
total_cancel = nm.query(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions WHERE status='cancelled' AND end_day >= 232\")
print(f'Total cancellations: {total_cancel[\"rows\"][0][\"n\"]}')
"

import novamind_api as nm

# S2-B: 155 cancellations! Analyze what billing cohort this was
print('=== S2-B CANCELLATION ANALYSIS ===')

# Check when the cancelled S2-B subs started (what cohort)
cancel_cohorts = nm.query('''
    SELECT s.start_day % 30 as mod30, COUNT(*) as n, 
           AVG(s.start_day) as avg_start, MIN(s.start_day) as min_start, MAX(s.end_day) as max_end
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
    WHERE s.status=\"cancelled\" AND s.end_day >= 232 
    AND c.group_id=\"S2\" AND s.plan=\"B\"
    GROUP BY mod30 ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10
''')
print('Billing cohorts of cancelled S2-B:')
for r in cancel_cohorts['rows']:

# Check all S2-B billing cohorts (active)

active_cohorts = nm.query('''

    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
    WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" AND c.group_id=\"S2\" AND s.plan=\"B\"
    GROUP BY mod30 ORDER BY mod30
''')
for r in active_cohorts['rows']:
    print(f\"  mod30={r['mod30']:2d}: {r['n']:3d} active\")
